code:
/* Double Time Overtime (California style) */
/* Hours 1-8: regular, 8-12: 1.5x, 12+: 2x */
DEFAULT FOR HOURS_WORKED IS 0
DEFAULT FOR REGULAR_RATE IS 0

regular_hours = 0
overtime_hours = 0
double_time_hours = 0

IF HOURS_WORKED > 12 THEN
  regular_hours = 8
  overtime_hours = 4
  double_time_hours = HOURS_WORKED - 12
ELSE
  IF HOURS_WORKED > 8 THEN
    regular_hours = 8
    overtime_hours = HOURS_WORKED - 8
  ELSE
    regular_hours = HOURS_WORKED
  END IF
END IF

regular_pay = regular_hours * REGULAR_RATE
overtime_pay = overtime_hours * REGULAR_RATE * 1.5
double_time_pay = double_time_hours * REGULAR_RATE * 2.0
total_pay = regular_pay + overtime_pay + double_time_pay

RETURN total_pay

/* Weekly Hours Cap with Warning */
DEFAULT FOR HOURS_WORKED IS 0
DEFAULT FOR MAX_WEEKLY_HOURS IS 60
DEFAULT FOR REGULAR_RATE IS 0

capped_hours = 0
excess_hours = 0
warning_flag = 'N'

IF HOURS_WORKED > MAX_WEEKLY_HOURS THEN
  capped_hours = MAX_WEEKLY_HOURS
  excess_hours = HOURS_WORKED - MAX_WEEKLY_HOURS
  warning_flag = 'Y'
ELSE
  capped_hours = HOURS_WORKED
END IF

total_pay = capped_hours * REGULAR_RATE
RETURN total_pay

/* Overtime Pay Calculation */
DEFAULT FOR HOURS_WORKED IS 0
DEFAULT FOR REGULAR_RATE IS 0
DEFAULT FOR OVERTIME_THRESHOLD IS 40
DEFAULT FOR OVERTIME_MULTIPLIER IS 1.5

overtime_hours = 0
overtime_pay = 0
regular_pay = 0

IF HOURS_WORKED > OVERTIME_THRESHOLD THEN
  overtime_hours = HOURS_WORKED - OVERTIME_THRESHOLD
  regular_pay = OVERTIME_THRESHOLD * REGULAR_RATE
  overtime_pay = overtime_hours * REGULAR_RATE * OVERTIME_MULTIPLIER
ELSE
  regular_pay = HOURS_WORKED * REGULAR_RATE
END IF

total_pay = regular_pay + overtime_pay
RETURN total_pay

/* Holiday Pay Calculation */
DEFAULT FOR HOURS_WORKED IS 0
DEFAULT FOR REGULAR_RATE IS 0
DEFAULT FOR HOLIDAY_FLAG IS 'N'
DEFAULT FOR HOLIDAY_MULTIPLIER IS 2.0

holiday_pay = 0

IF HOLIDAY_FLAG = 'Y' THEN
  holiday_pay = HOURS_WORKED * REGULAR_RATE * HOLIDAY_MULTIPLIER
ELSE
  holiday_pay = HOURS_WORKED * REGULAR_RATE
END IF

RETURN holiday_pay

/* Shift Differential Pay */
DEFAULT FOR HOURS_WORKED IS 0
DEFAULT FOR REGULAR_RATE IS 0
DEFAULT FOR SHIFT_TYPE IS 'DAY'
DEFAULT FOR NIGHT_DIFF_RATE IS 0.10
DEFAULT FOR EVENING_DIFF_RATE IS 0.05

shift_diff = 0

IF SHIFT_TYPE = 'NIGHT' THEN
  shift_diff = HOURS_WORKED * REGULAR_RATE * NIGHT_DIFF_RATE
ELSE
  IF SHIFT_TYPE = 'EVENING' THEN
    shift_diff = HOURS_WORKED * REGULAR_RATE * EVENING_DIFF_RATE
  ELSE
    shift_diff = 0
  END IF
END IF

RETURN shift_diff

Oracle Fast Formula — Time and Labor Guide

FORMULA TYPES FOR TIME AND LABOR:

1. Time Entry Rule - Validate and modify time entries on submission
2. Time Calculation Rule - Calculate derived values like overtime and premiums
3. Time Advanced Category Rule - Categorize time entries
4. Time Device Rule - Process time clock/device data
5. Time Submission Rule - Validate time card submissions
6. Workforce Compliance Rule - Check labor compliance regulations

COMMON TIME AND LABOR PATTERNS:

Overtime Calculation Pattern:
DEFAULT FOR HOURS_WORKED IS 0
DEFAULT FOR REGULAR_RATE IS 0
DEFAULT FOR OT_THRESHOLD IS 40
DEFAULT FOR OT_MULTIPLIER IS 1.5
IF HOURS_WORKED > OT_THRESHOLD THEN
  regular_pay = OT_THRESHOLD * REGULAR_RATE
  ot_hours = HOURS_WORKED - OT_THRESHOLD
  ot_pay = ot_hours * REGULAR_RATE * OT_MULTIPLIER
ELSE
  regular_pay = HOURS_WORKED * REGULAR_RATE
  ot_pay = 0
END IF
total_pay = regular_pay + ot_pay
RETURN total_pay

Shift Differential Pattern:
DEFAULT FOR SHIFT_TYPE IS 'DAY'
DEFAULT FOR HOURS_WORKED IS 0
DEFAULT FOR REGULAR_RATE IS 0
IF SHIFT_TYPE = 'NIGHT' THEN
  diff_rate = 0.15
ELSIF SHIFT_TYPE = 'EVENING' THEN
  diff_rate = 0.08
ELSE
  diff_rate = 0
END IF
shift_premium = HOURS_WORKED * REGULAR_RATE * diff_rate
RETURN shift_premium

Holiday Pay Pattern:
DEFAULT FOR HOLIDAY_FLAG IS 'N'
DEFAULT FOR HOURS_WORKED IS 0
DEFAULT FOR REGULAR_RATE IS 0
DEFAULT FOR HOLIDAY_MULTIPLIER IS 2.0
IF HOLIDAY_FLAG = 'Y' THEN
  pay = HOURS_WORKED * REGULAR_RATE * HOLIDAY_MULTIPLIER
ELSE
  pay = HOURS_WORKED * REGULAR_RATE
END IF
RETURN pay

Weekly Hours Cap Pattern:
DEFAULT FOR HOURS_WORKED IS 0
DEFAULT FOR MAX_HOURS IS 60
IF HOURS_WORKED > MAX_HOURS THEN
  capped_hours = MAX_HOURS
  warning_flag = 'Y'
ELSE
  capped_hours = HOURS_WORKED
  warning_flag = 'N'
END IF
RETURN capped_hours, warning_flag

California Double Overtime Pattern:
/* 1-8 hours: regular, 8-12 hours: 1.5x, 12+ hours: 2x */
DEFAULT FOR HOURS_WORKED IS 0
DEFAULT FOR REGULAR_RATE IS 0
IF HOURS_WORKED <= 8 THEN
  regular_hours = HOURS_WORKED
  ot_hours = 0
  dt_hours = 0
ELSIF HOURS_WORKED <= 12 THEN
  regular_hours = 8
  ot_hours = HOURS_WORKED - 8
  dt_hours = 0
ELSE
  regular_hours = 8
  ot_hours = 4
  dt_hours = HOURS_WORKED - 12
END IF
total = (regular_hours * REGULAR_RATE) + (ot_hours * REGULAR_RATE * 1.5) + (dt_hours * REGULAR_RATE * 2)
RETURN total

WAS DEFAULTED Pattern:
DEFAULT FOR hourly_rate IS 15.00
INPUTS ARE hours_worked
IF hourly_rate WAS DEFAULTED THEN
  warning = 'Default rate applied'
END IF
pay = hours_worked * hourly_rate
RETURN pay, warning

COMMON DATABASE ITEMS (DBIs) FOR TIME AND LABOR:
HWM_PPM_TM_MEASURE - Time measure value (hours/days)
HWM_PPM_TM_RESOURCE_ID - Resource ID for time entry
HWM_PPM_TM_START_TIME - Start time
HWM_PPM_TM_STOP_TIME - Stop time
HWM_EMP_SCHD_SHIFT_NAME - Employee schedule shift name
HWM_EMP_SCHD_MEASURE - Schedule hours
PER_ASG_NORMAL_HOURS - Normal working hours
PER_ASG_EMPLOYMENT_CATEGORY - Full time / Part time
PER_EMP_HIRE_DATE - Hire date
PAY_EARN_PERIOD_START - Pay period start
PAY_EARN_PERIOD_END - Pay period end

BEST PRACTICES:
- Always use DEFAULT FOR to set fallback values for all input variables
- Always end formula with RETURN statement
- Use meaningful variable names (total_pay, not x)
- Add comments explaining business logic
- Validate with WAS DEFAULTED when default values could affect calculations
- Keep formulas focused on one calculation; use CALL_FORMULA for complex logic
- Use INPUTS ARE to explicitly declare input parameters with types
- Follow statement order: ALIAS > DEFAULT > INPUTS > logic > RETURN

Oracle Fast Formula Built-in Functions Reference

NUMERIC FUNCTIONS:
ABS(n) - absolute value. ABS(-17) returns 17
CEIL(n) - rounds up to integer. CEIL(35.1) returns 36
FLOOR(n) - rounds down to integer. FLOOR(35.9) returns 35
GREATEST(n1, n2, ...) - returns largest value. GREATEST(5, 10, 3) returns 10
LEAST(n1, n2, ...) - returns smallest value. LEAST(5, 10, 3) returns 3
POWER(m, n) - m raised to power n. POWER(2, 3) returns 8
ROUND(n, m) - round to m decimal places. ROUND(2.3461, 2) returns 2.35
ROUNDUP(n, m) - round up. ROUNDUP(2.3401, 2) returns 2.35
TRUNC(n, m) - truncate to m decimal places. TRUNC(2.3461, 2) returns 2.34

STRING FUNCTIONS:
CHR(n) - character from ASCII code. CHR(10) returns newline
INITCAP(text) - capitalize first letters. INITCAP('john smith') returns 'John Smith'
INSTR(text, search, start, occurrence) - find position. INSTR('hello', 'l') returns 3
LENGTH(text) - string length. LENGTH('hello') returns 5
LOWER(text) - lowercase. LOWER('JOHN') returns 'john'
UPPER(text) - uppercase. UPPER('john') returns 'JOHN'
LPAD(text, n, pad) - left pad. LPAD('hi', 5, 'x') returns 'xxxhi'
RPAD(text, n, pad) - right pad. RPAD('hi', 5, 'x') returns 'hixxx'
LTRIM(text, set) - trim left. LTRIM('aaabbb', 'a') returns 'bbb'
RTRIM(text, set) - trim right. RTRIM('aaabbb', 'b') returns 'aaa'
REPLACE(text, search, replacement) - replace. REPLACE('hello', 'l', 'L') returns 'heLLo'
SUBSTR(text, start, length) - substring. SUBSTR('hello', 2, 3) returns 'ell'
TRANSLATE(text, from, to) - character translation
TRIM(char FROM text) - trim character from both sides

DATE FUNCTIONS:
ADD_DAYS(date, n) - add days. ADD_DAYS('30-DEC-1990' (date), 6) returns 05-JAN-1991
ADD_MONTHS(date, n) - add months
ADD_YEARS(date, n) - add years
DAYS_BETWEEN(date1, date2) - days between two dates (can be negative)
MONTHS_BETWEEN(date1, date2) - months between two dates
LAST_DAY(date) - last day of month. LAST_DAY('15-FEB-2000' (date)) returns 29-FEB-2000
NEXT_DAY(date, weekday) - next specified weekday
NEW_TIME(date, zone1, zone2) - convert timezone

CONVERSION FUNCTIONS:
TO_NUMBER(text) - convert text to number. TO_NUMBER('1234') returns 1234
TO_CHAR(number) - convert number to text. TO_CHAR(1234) returns '1234'
TO_CHAR(date, format) - convert date to text with format
TO_DATE(text, format) - convert text to date. TO_DATE('12 January 89', 'DD Month YY')
TO_TEXT(number) - convert number to text
NUM_TO_CHAR(number, format) - formatted number to text. NUM_TO_CHAR(1234.5, '$9,990.99') returns '$1,234.50'
DATE_TO_TEXT(date, format) - date to text

LOOKUP FUNCTIONS:
GET_TABLE_VALUE(table_name, column_name, row_value, effective_date) - lookup table value
GET_LOOKUP_MEANING(lookup_type, lookup_code) - lookup meaning from Oracle lookups
RAISE_ERROR(application_id, message_name) - raise application error
RATES_HISTORY(name, date, indicator, time_dimension) - historical rate lookup

GLOBAL VARIABLE FUNCTIONS:
SET_TEXT(var_name, value) - set text global, returns 0 success / 1 error
SET_NUMBER(var_name, value) - set numeric global
SET_DATE(var_name, value) - set date global
GET_TEXT(var_name) - get text global or NULL
GET_NUMBER(var_name) - get numeric global or NULL
GET_DATE(var_name) - get date global or NULL
ISNULL(var_name) - test if NULL, returns 'Y' or 'N'
CLEAR_GLOBALS() - set all globals to NULL
REMOVE_GLOBALS() - remove all globals

FORMULA FUNCTIONS:
CALL_FORMULA(formula_name) - call another formula
LOOP_CONTROL(formula_name) - repeatedly call formula until CONTINUE_LOOP != 'Y'
PUT_MESSAGE(text) - add message to output stack
DEBUG(text) - write debug message to console

ACCRUAL FUNCTIONS:
CALCULATE_HOURS_WORKED(hours, date1, date2, frequency) - calculate hours worked
GET_ABSENCE(calc_date, start_date) - total absence between dates
GET_ACCRUAL_BAND(length_of_service) - determine accrual band
GET_WORKING_DAYS(start_date, end_date) - working days (Mon-Fri)
GET_PAYROLL_PERIOD(date) - get payroll period info
GET_NET_ACCRUAL(calc_date, plan_id, start_date, balance) - net accrual at date
GET_CARRY_OVER(calc_date, start_date) - carry over days/hours

Oracle Fast Formula Syntax Reference

RESERVED WORDS: ALIAS, AND, ARE, AS, DEFAULT, DEFAULTED, ELSE, ELSIF, EXECUTE, EXIT, FOR, IF, INPUT, INPUTS, IS, LIKE, LOCAL, LOOP, NOT, OR, OUTPUT, RETURN, THEN, USING, WAS, WHILE

VARIABLE DECLARATIONS:
DEFAULT FOR variable_name IS constant_value
DEFAULT FOR hourly_rate IS 15.00
DEFAULT FOR start_date IS '1990-01-01 00:00:00' (date)
DEFAULT FOR status IS 'ACTIVE' (text)
INPUT IS variable_name
INPUTS ARE var1 (number), var2 (text), var3 (date)
OUTPUT IS variable_name
LOCAL variable_name (type)
ALIAS long_database_item_name AS short_name

DATA TYPES:
NUMBER - integer or decimal, no quotes: 63, -2.3, 0.33
TEXT - single quotes: 'Smith', 'O''Brien' (double single quote to escape)
DATE - quoted with (date): '2024-01-15 00:00:00' (date), '15-JAN-2024' (date)

ASSIGNMENT:
variable_name = expression
wage = hours_worked * hourly_rate

IF STATEMENT:
IF condition THEN
  statement1
  statement2
ELSIF condition2 THEN
  statement3
ELSE
  statement4
END IF

For multiple statements under THEN/ELSE, you can use parentheses:
IF condition THEN
(
  statement1
  statement2
)
ELSE
(
  statement3
  statement4
)

WHILE LOOP:
WHILE condition LOOP
  statements
END LOOP
Use EXIT to leave a WHILE loop immediately.

RETURN:
RETURN variable1, variable2, variable3
Can return multiple variables. Stops formula execution.

ARITHMETIC OPERATORS: + (addition/text concat), - (subtraction), * (multiplication), / (division)
COMPARISON OPERATORS: = (equals), != <> >< (not equal), < > <= >= => =< (less/greater)
LOGICAL OPERATORS: AND, OR, NOT (precedence: NOT > AND > OR)
PATTERN MATCHING: LIKE, NOT LIKE (wildcards: % = any chars, _ = single char)
SPECIAL: WAS DEFAULTED (test if default value was used)

STATEMENT ORDER (required):
1. Comments (optional, can appear anywhere)
2. ALIAS statements
3. DEFAULT statements
4. INPUTS statement
5. Other statements (Assignment, If, While, Return)

VARIABLE NAMING:
- Words joined by underscores: variable_name
- Start with alphabetic character (A-Z)
- Followed by alphanumeric (A-Z, 0-9)
- Maximum 80 characters
- Case-insensitive: EMPLOYEE_NAME = employee_name
- Cannot be reserved words or digits-only

COMMENTS:
/* This is a block comment */
Can be placed anywhere. Cannot nest comments.

/**********************************************************************
FORMULA NAME: GPAY_RP9_VDED_REL_VOL_DEDN_CALCULATOR
FORMULA TYPE: Payroll
VERSION: $Header: fusionapps/hcm/pay/db/data/HcmSetupTemplateTop/HcmSetupTemplateVolDedEls/TemplateColumnInstanceSD.xml /st_fusionapps_11.1.1.5.1/13 2013/09/20 06:10:00 ssouresr Exp $
DESCRIPTION :
***********************************************************************/
Alias GROSS_EARNINGS_REL_RUN as Gross_Earnings
Alias GROSS_EARNINGS_REL_NOCB_RUN as Gross_Earnings_nocb
Alias NET_REL_RUN as Net_Earnings

Default for Gross_Earnings is 0
Default for Gross_Earnings_nocb is 0
Default for Net_Earnings  	is 0

Default for GPAY_RP9_VDED_REL_ACCRUED_ASG_ITD is 0
Default for GPAY_RP9_VDED_REL_ACCRUED_TRM_ITD is 0
Default for GPAY_RP9_VDED_REL_ACCRUED_REL_ITD is 0

Default for GPAY_RP9_VDED_REL_ARREAR_ASG_ITD is 0
Default for GPAY_RP9_VDED_REL_ARREAR_TRM_ITD is 0
Default for GPAY_RP9_VDED_REL_ARREAR_REL_ITD is 0

Default for GPAY_RP9_VDED_REL_ELIGIBLE_COMP_ASG_RUN is 0
Default for GPAY_RP9_VDED_REL_ELIGIBLE_COMP_TRM_RUN is 0
Default for GPAY_RP9_VDED_REL_ELIGIBLE_COMP_REL_RUN is 0

Default for ENTRY_LEVEL		is 'PA'

ee_id = GET_CONTEXT(ELEMENT_ENTRY_ID,0)
dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('[GPAY_RP9_VDED_REL_VOL_DEDN_CALCULATOR] - ee_id  = '||to_char(ee_id))

IF ee_id = 0 THEN
(  
  dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('[GPAY_RP9_VDED_REL_VOL_DEDN_CALCULATOR] Element Entry Id context not set')
  error_mesg = 'Element Entry Id context is not set.'
  Return error_mesg
) 
ELSE 
(   
  /*   --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  **   Attachment Level determines the appropriate Dimension used to calculate 
  **   the Deduction 
  **   --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  */
  Attachment_Level 	= ENTRY_LEVEL
  IF (Attachment_Level = 'PA') THEN
  (  
    /* Assignment Level */
    Eligible_Compensation = GPAY_RP9_VDED_REL_ELIGIBLE_COMP_ASG_RUN
    Arrears_Balance       = GPAY_RP9_VDED_REL_ARREAR_ASG_ITD
    Amount_accrued        = GPAY_RP9_VDED_REL_ACCRUED_ASG_ITD
  )
  ELSE IF (Attachment_Level = 'AP' or Attachment_Level = 'PT') THEN
  (  
    /* Terms Level */
    Eligible_Compensation = GPAY_RP9_VDED_REL_ELIGIBLE_COMP_TRM_RUN
    Arrears_Balance       = GPAY_RP9_VDED_REL_ARREAR_TRM_ITD
    Amount_accrued        = GPAY_RP9_VDED_REL_ACCRUED_TRM_ITD
  )
  ELSE IF (Attachment_Level = 'PR') THEN
  ( 
    /* Relationship Level */
    Eligible_Compensation = GPAY_RP9_VDED_REL_ELIGIBLE_COMP_REL_RUN
    Arrears_Balance       = GPAY_RP9_VDED_REL_ARREAR_REL_ITD
    Amount_accrued        = GPAY_RP9_VDED_REL_ACCRUED_REL_ITD
  )
  
  dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('[GPAY_RP9_VDED_REL_VOL_DEDN_CALCULATOR] - Eligible_Compensation = '||to_char(Eligible_Compensation))
  dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('[GPAY_RP9_VDED_REL_VOL_DEDN_CALCULATOR] - Arrears_Balance...... = '||to_char(Arrears_Balance))
  dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('[GPAY_RP9_VDED_REL_VOL_DEDN_CALCULATOR] - Amount_accrued....... = '||to_char(Amount_accrued))

  call_formula(
      'GLB_DEDN_VDED_CALC',
	  Gross_Earnings        > 'Gross_Earnings',
	  Gross_Earnings_nocb   > 'Gross_Earnings_nocb',
	  Net_Earnings          > 'Net_Earnings',	  
      Eligible_Compensation > 'Eligible_Compensation',
      Arrears_Balance       > 'Arrears_Balance',
      Amount_accrued        > 'Amount_accrued',
      ee_id                 > 'ee_id',
	  dedn_amt              < 'dedn_amt' default 0,
	  to_total_owed         < 'to_total_owed' default 0,
	  to_arrears            < 'to_arrears' default 0,
	  not_taken             < 'not_taken' default 0,
	  mesg                  < 'mesg' default 'ZZZ',
	  error_mesg            < 'error_mesg' default 'ZZZ',
      stop_entry            < 'stop_entry' default 'N'
  )  
  
  IF (error_mesg <> 'ZZZ') THEN Return error_mesg
  
  /* ------------------------------------------------------------------------
  ** We need to check if stop_entry is populated, as regardless of what value 
  ** it holds, processing will stop if its returned
  ** ------------------------------------------------------------------------
  */
  IF stop_entry = 'Y' THEN 
  (
    mesg = 'GPAY_RP9_VDED_REL has reached the Total Amount that is owed. Future processing will halt.'
    RETURN dedn_amt,
           stop_entry,
           to_total_owed,
           mesg,
           to_arrears,
           not_taken,
           error_mesg  
  )
  ELSE
  (
      IF (mesg <> 'ZZZ') THEN
    (
	  RETURN dedn_amt,
           to_total_owed,
           to_arrears,
           not_taken,
		   mesg
	) ELSE (
	  RETURN dedn_amt,
           to_total_owed,
           to_arrears,
           not_taken	
	)
  )  
)

          ,Period_Type (text)
          ,Percentage
          ,Threshold_Amount

wsa_percentage[ee_id] = Percentage

WSA_SET('AMOUNT',wsa_amount)
WSA_SET('PERIOD_TYPE',wsa_period_type)
WSA_SET('PERCENTAGE',wsa_percentage)
  
RETURN Amount

 * Description: Description: SPR Formula for US Pretax 401K Catchup element
 * Change List:
 * Name   Date   Version  Bug          Text
 * DEEPEGUP  17-Oct-2012  1.1      Initial Version
 * SHIRK     2-Mar-2016   1.2   22709599 adding WSA_delete statements
 *****************************************************************************/

/* This Formula Populates the Input Values in Global Working Set */

Default for Deduction_Amount             is 0
 Default for Amount                       is 0
 Default for Percentage                   is 0
 Default for Process_Type            is 'N'
    Default for Override_IRS_Limit           is 99999999
    Default for Period_Type                  is 'NOT ENTERED'
 Default for Partial_Flag        is 'N'
 Default for Enforce_Compensation_Limit      is 'NOVALUE'
 Default for Override_IRS_Annual_Compensation_Limit           is -1
 DEFAULT FOR separate_tax_code        IS 'ORA_HRX_US_REGULAR'

 INPUTS are
     Deduction_Amount
    ,Amount
 ,Percentage
    ,Process_Type
    ,Override_Irs_Limit
 ,Period_Type
 ,Partial_Flag
 ,Enforce_Compensation_Limit
 ,separate_tax_code(TEXT)
 ,Override_IRS_Annual_Compensation_Limit

Attachment_Level    = ENTRY_LEVEL



 /* Fetching the Context Values */
l_element_entry_id       = GET_CONTEXT(ELEMENT_ENTRY_ID, 0)
l_payroll_rel_action_id  = GET_CONTEXT(PAYROLL_REL_ACTION_ID, 0)
KEY_SEPERATOR = '_'

/* Preparing a Unique Key */
PRETAX_PREL_TU_EE_KEY = TO_CHAR(l_element_entry_id)|| KEY_SEPERATOR || TO_CHAR(l_payroll_rel_action_id)
dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('PRETAX_PREL_TU_EE_KEY =: ' || PRETAX_PREL_TU_EE_KEY)


IF separate_tax_code WAS NOT DEFAULTED THEN
         (
				l_ele_entry_value_array['SEPARATE_TAX_CODE'] = separate_tax_code
				SET_INPUT('SEPARATE_TAX_CODE',separate_tax_code)
         )

l_sep_taxcode = separate_tax_code

/* Preparing WSA Keys for Input Values */
US_PRETAX_CATCHUP_AMOUNT_KEY        = 'USPT_CATCHUP_AMOUNT_' || PRETAX_PREL_TU_EE_KEY
US_PRETAX_CATCHUP_PERCENTAGE_KEY  = 'USPT_CATCHUP_PERCENTAGE_' || PRETAX_PREL_TU_EE_KEY
US_PRETAX_PROCESS_TYPE_KEY    = 'USPT_PROCESS_TYPE_' || PRETAX_PREL_TU_EE_KEY
US_PRETAX_OVERRIDE_IRS_LIMIT_KEY  = 'USPT_OVERRIDE_IRS_LIMIT_' || PRETAX_PREL_TU_EE_KEY
US_PRETAX_ELEMENT_PERIOD_TYPE_KEY  = 'USPT_ELEMENT_PERIOD_TYPE_' || PRETAX_PREL_TU_EE_KEY
US_PRETAX_PARTIAL_FLAG_KEY    = 'USPT_PARTIAL_FLAG_' || PRETAX_PREL_TU_EE_KEY
US_PRETAX_ATTACHMENT_LEVEL_KEY   = 'USPT_ATTACHMENT_LEVEL_' || PRETAX_PREL_TU_EE_KEY
US_PRETAX_DEDUCTION_AMOUNT_KEY     = 'USPT_DEDUCTION_AMOUNT_' || PRETAX_PREL_TU_EE_KEY
WSA_DELETE(US_PRETAX_DEDUCTION_AMOUNT_KEY)
WSA_SET(US_PRETAX_DEDUCTION_AMOUNT_KEY,Deduction_Amount)
US_PRETAX_ENFORCE_COMP_LIMIT_KEY  = 'USPT_ENFORCE_COMP_LIMIT_' || PRETAX_PREL_TU_EE_KEY
US_PRETAX_OVERRIDE_IRS_ANNL_COMP_LIMIT_KEY  = 'USPT_OVERRIDE_IRS_ANNL_COMP_LIMIT_' || PRETAX_PREL_TU_EE_KEY

 WSA_DELETE(US_PRETAX_PROCESS_TYPE_KEY)
 WSA_DELETE(US_PRETAX_ATTACHMENT_LEVEL_KEY)
 WSA_DELETE(US_PRETAX_OVERRIDE_IRS_LIMIT_KEY)
 WSA_DELETE(US_PRETAX_PARTIAL_FLAG_KEY)
 WSA_DELETE(US_PRETAX_CATCHUP_AMOUNT_KEY)
 WSA_DELETE(US_PRETAX_ELEMENT_PERIOD_TYPE_KEY)
 WSA_DELETE(US_PRETAX_CATCHUP_PERCENTAGE_KEY)
 WSA_DELETE(US_PRETAX_ENFORCE_COMP_LIMIT_KEY)
 WSA_DELETE(US_PRETAX_OVERRIDE_IRS_ANNL_COMP_LIMIT_KEY)

WSA_SET(US_PRETAX_CATCHUP_AMOUNT_KEY,Amount)
WSA_SET(US_PRETAX_CATCHUP_PERCENTAGE_KEY,Percentage)
WSA_SET(US_PRETAX_PROCESS_TYPE_KEY,Process_Type)
WSA_SET(US_PRETAX_OVERRIDE_IRS_LIMIT_KEY,Override_IRS_Limit)
WSA_SET(US_PRETAX_ELEMENT_PERIOD_TYPE_KEY,Period_Type)
WSA_SET(US_PRETAX_PARTIAL_FLAG_KEY,Partial_Flag)
WSA_SET(US_PRETAX_ATTACHMENT_LEVEL_KEY,Attachment_Level)
WSA_SET(US_PRETAX_ENFORCE_COMP_LIMIT_KEY,Enforce_Compensation_Limit)
WSA_SET(US_PRETAX_OVERRIDE_IRS_ANNL_COMP_LIMIT_KEY,Override_IRS_Annual_Compensation_Limit)

              DESCRIPTION:  US Overriden Template Formula for  Premium Proration .
***************************************************************************************/

/********************************************************************************
 * $Header:                                                                     *
 * Formula Name : _US_PRORATION							*
 * Description  : Proration Logic for US					*
 * Detail       :							        *
 *										*
 *                                                                              *
 *******************************************************************************/

DEFAULT FOR prorate_start  is '1900/01/01 00:00:00' (date)
DEFAULT FOR prorate_end is '1900/01/01 00:00:00' (date)
DEFAULT FOR pay_value is 0
DEFAULT FOR hours_worked is 0

INPUTS  are prorate_start (date),
            prorate_end (date),
            pay_value (number),
            hours_worked (number)


l_hours = hours_worked
l_pay_value = pay_value
l_total_days = days_between(PAY_EARN_PERIOD_END, PAY_EARN_PERIOD_START ) + 1

/* Key Variable values retrival*/
l_element_entry_id       = GET_CONTEXT(ELEMENT_ENTRY_ID, 0)
l_tax_unit_id  = GET_CONTEXT(TAX_UNIT_ID, 0)
l_payroll_rel_action_id  = GET_CONTEXT(PAYROLL_REL_ACTION_ID, 0)

 IF l_payroll_rel_action_id = 0 THEN
(
   l_msg      = GET_MESG('HRX','HRX_USETE_CONTEXT_NOT_SET','CONTEXT','PAYROLL_REL_ACTION_ID')
   l_dummy = PAY_LOG_ERROR(l_msg)
/*   dummy = 1 */
   /* Formula must error out at this point */
)

IF l_tax_unit_id = 0 THEN
(
   l_msg      = GET_MESG('HRX','HRX_USETE_CONTEXT_NOT_SET','CONTEXT','TAX_UNIT_ID')
   l_dummy = PAY_LOG_ERROR(l_msg)
   /*  dummy = 1 */
   /* Formula must error out at this point */
)

IF l_element_entry_id = 0 THEN
(
   l_msg      = GET_MESG('HRX','HRX_USETE_CONTEXT_NOT_SET','CONTEXT','ELEMENT_ENTRY_ID')
   l_dummy = PAY_LOG_ERROR(l_msg)
/*   dummy = 1 */
   /* Formula must error out at this point */
)

/**
  Prorate_start and prorate_end dates are passed from the payroll engine. These
  dates basically represent the dates on which the changes occur in the
  deduction amount during the pay period. annual_amount is an input value
  created in the element to which this formula will be tied. Here the
  assumption is that the user enters the annual deduction amount in the
  input value.
**/

l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('(GLBEARN)  Before Prorate pay_value : '||TO_CHAR(pay_value))
l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('(GLBEARN)  Before Prorate hours_worked : '||TO_CHAR(hours_worked))

IF (prorate_start was defaulted) then
(

l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('(GLBEARN)Initializing the Flat Amount Earnings Formula2')
l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('(GLBEARN) l_pay_value : '||TO_CHAR(l_pay_value))
    l_days = l_total_days
)
else
(

l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('(GLBEARNP)Initializing the Flat Amount Earnings Formula3')
    l_days = days_between(prorate_end , prorate_start) + 1
    l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('(GLBEARN) l_pay_value : '||TO_CHAR(l_pay_value))
    l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('(GLBEARN) l_total_days : '||TO_CHAR(l_total_days))
    l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('(GLBEARN) l_days : '||TO_CHAR(l_days))
)

l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('(GLBEARN)Initializing the Flat Amount Earnings Formula4.1')
    pay_value = (l_pay_value / l_total_days) * l_days
    hours_worked = (l_hours/ l_total_days) * l_days   /** will be replaced by Get_pay_availibility **/
    hours_worked=ROUND(hours_worked,2)
   l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('(GLBEARN)  pay_value : '||TO_CHAR(pay_value))
   l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('(GLBEARN)  hours : '||TO_CHAR(hours_worked))

   /* Preparing Key for Prorate Payvalue and Hours */

 US_EARN_PRORATE_KEY = TO_CHAR(l_element_entry_id)||'-'|| TO_CHAR(l_tax_unit_id)||'-'|| TO_CHAR(l_payroll_rel_action_id)||'-'|| TO_CHAR(prorate_start)
 l_dummy =PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('(USPRORATEEARN) US_EARN_PRORATE_KEY'||US_EARN_PRORATE_KEY)

 US_EARN_PRORATE_PAY_KEY = 'PAY_'||US_EARN_PRORATE_KEY
 l_dummy =PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('(USPRORATEEARN) US_EARN_PRORATE_PAY_KEY'||US_EARN_PRORATE_PAY_KEY)

 US_EARN_PRORATE_HOUR_KEY = 'HOUR_'|| US_EARN_PRORATE_KEY
 l_dummy =PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('(USPRORATEEARN) US_EARN_PRORATE_HR_KEY'||US_EARN_PRORATE_HOUR_KEY)

 /* Setting Payvalue and hours in WSA*/
 WSA_SET(US_EARN_PRORATE_PAY_KEY,pay_value)
 WSA_SET(US_EARN_PRORATE_HOUR_KEY,hours_worked)

return pay_value,hours_worked

/***************************************************************************
 $Header:                                                                  *
 * Formula Name : WFMTLPJC_Holiday_EARN_AUTO_INDIRECT                           *
 * Description  : Return valid jurisdictions for earnings element entry    *
 * Detail       :                                                          *
 *                                                                         *
 ***************************************************************************/

l_state                     = EMPTY_NUMBER_NUMBER
l_county                    = EMPTY_NUMBER_NUMBER
l_city                      = EMPTY_NUMBER_NUMBER

CALL_FORMULA('US_WSA_OPERATIONS','GET_US_EARN_JURD_ARRY' > 'P_MODE'
  ,US_EARN_JURD_ARRY < 'US_EARN_JURD_ARRY' DEFAULT EMPTY_TEXT_NUMBER)

I = US_EARN_JURD_ARRY.FIRST(-1)
J = 1

WHILE US_EARN_JURD_ARRY.EXISTS(I) LOOP
(

   l_geocode = US_EARN_JURD_ARRY[I]

   SET_INPUT ('P_GEOCODE', l_geocode)
   SET_INPUT ('P_PROVIDER', 'VERTEX')
   SET_INPUT ('P_LEVEL', 'CITY')

   EXECUTE('US_SPLIT_GEOCODE')

   l_status        = GET_OUTPUT('X_STATUS', '1')

   IF l_status = '0' THEN
   (
      l_state[J]            = GET_OUTPUT('X_STATE', 0)
      l_county[J]           = GET_OUTPUT('X_COUNTY', 0)
      l_city[J]             = GET_OUTPUT('X_CITY', 0)
      J=J+1
   )
   ELSE
   (
      l_msg      = GET_MESG('HRX',  'HRX_USETE_GEOCODE_SPLIT_ERROR','FORMULA_NAME','_EARN_AUTO_INDIRECT')
      l_dummy = PAY_LOG_ERROR(l_msg)
   )

   I = US_EARN_JURD_ARRY.NEXT(I, -1)

) /* End of WHILE loop */


"AREA1" = l_state
"AREA2" = l_county
"AREA3" = l_city


RETURN "AREA1", "AREA2", "AREA3"

/* ------------------------------------------------------------------------
    NAME : ACCRUAL_SIMPLE_CARRYOVER
    This formula is the seeded carryover formula to calculate the carryover amount.
   ---------------------------------------------------------------------*/
   DEFAULT FOR ACP_HIRE_DATE IS '4712/12/31 00:00:00' (date)
   DEFAULT FOR ACP_CONTINUOUS_SERVICE_DATE IS '4712/12/31 00:00:00' (date)
   
   DEFAULT FOR ACP_TERM_TYPE IS 'S'      
   DEFAULT FOR ACP_TERM_START IS '01/06' 
   DEFAULT FOR ACP_TERM_LENGTH IS 1
   DEFAULT FOR ACP_TERM_UOM IS 'Y'
   
   DEFAULT FOR ACP_CO_EXPIRY_LENGTH IS 1
   DEFAULT FOR ACP_CO_EXPIRY_LENGTH_UOM IS 'Y'
   
   INPUTS ARE Calculation_Date (date), Accrual_term (text)
    
    IF (ACP_TERM_TYPE = 'S') THEN
   ( 
    Accrual_Term_Start_Date = TO_DATE(ACP_TERM_START||'/'||to_char(Calculation_Date,'YYYY'),'DD/MM/YYYY')                  
   IF Accrual_Term_Start_Date > Calculation_Date THEN
    (   
      Accrual_Term_Start_Date = GET_END_DATE(Accrual_Term_Start_Date , - ACP_TERM_LENGTH , ACP_TERM_UOM)                        
    )        
    Accrual_Term_End_Date   = ADD_DAYS(GET_END_DATE(Accrual_Term_Start_Date , ACP_TERM_LENGTH , ACP_TERM_UOM),-1)
              
    IF (Accrual_Term = 'CURRENT') THEN
       (
         Co_Effective_date = Accrual_Term_End_Date
       )
    ELSE IF (Accrual_term = 'PREVIOUS') THEN
       (
         Co_Effective_date = ADD_DAYS(Accrual_Term_Start_Date, -1)
       )
    ELSE
       (
        /* Donot process  */
        Process = 'N'
        RETURN
       )
    Process = 'YES'
   )
ELSE IF (ACP_TERM_TYPE = 'H') THEN
   (
  
     IF ( ACP_HIRE_DATE WAS NOT DEFAULTED ) THEN
      (
          Hire_Date  = add_months(ACP_HIRE_DATE,trunc(months_between(Calculation_Date,ACP_HIRE_DATE) / 12) * 12)
     IF (Accrual_Term = 'CURRENT') THEN
      (
          Hire_Date = ADD_YEARS(Hire_Date, 1)
      )
       Co_Effective_date = add_days(Hire_Date, -1)
     )
     Process = 'YES'
  )
ELSE  IF (ACP_TERM_TYPE = 'R') THEN
(
   
 /* Although carryover has no meaning for a plan of this kind, we still require a formula for use by
    the absence screen. This formula simply returns calculation date, and zero.*/
     Co_Effective_date = Calculation_Date
     Max_Carryover  = 0
     Co_Expiry_Date    = Calculation_Date
     return
)
/*To calculate the Co_Expiry_Date And Max_Carryover   */
 IF (Process = 'YES') THEN
 (
     /*Co_Expiry_Date calculation     */
     Co_Expiry_Date = get_end_date(Co_Effective_date,ACP_CO_EXPIRY_LENGTH,ACP_CO_EXPIRY_LENGTH_UOM)

     /*Max_Carryover calculation     */
     IF ACP_CONTINUOUS_SERVICE_DATE WAS DEFAULTED THEN
     (
       Continuous_Service_Date = ACP_HIRE_DATE
     )
    ELSE
     (
      Continuous_Service_Date = ACP_CONTINUOUS_SERVICE_DATE
     )
    Years_service = floor(months_between(Co_Effective_date, Continuous_Service_Date) / 12)
    IF (GET_ACCRUAL_BAND('NN',years_service) = 0) THEN
      (
         Max_carryover = GET_NUMBER('MAX_CARRY_OVER')
      )
    ELSE
     (
       Max_carryover = 0
     )

 )
  RETURN Max_Carryover, Co_Effective_date, Co_Expiry_Date, Process

/* -----------------------------------------------------------
        Name   :  ORA_ACCRUAL_PAYROLL_CARRYOVER
     Purpose   :  Carryover formula based on payroll
------------------------------------------------------------------*/
DEFAULT FOR ACP_HIRE_DATE IS '4712/12/31 00:00:00' (date)
DEFAULT FOR ACP_CONTINUOUS_SERVICE_DATE IS '4712/12/31 00:00:00' (date)

INPUTS ARE Calculation_Date (date), Accrual_term (text)

IF (Accrual_Term = 'CURRENT') THEN
(
 /* Set the effective date of the carryover to the end date of the last payroll period of this year */

  Temp_Effective_date = to_date('3112' + to_char(Calculation_date, 'YYYY'), 'DDMMYYYY')

  E = GET_PAYROLL_ID(Temp_Effective_date)
  Latest_Payroll_id = get_number('LATEST_PAYROLL_ID')

  E = GET_PAYROLL_DETAILS(Latest_Payroll_id, Temp_Effective_date)
  Calculation_Period_SD = get_date('PAYROLL_PERIOD_START_DATE')
  Calculation_Period_ED = get_date('PAYROLL_PERIOD_END_DATE')

  IF (to_char(Calculation_Period_ED, 'YYYY') <> to_char(Calculation_Period_SD, 'YYYY')) THEN
  (
    E = GET_PAYROLL_DETAILS(Latest_Payroll_id,add_days(Calculation_Period_SD, -1))
    Calculation_Period_SD = get_date('PAYROLL_PERIOD_START_DATE')
    Calculation_Period_ED = get_date('PAYROLL_PERIOD_END_DATE')
  )

  Co_Effective_date = Calculation_Period_ED

  /* Set the expiry date of the carryover to the end date of the last payroll period of next year */

  Temp_Expiry_date = to_date('3112' + to_char(add_years(Calculation_date, 1),'YYYY'), 'DDMMYYYY')

  E = GET_PAYROLL_ID(Temp_Expiry_date)
  Latest_Payroll_id = get_number('LATEST_PAYROLL_ID')

  E = GET_PAYROLL_DETAILS(Latest_Payroll_id, Temp_Expiry_date)
  Calculation_Period_SD = get_date('PAYROLL_PERIOD_START_DATE')
  Calculation_Period_ED = get_date('PAYROLL_PERIOD_END_DATE')

  IF (to_char(Calculation_Period_ED, 'YYYY') <> to_char(Calculation_Period_SD,'YYYY')) THEN
  (
    E = GET_PAYROLL_DETAILS(Latest_Payroll_id, add_days(Calculation_Period_SD, -1))
    Calculation_Period_SD  = get_date('PAYROLL_PERIOD_START_DATE')
    Calculation_Period_ED = get_date('PAYROLL_PERIOD_END_DATE')
  )

  Co_Expiry_Date = Calculation_Period_ED

)
ELSE IF (Accrual_term = 'PREVIOUS') THEN
(
  /*Set the effective date of the carryover to the end date of the last payroll period of last year*/

  Temp_Effective_date = ADD_DAYS(to_date('0101' + to_char(Calculation_date, 'YYYY'), 'DDMMYYYY'), -1)

                  E = GET_PAYROLL_ID(Temp_Effective_date)
  Latest_Payroll_id = get_number('LATEST_PAYROLL_ID')

  E = GET_PAYROLL_DETAILS(Latest_Payroll_id, Temp_Effective_date)
  Calculation_Period_SD = get_date('PAYROLL_PERIOD_START_DATE')
  Calculation_Period_ED = get_date('PAYROLL_PERIOD_END_DATE')

  IF (to_char(Calculation_Period_ED, 'YYYY') <> to_char(Calculation_Period_SD, 'YYYY')) THEN
  (
    E = GET_PAYROLL_DETAILS(Latest_Payroll_id, add_days(Calculation_Period_SD, -1))
    Calculation_Period_SD = get_date('PAYROLL_PERIOD_START_DATE')
    Calculation_Period_ED = get_date('PAYROLL_PERIOD_END_DATE')
  )

  Co_Effective_date = Calculation_Period_ED

 /* Set the expiry date of the carryover to the end date of the last payroll period of this year */

  Temp_Expiry_date = to_date('3112' + to_char(Calculation_date, 'YYYY'), 'DDMMYYYY')

  E = GET_PAYROLL_ID(Temp_Expiry_date)
  Latest_Payroll_id = get_number('LATEST_PAYROLL_ID')

  E = GET_PAYROLL_DETAILS(Latest_Payroll_id, Temp_Expiry_date)
  Calculation_Period_SD = get_date('PAYROLL_PERIOD_START_DATE')
  Calculation_Period_ED = get_date('PAYROLL_PERIOD_END_DATE')

  IF (to_char(Calculation_Period_ED, 'YYYY') <> to_char(Calculation_Period_SD, 'YYYY')) THEN
  (
    E = GET_PAYROLL_DETAILS(Latest_Payroll_id, add_days(Calculation_Period_SD, -1))
    Calculation_Period_SD = get_date('PAYROLL_PERIOD_START_DATE')
    Calculation_Period_ED = get_date('PAYROLL_PERIOD_END_DATE')
  )

  Co_Expiry_Date = Calculation_Period_ED
)


   /*Max_Carryover calculation     */
     IF ACP_CONTINUOUS_SERVICE_DATE WAS DEFAULTED THEN
     (
       Continuous_Service_Date = ACP_HIRE_DATE
     )
    ELSE
     (
      Continuous_Service_Date = ACP_CONTINUOUS_SERVICE_DATE
     )
    Years_service = floor(months_between(Co_Effective_date, Continuous_Service_Date) / 12)
    IF (GET_ACCRUAL_BAND('NN',years_service) = 0) THEN
      (
         Max_carryover = GET_NUMBER('MAX_CARRY_OVER')
      )
    ELSE
     (
       Max_carryover = 0
     )
 Process = 'YES'
 RETURN Max_Carryover, Co_Effective_date, Co_Expiry_Date, Process

  Calculation_Period_SD = get_date('PAYROLL_PERIOD_START_DATE')
  Calculation_Period_ED = get_date('PAYROLL_PERIOD_END_DATE')

  IF (to_char(Calculation_Period_ED, 'YYYY') <> to_char(Calculation_Period_SD,'YYYY')) THEN
  (
    E = GET_PAYROLL_DETAILS(Latest_Payroll_id, add_days(Calculation_Period_SD, -1))
    Calculation_Period_SD  = get_date('PAYROLL_PERIOD_START_DATE')
    Calculation_Period_ED = get_date('PAYROLL_PERIOD_END_DATE')
  )

  Co_Expiry_Date = Calculation_Period_ED

)
ELSE IF (Accrual_term = 'PREVIOUS') THEN
(
  /*Set the effective date of the carryover to the end date of the last payroll period of last year*/

  Temp_Effective_date = ADD_DAYS(to_date('0101' + to_char(Calculation_date, 'YYYY'), 'DDMMYYYY'), -1)

                  E = GET_PAYROLL_ID(Temp_Effective_date)
  Latest_Payroll_id = get_number('LATEST_PAYROLL_ID')

  E = GET_PAYROLL_DETAILS(Latest_Payroll_id, Temp_Effective_date)
  Calculation_Period_SD = get_date('PAYROLL_PERIOD_START_DATE')
  Calculation_Period_ED = get_date('PAYROLL_PERIOD_END_DATE')

  IF (to_char(Calculation_Period_ED, 'YYYY') <> to_char(Calculation_Period_SD, 'YYYY')) THEN
  (
    E = GET_PAYROLL_DETAILS(Latest_Payroll_id, add_days(Calculation_Period_SD, -1))
    Calculation_Period_SD = get_date('PAYROLL_PERIOD_START_DATE')
    Calculation_Period_ED = get_date('PAYROLL_PERIOD_END_DATE')
  )

  Co_Effective_date = Calculation_Period_ED

 /* Set the expiry date of the carryover to the end date of the last payroll period of this year */

  Temp_Expiry_date = to_date('3112' + to_char(Calculation_date, 'YYYY'), 'DDMMYYYY')

  E = GET_PAYROLL_ID(Temp_Expiry_date)
  Latest_Payroll_id = get_number('LATEST_PAYROLL_ID')

  E = GET_PAYROLL_DETAILS(Latest_Payroll_id, Temp_Expiry_date)
  Calculation_Period_SD = get_date('PAYROLL_PERIOD_START_DATE')
  Calculation_Period_ED = get_date('PAYROLL_PERIOD_END_DATE')

  IF (to_char(Calculation_Period_ED, 'YYYY') <> to_char(Calculation_Period_SD, 'YYYY')) THEN
  (
    E = GET_PAYROLL_DETAILS(Latest_Payroll_id, add_days(Calculation_Period_SD, -1))
    Calculation_Period_SD = get_date('PAYROLL_PERIOD_START_DATE')
    Calculation_Period_ED = get_date('PAYROLL_PERIOD_END_DATE')
  )

  Co_Expiry_Date = Calculation_Period_ED
)


   /*Max_Carryover calculation     */
     IF ACP_CONTINUOUS_SERVICE_DATE WAS DEFAULTED THEN
     (
       Continuous_Service_Date = ACP_HIRE_DATE
     )
    ELSE
     (
      Continuous_Service_Date = ACP_CONTINUOUS_SERVICE_DATE
     )
    Years_service = floor(months_between(Co_Effective_date, Continuous_Service_Date) / 12)
    IF (GET_ACCRUAL_BAND('NN',years_service) = 0) THEN
      (
         Max_carryover = GET_NUMBER('MAX_CARRY_OVER')
      )
    ELSE
     (
       Max_carryover = 0
     )
 Process = 'YES'
 RETURN Max_Carryover, Co_Effective_date, Co_Expiry_Date, Process

/* ------------------------------------------------------------------------
    NAME : ORA_ACCRUAL_SIMPLE_CARRYOVER
    This formula is the seeded carryover formula to calculate the carryover amount.
   ---------------------------------------------------------------------*/
   DEFAULT FOR ACP_HIRE_DATE IS '4712/12/31 00:00:00' (date)
   DEFAULT FOR ACP_CONTINUOUS_SERVICE_DATE IS '4712/12/31 00:00:00' (date)
   
   DEFAULT FOR ACP_TERM_TYPE IS 'S'      
   DEFAULT FOR ACP_TERM_START IS '01/06' 
   DEFAULT FOR ACP_TERM_LENGTH IS 1
   DEFAULT FOR ACP_TERM_UOM IS 'Y'
   
   DEFAULT FOR ACP_CO_EXPIRY_LENGTH IS 1
   DEFAULT FOR ACP_CO_EXPIRY_LENGTH_UOM IS 'Y'
   
   INPUTS ARE Calculation_Date (date), Accrual_term (text)
    
    IF (ACP_TERM_TYPE = 'S') THEN
   ( 
    Accrual_Term_Start_Date = TO_DATE(ACP_TERM_START||'/'||to_char(Calculation_Date,'YYYY'),'DD/MM/YYYY')                  
   IF Accrual_Term_Start_Date > Calculation_Date THEN
    (   
      Accrual_Term_Start_Date = GET_END_DATE(Accrual_Term_Start_Date , - ACP_TERM_LENGTH , ACP_TERM_UOM)                        
    )        
    Accrual_Term_End_Date   = ADD_DAYS(GET_END_DATE(Accrual_Term_Start_Date , ACP_TERM_LENGTH , ACP_TERM_UOM),-1)
              
    IF (Accrual_Term = 'CURRENT') THEN
       (
         Co_Effective_date = Accrual_Term_End_Date
       )
    ELSE IF (Accrual_term = 'PREVIOUS') THEN
       (
         Co_Effective_date = ADD_DAYS(Accrual_Term_Start_Date, -1)
       )
    ELSE
       (
        /* Donot process  */
        Process = 'N'
        RETURN
       )
    Process = 'YES'
   )
ELSE IF (ACP_TERM_TYPE = 'H') THEN
   (
  
     IF ( ACP_HIRE_DATE WAS NOT DEFAULTED ) THEN
      (
          Hire_Date  = add_months(ACP_HIRE_DATE,trunc(months_between(Calculation_Date,ACP_HIRE_DATE) / 12) * 12)
     IF (Accrual_Term = 'CURRENT') THEN
      (
          Hire_Date = ADD_YEARS(Hire_Date, 1)
      )
       Co_Effective_date = add_days(Hire_Date, -1)
     )
     Process = 'YES'
  )
ELSE  IF (ACP_TERM_TYPE = 'R') THEN
(
   
 /* Although carryover has no meaning for a plan of this kind, we still require a formula for use by
    the absence screen. This formula simply returns calculation date, and zero.*/
     Co_Effective_date = Calculation_Date
     Max_Carryover  = 0
     Co_Expiry_Date    = Calculation_Date
     return
)
/*To calculate the Co_Expiry_Date And Max_Carryover   */
 IF (Process = 'YES') THEN
 (
     /*Co_Expiry_Date calculation     */
     Co_Expiry_Date = get_end_date(Co_Effective_date,ACP_CO_EXPIRY_LENGTH,ACP_CO_EXPIRY_LENGTH_UOM)

     /*Max_Carryover calculation     */
     IF ACP_CONTINUOUS_SERVICE_DATE WAS DEFAULTED THEN
     (
       Continuous_Service_Date = ACP_HIRE_DATE
     )
    ELSE
     (
      Continuous_Service_Date = ACP_CONTINUOUS_SERVICE_DATE
     )
    Years_service = floor(months_between(Co_Effective_date, Continuous_Service_Date) / 12)
    IF (GET_ACCRUAL_BAND('NN',years_service) = 0) THEN
      (
         Max_carryover = GET_NUMBER('MAX_CARRY_OVER')
      )
    ELSE
     (
       Max_carryover = 0
     )

 )
  RETURN Max_Carryover, Co_Effective_date, Co_Expiry_Date, Process

/* -------------------------------------------------------
     NAME : ACCRUAL_INELIGIBILITY_CALCULATION    
---------------------------------------------------------*/

DEFAULT FOR ACP_START_RULE IS 'HD'
DEFAULT FOR ACP_ENROLLMENT_START_DATE IS '4712/12/31 00:00:00' (date)
DEFAULT FOR ACP_ENROLLMENT_END_DATE IS '4712/12/31 00:00:00' (date)
DEFAULT FOR ACP_CONTINUOUS_SERVICE_DATE IS '4712/12/31 00:00:00' (date)
DEFAULT FOR ACP_HIRE_DATE IS '4712/12/31 00:00:00' (date)
DEFAULT FOR ACP_TERMINATION_DATE IS '4712/12/31 00:00:00' (date)
DEFAULT FOR ACP_INELIGIBILITY_PERIOD_LENGTH IS 0
DEFAULT FOR ACP_INELIGIBILITY_PERIOD_UOM IS 'CM'

INPUTS ARE Calculation_Date (date)

/* -----------------------------------------------------------------
   Set the Calculation_Date to the Termination Date / Enrollment end date
   if not defaulted
------------------------------------------------------------------- */
IF NOT (ACP_TERMINATION_DATE WAS DEFAULTED) OR NOT (ACP_ENROLLMENT_END_DATE WAS DEFAULTED) THEN
(
  Early_End_Date = least(ACP_TERMINATION_DATE,
                                              ACP_ENROLLMENT_END_DATE)
  IF (Early_End_Date < Calculation_Date) THEN
  (
    Calculation_Date = Early_End_Date
  )
)

/* ------------------------------------------------------------------------
   Set the Continuous Service Global Variable, whilst also
   ensuring that the continuous service date is before the Calculation Period
  ------------------------------------------------------------------------ */
IF (ACP_CONTINUOUS_SERVICE_DATE WAS DEFAULTED) THEN
    (
    Continuous_Service_Date = ACP_HIRE_DATE
    )
ELSE
  (
    Continuous_Service_Date = ACP_CONTINUOUS_SERVICE_DATE
  )

IF (ACP_START_RULE = 'BOY') THEN
    (
     First_Eligible_To_Accrue_Date =to_date('01/01/'||to_char(add_days(add_months(Continuous_Service_Date, 12), -1), 'YYYY'),'DD/MM/YYYY')
     )
ELSE IF (ACP_START_RULE = 'PLUS_SIX_MONTHS') THEN
    (
     First_Eligible_To_Accrue_Date = add_months(Continuous_Service_Date,6)
     )
ELSE IF (ACP_START_RULE = 'HD') THEN
    (
     First_Eligible_To_Accrue_Date  = Continuous_Service_Date
     )

IF   (ACP_INELIGIBILITY_PERIOD_LENGTH  > 0 ) THEN
(
  Accrual_Ineligibility_Expired_Date = get_end_date (Continuous_Service_Date , ACP_INELIGIBILITY_PERIOD_LENGTH,ACP_INELIGIBILITY_PERIOD_UOM)
)
ELSE
(
  Accrual_Ineligibility_Expired_Date = First_Eligible_To_Accrue_Date
)

IF Calculation_Date > greatest(Accrual_Ineligibility_Expired_Date,First_Eligible_To_Accrue_Date) THEN
(
  Assignment_eligible = 'Y'
)
ELSE
(
  Assignment_eligible = 'N'
)
RETURN Assignment_eligible

v_Union = ' '

v_Union = PER_ASG_COL_AGREEMENT_IDENTIFICATION_CODE 

If v_Display_flag = 'Y' Then
(
    v_log = ESS_LOG_WRITE('Begin Formula KP_TMP_SCAL Union')
    v_log = ESS_LOG_WRITE(' - v_Union = ' || v_Union)
)

IF (v_Union = 'B03' OR

    v_Union = 'B14' OR
    v_Union = 'B17')
THEN

(

)

return ELIGIBLE

return ELIGIBLE

DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE for BEN_PPL_NTFN_DT_DN is '1999/01/01 12:00:00' (date)
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE for BEN_PPL_LF_EVT_OCRD_DT_DN is '1999/01/01 12:00:00' (date)

L_LIFEEVENT_VOIDED='N'

i=1
while BEN_PPL_NTFN_DT_DN.exists(i) loop
(
if (add_days(BEN_PPL_LF_EVT_OCRD_DT_DN[i],90) < BEN_PPL_NTFN_DT_DN[i] ) then 
(L_LIFEEVENT_VOIDED='Y')
i=i+1
)
return L_LIFEEVENT_VOIDED

/**********************************************************************
FORMULA NAME : AB_BEN_PIL_EVAL_SLRYCHG
FORMULA TYPE : Evaluate Life Event
DESCRIPTION: Salary Change Life Event VOID when logic = true
***********************************************************************/
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE for BEN_PPL_LER_NAME_TN is 'My-Default'
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE for BEN_PPL_LER_ID_NN is 0
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE for BEN_PPL_LF_EVT_OCRD_DT_DN is '1999/01/01 12:00:00' (date)
DEFAULT for CMP_ASSIGNMENT_SALARY_BASIS_NAME is  'My-Default'

/* NEW */
l_context_ler_id=-999
/* get the ler_id from context */
l_context_ler_id = GET_CONTEXT(LER_ID,-999)

l_eff_date = GET_CONTEXT(EFFECTIVE_DATE,TO_DATE('1951/01/01 00:00:00') )
LIFE_EVENT_HAPPENED='Y'
LIFE_EVENT_REASON_ID=l_context_ler_id
LIFE_EVENT_STATUS_CODE='DTCTD'
LIFE_EVENT_OCCURRED_DATE=l_eff_date

/* NEW END */

l_proc_lf_evt_ocrd_dt='1999/01/01 12:00:00' (date)

i=1
l_pil_happened (text) = 'Y'
l_life_event_voided (text) = 'N'
l_salchg_ler_id=-999
l_salary_chg(text) = 'N'
l_salary_basis (text) = 'None'

IF NOT (CMP_ASSIGNMENT_SALARY_BASIS_NAME WAS DEFAULTED) then 
   (l_salary_basis = CMP_ASSIGNMENT_SALARY_BASIS_NAME)
ELSE
   (l_salary_basis = 'NONE')


while BEN_PPL_LER_NAME_TN.exists(i) loop
(l_proc_lf_evt_ocrd_dt=BEN_PPL_LF_EVT_OCRD_DT_DN[i]
 l_salchg_ler_id=BEN_PPL_LER_ID_NN[i]
 if BEN_PPL_LER_NAME_TN[i] = 'Salary Change' then
   (l_salary_chg = 'Y')

i = i+1
)

/* l_proc_lf_evt_ocrd_dt = to_date('03/01/2014','MM/DD/YYYY') */
if l_salchg_ler_id = l_context_ler_id then (
IF l_proc_lf_evt_ocrd_dt = to_date('03/01/2014','MM/DD/YYYY')
    then (IF l_salary_basis = 'HOURLY'
           then (l_pil_happened = 'N')
          ELSE (l_pil_happened = 'Y'))
          )
if l_salchg_ler_id = l_context_ler_id then (
IF l_proc_lf_evt_ocrd_dt = to_date('02/24/2014','MM/DD/YYYY')
    then (IF l_salary_basis = 'HOURLY'
             then (l_pil_happened = 'N')
          ELSE (l_pil_happened = 'Y'))
          )
if l_salchg_ler_id = l_context_ler_id then (
IF l_proc_lf_evt_ocrd_dt = to_date('02/23/2014','MM/DD/YYYY')
    then (IF l_salary_basis = 'HOURLY'
           then (l_pil_happened = 'Y')
          ELSE (l_pil_happened = 'N')))

if l_pil_happened = 'N' then (
   l_life_event_voided = 'Y')
else (l_life_event_voided = 'N')
return l_life_event_voided

DEFAULT for BEN_PIL_LF_EVT_OCRD_DT is '01-JAN-1951'(date)
DEFAULT for BEN_PIL_NTFN_DT is '01-JAN-1951'(date)

L_LIFEEVENT_VOIDED = 'N'

if ( add_days(BEN_PIL_LF_EVT_OCRD_DT,90) < BEN_PIL_NTFN_DT )
then 
(L_LIFEEVENT_VOIDED = 'Y' ) 
return L_LIFEEVENT_VOIDED

DEFAULT for BEN_LER_NAME is 'xyz ' 
DEFAULT for BEN_PIL_LF_EVT_OCRD_DT is '01-JAN-1951' (date)
DEFAULT for BEN_PIL_NTFN_DT is '01-JAN-1951' (date)

l_event_name = BEN_LER_NAME 
L_LIFEEVENT_VOIDED = 'N'

if ( l_event_name = 'Age Changed' or l_event_name = 'Address Changed' )
and ( add_days(BEN_PIL_LF_EVT_OCRD_DT,30) < BEN_PIL_NTFN_DT )
then 
(L_LIFEEVENT_VOIDED = 'Y' ) 
return L_LIFEEVENT_VOIDED

while BEN_PPL_LER_NAME_TN.exists(i) loop
(
if(BEN_PPL_PERSON_ID_NN[i] = 100000012516009 and add_days(BEN_PPL_LF_EVT_OCRD_DT_DN[i],60) < BEN_PPL_NTFN_DT_DN[i] ) then
(L_LIFEEVENT_VOIDED = 'Y' )
else if(add_days(BEN_PPL_LF_EVT_OCRD_DT_DN[i],90) < BEN_PPL_NTFN_DT_DN[i]) then
(L_LIFEEVENT_VOIDED = 'Y' )
i = i+i
)

return L_LIFEEVENT_VOIDED

    ProcessingOrder=POSITION2

    AssignmentNumber=POSITION4

    PersonalPaymentMethodCode=POSITION6
    PaymentAmountType=POSITION7

    )

ELSE 
   OUTPUTVALUE='NONE'
RETURN OUTPUTVALUE
/* End Formula Text */

/* FORMULA NAME: Execute Personal Payment Method Validation */

INPUTS ARE LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID (text), EFFECTIVE_DATE (text), PAYROLL_RELATIONSHIP_ID (text), PAGE_NAME (text), PAYMENT_TYPE_NAME (text), PERSONAL_PAYMENT_METHOD_NAME (text), ORGANIZATION_PAYMENT_METHOD_NAME (text), CURRENCY_CODE (text), PAYMENT_AMOUNT_TYPE (text), PERCENTAGE (text), AMOUNT (text), PRIORITY (text), BANK_NAME (text), BRANCH_NAME (text), BANK_ACCOUNT_NUMBER (text), BANK_ACCOUNT_TYPE (text)

DEFAULT for PERCENTAGE is '0'
DEFAULT for L_PERCENTAGE_INVALID is '0'
DEFAULT for L_SECOND_PPM is 'NO DATA'
DEFAULT for L_PAY_CARD_EXISTS is '0'
DEFAULT for BANK_ACCOUNT_TYPE is 'NO DATA'

/* Configuration */

L_PAY_CARD_EXISTS=GET_VALUE_SET('PPM_PAY_CARD_EXISTS'  ,'|=PAYROLL_RELATIONSHIP_ID='||PAYROLL_RELATIONSHIP_ID||'|EFF_DATE='||EFFECTIVE_DATE)
L_SECOND_PPM=GET_VALUE_SET('PPM_SECOND_PPM'  ,'|=PAYROLL_RELATIONSHIP_ID='||PAYROLL_RELATIONSHIP_ID||'|EFF_DATE='||EFFECTIVE_DATE)
L_PERCENTAGE_INVALID=GET_VALUE_SET('PPM_PERCENTAGE_INVALID'  ,'|=PAYROLL_RELATIONSHIP_ID='||PAYROLL_RELATIONSHIP_ID||'|EFF_DATE='||EFFECTIVE_DATE||'|PERCENTAGE='||PERCENTAGE||'|PAYCARD='||L_PAY_CARD_EXISTS)

IF PAGE_NAME = 'DETAILS' THEN
(   /*Check not to allow creation of PPM under the OPMs  */
    IF ORGANIZATION_PAYMENT_METHOD_NAME = 'ZHRX_OPM_PRENOTE_EFT'  THEN
    (
       INVALID='Y'
       MESSAGE='SAMPLE_PAYCARD_PPM_NOT_ALLOWED' 
    )
    ELSE IF ORGANIZATION_PAYMENT_METHOD_NAME = 'ZHRX_USP_RRF_CheckOne'  THEN
    (
       INVALID='N'
       MESSAGE='SAMPLE CHECK PPM NOT ALLOWED' 
    )
    ELSE IF L_PAY_CARD_EXISTS='1' and L_SECOND_PPM='1' and PERCENTAGE!='100' THEN
    (
       INVALID='Y'
       MESSAGE='SAMPLE_PAYCARD_MUST_100PERCENT' 
    )
    ELSE IF L_PERCENTAGE_INVALID='1' THEN
    (
       INVALID='Y'
       MESSAGE='SAMPLE_PAYCARD_MORE_100PERCENT' 
    )
    ELSE
    (
       INVALID='N'
       MESSAGE='NO MESSAGES'
    )
)
ELSE
(
    IF ORGANIZATION_PAYMENT_METHOD_NAME = 'ZHRX_OPM_PRENOTE_EFT'  THEN
    (
       INVALID='Y'
       MESSAGE='SAMPLE_PAYCARD_PRIORITY_CHANGE' 
    )
    ELSE IF L_PAY_CARD_EXISTS='1' and L_SECOND_PPM='1' THEN
    (
       INVALID='Y'
       MESSAGE='SAMPLE_PAYCARD_PRIORITY_CHANGE' 
    )
    ELSE
    (
       INVALID='N'
       MESSAGE='NO MESSAGES'
    )    
)

OUTPUT_VALUE[1]=INVALID
OUTPUT_VALUE[2]=MESSAGE

RETURN OUTPUT_VALUE
/* End Formula Text */

CHANGE_CONTEXTS(EFFECTIVE_DATE = v_life_event_ocrd_dt)                         
  (
    i = 1
    
    while BEN_PEN_PL_NAME_TN.exists(i) loop  
    (
      v_benefit_plan          =  BEN_PEN_PL_NAME_TN[i]               /* Plan Name       */

             if(v_benefit_opt like '%BEN_NKDENTALEMPLOYEEONLY%') then
             (
                 v_excess_treatment_value = 'CASH_RLVR_FRFT'
             )
             if(v_benefit_opt like '%BEN_NKDENTALEMPLOYEEONE%') then
             (
                 v_excess_treatment_value = 'RLVR_CASH_FRFT'
             )
         )
    i = i + 1
    )
  )
return v_excess_treatment_value

INPUTS ARE report_record_name (text), 
           "EFFECTIVE_DATE" (date), 
           "START_DATE" (date), 
           "LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID", 
           "PAYROLL_ACTION_ID", 
           "CHANGES_ONLY" (text), 
           "PAYROLL_ID", 
           "PAY_PERIOD", 
           "PAYROLL_INTERFACE_DE_PAYROLL_ASSIGNMENT_ID", 
           report_record_id, 
           template_record_id
/*[End of Inputs]*/

/* Initialise record flexfield structure code in memory */
l_archive_initialised = ARCHIVE_INIT('DE Details')

/* Populate data element value array */
D = EMPTY_TEXT_TEXT
D['Record_Type'] = 'DE'
IF CONTEXT_IS_SET(PAYROLL_TERM_ID) THEN (
  IF PAYROLL_INTERFACE_TRU_NAME WAS NOT DEFAULTED 
  THEN D['Company'] = (PAYROLL_INTERFACE_TRU_NAME)
) 
IF CONTEXT_IS_SET(PAYROLL_ID) THEN (
  D['Payroll'] = (PAYROLL_NAME)
) 
IF CONTEXT_IS_SET(PAYROLL_ID) THEN (
  D['Payroll_Frequency'] = (PAYROLL_PERIOD_TYPE)
) 
IF CONTEXT_IS_SET(HR_TERM_ID) AND CONTEXT_IS_SET(HR_ASSIGNMENT_ID) THEN (
  IF PAYROLL_INTERFACE_RECORDNUM_RESULT_NUM WAS NOT DEFAULTED 
  THEN D['Record_Number'] = TO_CHAR(PAYROLL_INTERFACE_RECORDNUM_RESULT_NUM)
) 
IF CONTEXT_IS_SET(PERSON_ID) THEN (
  IF PAYROLL_INTERFACE_EMPLOYEE_NUMBER WAS NOT DEFAULTED 
  THEN D['Employee_ID'] = (PAYROLL_INTERFACE_EMPLOYEE_NUMBER)
) 
IF "PAYROLL_INTERFACE_DE_PAYROLL_ASSIGNMENT_ID" WAS NOT DEFAULTED 
THEN D['Assignment_Id'] = TO_CHAR("PAYROLL_INTERFACE_DE_PAYROLL_ASSIGNMENT_ID")
/* Completed population of data element value array */

/* Setup data element to flex column mapping array */
C = EMPTY_TEXT_TEXT
C['Record_Type'] = '61'
C['Company'] = '62'
C['Payroll'] = '63'
C['Payroll_Frequency'] = '64'
C['Record_Number'] = '65'
C['Employee_ID'] = '66'
C['Assignment_Id'] = '67'
/* Completed setup of data element to flex column mapping array */

/* Archive Data */
I = D.FIRST(' ')
WHILE D.EXISTS(I) LOOP (
  IF C.EXISTS(I) THEN l_archived = ARCHIVE_VALUE('ACTION_INFORMATION'+C[I],D[I])
  I = D.NEXT(I,' ')
)
l_archived = ARCHIVE_FLUSH()
RETURN

return SKIP_FLAG

/* **************************************************************************
FORMULA NAME:  AB_BEN_SVC_AREA_USR_TBL_FF
FORMULA TYPE: Person change causes life event
DESCRIPTION: To check is person is in service area or not.
Change History:
Name Date Comments
**************************************************************************** */
/* =========== INPUT VALUES DEFAULTS BEGIN ===================== */
Inputs are BEN_ADD_IN_POSTAL_CODE (text), BEN_ADD_IO_POSTAL_CODE (text)
DEFAULT for BEN_ADD_IN_POSTAL_CODE is 'xyz'
DEFAULT for BEN_ADD_IO_POSTAL_CODE is 'abc'

DEFAULT for med_pl_tn is EMPTY_TEXT_NUMBER

med_pl_tn[1] = 'Waive Medical Plan'
med_pl_tn[2] = 'Anthem HRA'
med_pl_tn[3] = 'Anthem HSA1'
med_pl_tn[4] = 'Anthem HSA2'
med_pl_tn[5] = 'BCBS HMO'
med_pl_tn[6] = 'Dean HMO'
med_pl_tn[7] = 'Dean HSA'
med_pl_tn[8] = 'Security HMO'
med_pl_tn[9] = 'Security HSA'

med_pl_tn_count = 9 
enroll_plan_idx = -1

l_return = 'N'

/*
BEN_ADD_IN_POSTAL_CODE 
is the predefined input of the postal code after update(new)
*/
l_new_pstl_cd = TO_NUMBER(BEN_ADD_IN_POSTAL_CODE)

/*
condition 1
If this person is not enrolled in any medical plans types, return ??? 
*/
i=1
l_if_pl_enrolled = 'N'
/*
while loop stops when l_if_pl_enrolled='Y'
*/
while(i<=med_pl_tn_count and l_if_pl_enrolled <> 'Y') loop
(
	l_if_pl_enrolled = ben_fn_get_char_value(
				'BEN_PRTT_ENRT_RSLT'
				,'ENROLLED' 
				,med_pl_tn[i]
				,'NA'		)
	if(l_if_pl_enrolled = 'Y') then
	(
		enroll_plan_idx = i
	)
	i=i+1
)

/*
if not enrolled into any plan
*/
if(l_if_pl_enrolled <> 'Y')
then
(
	return l_return
)


/*
condition 2
If this person is enrolled in any Anthem plans, return N
*/

if(l_if_pl_enrolled = 'Y' and 
    (enroll_plan_idx = 1 or enroll_plan_idx = 2 or enroll_plan_idx = 3 or enroll_plan_idx = 4))
then
(
    return l_return
)


/*
Raj updated the code on May 29, 2015 - 
Condition 3 - Checks if employee stays in the same zip during address change. 
Only Address Line1 & 2 is changed. State, Zip code and County on address remains the same
*/
l_old_pstl_cd = TO_NUMBER(BEN_ADD_IO_POSTAL_CODE)

if(l_new_pstl_cd = l_old_pstl_cd)
then
(
	return l_return
)



/*Condition BCBS, we need to provide a value such as '-1' for get_table_value as default return value, otherwise error will occur if value is not within range*/
BEN_TABLE = 'ZIP_RANGE_BCBS'
BEN_TABLE_COLUMN = 'RANGE'
BEN_ROW_VALUE = to_char(l_new_pstl_cd)
l_still_in_service_area = -1
if(l_if_pl_enrolled = 'Y' and 
    enroll_plan_idx = 5 )
then
(       /* use the LDG_ID for which the UDT table was created */     
	CHANGE_CONTEXTS(LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID = 300000000680784)
	(
		l_still_in_service_area = to_num(get_table_value ( BEN_TABLE, BEN_TABLE_COLUMN, BEN_ROW_VALUE,'-1'))
		if  (l_still_in_service_area <> 1)
		then
		(
			l_return = 'Y'
		)
		return l_return
	)
)

/*Condition Dean*/
 BEN_TABLE = 'ZIP_RANGE_DEAN'
BEN_TABLE_COLUMN = 'RANGE'
BEN_ROW_VALUE = to_char(l_new_pstl_cd)
l_still_in_service_area = -1
if(l_if_pl_enrolled = 'Y' and 
 (enroll_plan_idx = 6 or enroll_plan_idx = 7) )
then
(      /* -- use the LDG_ID for which the UDT table was created ---  */      
	CHANGE_CONTEXTS(LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID = 300000000680784)
	(
		l_still_in_service_area = to_num(get_table_value ( BEN_TABLE, BEN_TABLE_COLUMN, BEN_ROW_VALUE,'-1'))
		if  (l_still_in_service_area <> 1)
		then
		(
			l_return = 'Y'
		)
		return l_return
	)
)

/* 
Condition SHP Medical
Test for if the colleague is in SHP Medical plan, and if yes, 
test if they are still in the SHP Service Area.  If
 no longer in SHP Service Area, then return 'Y' (trigger LE), else return 'N'. */

BEN_TABLE = 'ZIP_RANGE_SHPA'
BEN_TABLE_COLUMN = 'RANGE'
BEN_ROW_VALUE = to_char(l_new_pstl_cd)
l_still_in_service_area = -1
if(l_if_pl_enrolled = 'Y' and 
    (enroll_plan_idx = 8 or enroll_plan_idx = 9))
then
(       /* use the LDG_ID for which the UDT table was created */     
	CHANGE_CONTEXTS(LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID = 300000000680784)
	(
	l_still_in_service_area = to_num(get_table_value ( BEN_TABLE, BEN_TABLE_COLUMN, BEN_ROW_VALUE,'-1'))
		if  (l_still_in_service_area <> 1)
		then
		(
			l_return = 'Y'
		)
		return l_return
	)
)

return l_return

DEFAULT for BEN_ASG_IO_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE is 'abc'

                    2. Call UDT to get Trigger Indicator for Action Code and Reason Code
                    3. Return variable: 
                       Y - Trigger Life Event
                       N - Don't trigger Life Event
       
                       
   Context Usage:   __________________

   DBI Usage :      Action Code   (PER_ASG_ACTION_CODE)
                    Action Reason (PER_ASG_ACTION_REASON_CODE)
                    Start Date    (PER_ASG_EFFECTIVE_START_DATE)                    

   RETURN:          Indicator (Y or N) Return
                    Y - Life Event is triggered
                    N - Life Event isn't triggered

Ali Kazerounian	  04/24/2017    Created

/* ***************************************************************************
FORMULA NAME: AB_BEN_ELIG_WAIT_NEWFTPT
FORMULA TYPE: Waiting Period Value and UOM
DESCRIPTION: Calculate the waiting period and unit of measure.
Change History:
Name Date Comments
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Zach Betts 5-Jul-2013 Initial Version
Naveen     25-Jul-2013  V 1.1
Zach Betts 20-Nov-2013 Revised from NewHire Formula to use Event Date and not Start Date
******************************************************************************************************* */
l_eff_date (date)= GET_CONTEXT(EFFECTIVE_DATE,TO_DATE('1951/01/01 00:00:00') )

l_30days_dt (date) = add_days(l_eff_date,30)

/* ** Start Change v 1.1 */
l_first_dt (date) = to_date ( '01'|| to_char ( l_30days_dt, 'MMYYYY'),'DDMMYYYY')

IF ( l_first_dt <> l_30days_dt )          /* If Hire Date + 30 days is not the 1st of month */
THEN
    (
        l_last_dt (date)= last_day(l_30days_dt)
        l_wait_stdt (date) = add_days(l_last_dt,1)
    )
ELSE
    (
        l_wait_stdt =   l_30days_dt
    )
/* ** End Change v 1.1 */

l_num_days (number) = days_between(l_wait_stdt,l_eff_date)
l_uom (text) = 'DY'

WAIT_PERD_VAL = l_num_days
WAIT_PERD_UOM = l_uom

return WAIT_PERD_VAL,WAIT_PERD_UOM

WAIT_PERD_UOM = 'MO' )

WAIT_PERD_UOM = 'MO' )

/**********************************************************************
Formula Name: CETERA_BEN_GTL_IMPUTED_INCOME
Formula Type: Rate Value Calculation
Purpose     : To Calculate the Group Term Life Imputed Income
***********************************************************************/
DEFAULT FOR PER_PER_LATEST_REHIRE_DATE IS '1900/01/01'(date)
DEFAULT FOR BEN_PIL_LF_EVT_OCRD_DT is '1950/01/01 00:00:00'(date)
DEFAULT FOR BEN_LER_NAME is 'abc '
DEFAULT FOR PER_PER_DATE_OF_BIRTH is '1950/01/01 00:00:00'(date)
DEFAULT for CMP_ASSIGNMENT_SALARY_ANNUAL_AMOUNT is 0
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE for BEN_PBB_BNFTS_BAL_NAME_TN IS 'X'
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR BEN_PBB_VAL_NN IS 0

l_ler_name = BEN_LER_NAME
l_lf_evt_ocrd_dt = BEN_PIL_LF_EVT_OCRD_DT
if l_ler_name = 'Legal Employer Change' then
  l_latest_hire_dt = l_lf_evt_ocrd_dt
else
  l_latest_hire_dt = PER_PER_LATEST_REHIRE_DATE

l_age_calc_date = TO_DATE('12/31/'||TO_CHAR(l_lf_evt_ocrd_dt, 'YYYY'), 'MM/DD/YYYY')
l_comp_calc_date = TRUNC(l_lf_evt_ocrd_dt, 'Year')
l_person_dob = PER_PER_DATE_OF_BIRTH
/*l_log_data = ess_log_write('GTL IMP RATE: The Person Date of Birth is '||to_char(l_person_dob, 'DD-MON-YYYY'))*/
l_counter = 1
l_elig_earn = 0
l_gtl_coverage_limit = 0
l_cvg_amt = 0
L_OUTPUT = 0
l_imp_rate = 0

/* If Employee is hired mid-year, use the Hire Date to calculate compensation */
if l_latest_hire_dt > l_comp_calc_date then
  l_comp_calc_date = l_latest_hire_dt

/* Derive the Coverage Start Date */
if l_ler_name = 'Benefits Administration' OR
   l_ler_name = 'Open' OR
   l_ler_name = 'System Implementation' OR
   l_ler_name = 'Change HSA/Transportation' OR
   l_ler_name = 'Age Changed' OR
   l_ler_name = 'Legal Employer Change' OR
   l_ler_name = 'Birth/Adoption/Guardianship' OR
   l_ler_name = 'Rate/STD Eligibility Check' /* Coverage Starts on the event for these life event */ then
   l_cvg_strt_dt = l_lf_evt_ocrd_dt
else
(
 l_cvg_strt_dt = trunc(l_lf_evt_ocrd_dt, 'Month')
 l_cvg_strt_dt = add_months(l_cvg_strt_dt, 1)
)
/*l_log_data = ess_log_write('GTL IMP RATE: The Cvg Strt Dt is '||to_char(l_cvg_strt_dt, 'DD-Mon-YYYY'))*/

CHANGE_CONTEXTS(EFFECTIVE_DATE=l_cvg_strt_dt)
(
  /* Get the Imputed Income Rate Per Thousand as of the coverage start date, based on Employee Age as of end of the Year */
  BEN_TABLE = 'CETERA_BENEFITS_GTL_IMPUTED_RATES'
  BEN_TABLE_COLUMN = 'IMPUTED_INCOME_RATE'
  BEN_ROW_VALUE = TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(l_age_calc_date, l_person_dob)/12) /* Age as of end of the Year */

  l_imp_rate = to_num(get_table_value(BEN_TABLE, BEN_TABLE_COLUMN, TO_CHAR(BEN_ROW_VALUE)))
  /*l_log_data = ess_log_write('GTL IMP RATE: The Imputed Income Rate for Age '||to_char(BEN_ROW_VALUE)||' is '||to_char(l_imp_rate))*/
)

/* Get the Compensation as of the Comp Calc Date */
CHANGE_CONTEXTS(EFFECTIVE_DATE=l_comp_calc_date)
(
  /* Calculate Annual Eligible Compensation */
  l_annual_salary = CMP_ASSIGNMENT_SALARY_ANNUAL_AMOUNT

  while BEN_PBB_BNFTS_BAL_NAME_TN.exists(l_counter)
  loop
  (
    IF BEN_PBB_BNFTS_BAL_NAME_TN[l_counter] = 'Cetera Benefits Eligible Earnings' THEN
    (
      l_elig_earn = BEN_PBB_VAL_NN[l_counter]
      /*l_log_data = ess_log_write('GTL IMP RATE: The Eligible Comp from Benefit Balance is '||to_char(l_elig_earn))*/
      exit
    )
    l_counter= l_counter + 1
  )
)

if l_elig_earn > 0 then
  l_elig_earn = l_elig_earn
else
  l_elig_earn = l_annual_salary

/* Round Eligible Earnings to the Next Thousand */
if mod(l_elig_earn, 1000) = 0 then
  l_cvg_amt = l_elig_earn
else
  l_cvg_amt = TRUNC(l_elig_earn/1000)*1000+1000

/*l_log_data = ess_log_write('GTL IMP RATE: The Coverage Amount after Round is '||to_char(l_cvg_amt))*/

/* Get the Coverage Limit as of the Coverage Start Date */
CHANGE_CONTEXTS(EFFECTIVE_DATE = l_cvg_strt_dt)
(
  BEN_TABLE = 'CETERA_BENEFIT_LIMITS'
  l_gtl_coverage_limit = to_number(get_table_value(BEN_TABLE, 'GTL_COVERAGE_LIMIT', 'GTL_COVERAGE_LIMIT'))
)

if l_cvg_amt > l_gtl_coverage_limit then
  l_cvg_amt = l_gtl_coverage_limit

/* Age Reduction */
if TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(l_lf_evt_ocrd_dt, l_person_dob)/12) >= 70 and 
   TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(l_lf_evt_ocrd_dt, l_person_dob)/12) < 75 then
  l_cvg_amt = l_cvg_amt * 0.65
else
  if TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(l_lf_evt_ocrd_dt, l_person_dob)/12) >= 75 then
    l_cvg_amt = l_cvg_amt * 0.5

/* Imputed Income to be calculated only on coverage amount over 50K */
if l_cvg_amt > 50000 then
  l_cvg_amt = l_cvg_amt - 50000
else
  l_cvg_amt = 0

/*l_log_data = ess_log_write('GTL IMP RATE: The Coverage Amount Calculated is '||to_char(l_cvg_amt))*/

/* Calculate Imputed Income */
L_OUTPUT = round((l_cvg_amt/1000) * l_imp_rate, 2)

/*l_log_data = ess_log_write('GTL IMP RATE: The Imputed Income is '||to_char(L_OUTPUT))*/

RETURN L_OUTPUT

DEFAULT FOR BEN_PEN_LER_ID IS 0
l_rate = 100
return l_rate

DEFAULT for BEN_PLN_BNF_DSGE_MNR_TTEE_RQD_FLAG is 'X'
DEFAULT for BEN_PLN_BNF_MAY_DSGT_ORG_FLAG is 'X'

l_output = 'N'
l_minor_tte = BEN_PLN_BNF_DSGE_MNR_TTEE_RQD_FLAG
l_org_bnf = BEN_PLN_BNF_MAY_DSGT_ORG_FLAG

if (l_minor_tte = 'Y' or l_org_bnf = 'Y'  )
then
(l_output = 'Y')
else
(l_output = 'N')

DEFAULT for PER_PER_MARITAL_STATUS is 'X'

l_output = 'N'
l_mar_status = PER_PER_MARITAL_STATUS

if (l_mar_status = 'S')
then

/****************************************************************
FORMULA NAME : AB_BEN_POSTELCT_SPSDP_SUPPLF_COV_FF
FORMULA TYPE : Postelection Edit
DESCRIPTION :  Fast formula to check the post elections of employee
before electing Spouse Domestic Partner 
 *****************************************************************
 Change History:
 Name                   Date              Description
 -----------------------------------------------------------------
 Sarvesh K B          26-Jul-2013       Initial Version
 Naveen               29-Jul-2013       Ver 1.1 Added Logic to consider waiting period for new hire
 Naveen               07-Oct-2013       v1.2   For Life Event:'Open', make life event occurred date as Effective date.
 ****************************************************************/
/* Initialize the database items */
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR BEN_PEN_PL_NAME_TN IS 'My-Default'
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR BEN_PEN_OPT_NAME_TN IS 'My-Default'
DEFAULT FOR PER_PER_START_DATE is '1951/01/01 00:00:00'(date)

DEFAULT FOR BEN_PIL_LF_EVT_OCRD_DT IS '1951/01/01 00:00:00'(date)
DEFAULT FOR BEN_LER_NAME IS 'Default'

/* End Initialize the database items */
l_supp_emp_enrld='N'
l_supp_spdp_enrld='N'

/*******************************************************************************
* Initialize message and error flag
*********************************************************************************/
SUCCESSFUL = 'Y'
ERROR_MESSAGE=' '
/* the looping variable */
i=1
/* Change the contexts since coverage is starting as of the processing end
date */
l_date = '2013/02/01 00:00:00'(date)
l_eff_date = GET_CONTEXT(EFFECTIVE_DATE,TO_DATE('1951/01/01 00:00:00') )
/* Get waiting period for new hires */

EXECUTE ( 'AB_BEN_ELIG_WAIT_NEWHIRE')
l_wait_perd_val ( NUMBER )  = GET_OUTPUT ('WAIT_PERD_VAL', 0)

IF ( l_wait_perd_val  > 0)
THEN
    (
        l_strt_dt (date) = PER_PER_START_DATE
        l_wait_perd_uom ( TEXT )  = GET_OUTPUT ('WAIT_PERD_UOM', 'NA')
        IF ( l_wait_perd_uom = 'DY' )
        THEN
            (
            l_strt_dt   = add_days ( l_strt_dt, l_wait_perd_val )
            )
        l_eff_date  =   GREATEST ( l_eff_date, l_strt_dt)
    )
    
/* *** Start Change v1.2 * ****/
IF NOT ( ( BEN_LER_NAME WAS DEFAULTED ) AND ( BEN_PIL_LF_EVT_OCRD_DT WAS DEFAULTED ))
THEN
   (
   IF ( BEN_LER_NAME = 'Open' )
   THEN
      (
       l_Open_le_cvt_dt =  BEN_PIL_LF_EVT_OCRD_DT
       l_eff_date       =  GREATEST ( l_eff_date, l_Open_le_cvt_dt)
      )
   )
/* *** End Change v1.2 * ****/

CHANGE_CONTEXTS(EFFECTIVE_DATE = l_eff_date )
(   /* Obtain the enrolled flags by looping through the enrollment results */ 
   WHILE BEN_PEN_PL_NAME_TN.EXISTS(i)
   LOOP(  
         /* Set the flag required for Employee Supplemental Life insurance*/
         IF  UPPER(BEN_PEN_PL_NAME_TN[i]) = UPPER('Employee Supplemental Life')
         THEN( 
               IF UPPER(BEN_PEN_OPT_NAME_TN[i]) = UPPER('Elect')
               THEN( 
			         l_supp_emp_enrld = 'Y' 
				   )
		     )
         /* Set the flag required for spouse supplemental lIFe insurance */ 
         IF  UPPER(BEN_PEN_PL_NAME_TN[i]) = UPPER('Spouse/Domestic Partner Supplemental Life')
         THEN( 
		       IF UPPER(BEN_PEN_OPT_NAME_TN[i]) = UPPER('Elect')
                THEN(
				      l_supp_spdp_enrld='Y'
					 )
             )
         /* Increment the looping counter */
         i=i+1
        ) /* end plan name loop */
)   /* End change contexts */

/* Start the validation  */
 IF (l_supp_spdp_enrld ='Y' ) 
 THEN(
       IF l_supp_emp_enrld = 'N' 
	   THEN(
	         SUCCESSFUL = 'N'
             ERROR_MESSAGE = 'To elect Spouse/Domestic Partner Supplemental Life, you must also elect at least $5,000 of Employee Supplemental Life coverage'
		   )
	  )
 RETURN SUCCESSFUL,ERROR_MESSAGE

DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE for BEN_PEN_PL_NAME_TN is 'My-Default' 
default for l_enrolled is 'N'
default for l_dpnt_enrolled is 'N'
default for i is 1
default for SUCCESSFUL is 'Y'
default for ERROR_MESSAGE is ' '

SUCCESSFUL='Y'
ERROR_MESSAGE=' '

i=1
l_enrolled='N'
l_dpnt_enrolled='N'

while BEN_PEN_PL_NAME_TN.exists(i) loop
(
if BEN_PEN_PL_NAME_TN[i]='Benefits Medical P-PCP Plan' then
(l_enrolled='Y')
if BEN_PEN_PL_NAME_TN[i]='Benefits Medical D-PCP Plan' then
(l_dpnt_enrolled='Y')
i=i+1
)

if l_enrolled='Y' and l_dpnt_enrolled='N' then
(SUCCESSFUL='N'
ERROR_MESSAGE='Election into "Benefits Medical P-PCP Plan" requires enrollment in "Benefits Medical D-PCP Plan"'
)
return SUCCESSFUL,ERROR_MESSAGE

DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE for BEN_PEN_PL_NAME_TN is 'My-Default'
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE for BEN_PEN_OPT_NAME_TN is 'My-Default'
SUCCESSFUL= 'Y'
ERROR_MESSAGE=' '
l_dpnt_enrolled= 'N'
i=1
j=1
l_family = 'N'
l_count = 1
l_plan_name = 'X'
l_option_name = 'HMO Emp+Family'
	while BEN_PEN_PL_NAME_TN.exists(i) loop
	(
		if BEN_PEN_PL_NAME_TN[i]='Demo HMO Wellness Plan' then
		(
			l_dpnt_enrolled='Y'
		)
		i=i+1
		
	)
i = 1
j = 1
	while BEN_PEN_PL_NAME_TN.exists(i) loop
	(
		if BEN_PEN_PL_NAME_TN[i]='Demo Healthy HMO Plan' then
		(
		
			WHILE BEN_PEN_OPT_NAME_TN.exists(j) loop
			(
				if BEN_PEN_OPT_NAME_TN[i]='HMO Emp+Family' then
				(
					l_family = 'Y'
				)
				j = j+1
			)
					
		)
i = i+1
j = 1
          )
	IF l_family = 'Y' and l_dpnt_enrolled='N' then
	(
		SUCCESSFUL = 'N'
		ERROR_MESSAGE = 'Election into Demo Healthy HMO Plan- HMO Emp+Family requires enrollment in Demo HMO Wellness Plan'
	)
RETURN SUCCESSFUL, ERROR_MESSAGE

/****************************************************************
FORMULA NAME: CETERA_BEN_POST_ELECTION_SP_DP_SUPP_LIFE
FORMULA TYPE: Post Election Edit
DESCRIPTION : If elected 'Spouse/DP Supplemental Life' should be enrolled in 'Supplemental Group Term Life'
              Max Coverage of Spouse/DP Supplemental Life is 50% of Supplemental Group Term Life
****************************************************************/

DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE for BEN_PEN_PL_NAME_TN is 'My-Default'
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE for BEN_PEN_OPT_NAME_TN is 'My-Default'
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE for BEN_PEN_BNFT_AMT_NN is 0
DEFAULT FOR BEN_PIL_LF_EVT_OCRD_DT is '1950/01/01 00:00:00'(date)
DEFAULT FOR BEN_LER_NAME is 'abc '
/*---------------------------------*/

SUCCESSFUL='Y'
ERROR_MESSAGE=' '
i=1

l_SP_DP_supp_life = 'N'
l_GTL_limit = 0
l_supp_GTL_limit = 0
l_SP_DP_supp_life_amt = 0

l_ler_name = BEN_LER_NAME
l_lf_evt_ocrd_dt = BEN_PIL_LF_EVT_OCRD_DT

l_sp_prev_plan = 'X'
l_sp_curr_plan = 'X'
l_emp_prev_plan = 'Y'
l_emp_curr_plan = 'Y'

if l_ler_name = 'Benefits Administration' OR
   l_ler_name = 'Open' OR
   l_ler_name = 'System Implementation' OR
   l_ler_name = 'Change HSA/Transportation' OR
   l_ler_name = 'Age Changed' OR
   l_ler_name = 'Legal Employer Change' OR
   l_ler_name = 'Birth/Adoption/Guardianship' OR
   l_ler_name = 'Rate/STD Eligibility Check' /* Coverage Starts on the event for these life event */ then
   l_cvg_strt_dt = l_lf_evt_ocrd_dt
else
(
 l_cvg_strt_dt = trunc(l_lf_evt_ocrd_dt, 'Month')
 l_cvg_strt_dt = add_months(l_cvg_strt_dt, 1)
)

CHANGE_CONTEXTS(EFFECTIVE_DATE = l_cvg_strt_dt)
(
  while BEN_PEN_PL_NAME_TN.exists(i) loop
  (
    if BEN_PEN_PL_NAME_TN[i] like '%Spouse/DP Supplemental Life%' AND 
       BEN_PEN_OPT_NAME_TN[i] not like '%Waive%' then
    (
      l_SP_DP_supp_life_amt = BEN_PEN_BNFT_AMT_NN[i]
      l_SP_DP_supp_life = 'Y'
    )
    if BEN_PEN_PL_NAME_TN[i] like '%Supplemental Group Term Life%' AND 
       BEN_PEN_OPT_NAME_TN[i] not like '%Waive%' then
    (
      l_supp_GTL_limit = 0.5 * (BEN_PEN_BNFT_AMT_NN[i])
    ) 
    if BEN_PEN_PL_NAME_TN[i] = 'Group Term Life' then
    (
      l_GTL_limit = 0.5 * (BEN_PEN_BNFT_AMT_NN[i])
    ) 
  i=i+1
  )
)

/*-- Validation --*/
if l_SP_DP_supp_life = 'Y' and l_SP_DP_supp_life_amt > l_supp_GTL_limit + l_GTL_limit then
(
  SUCCESSFUL = 'N'
  ERROR_MESSAGE = 'Selected Coverage '||to_char(l_SP_DP_supp_life_amt)||' under Spouse/DP Supplemental Life is over the limit of '||to_char(l_supp_GTL_limit+l_GTL_Limit)
)

/* Stop User from changing the plans from Smoker to Non Smoker and Vice Versa. */
if SUCCESSFUL = 'Y' then
(
  if (   l_ler_name = 'Termination'
      OR l_ler_name = 'Benefits Administration'
      OR l_ler_name = '(Re-)Hire'
      OR l_ler_name = 'Status Change - Eligible'
      OR l_ler_name = 'Status Change - Ineligible'
      OR l_ler_name = 'Age Changed'
      OR l_ler_name = 'System Implementation'
      OR l_ler_name = 'Change HSA/Transportation'
      OR l_ler_name = 'Legal Employer Change') then
  (
    SUCCESSFUL = 'Y'
    ERROR_MESSAGE = ' '
  )
  else
  (
    i = 1
    CHANGE_CONTEXTS(EFFECTIVE_DATE = l_cvg_strt_dt)
    (
      while BEN_PEN_PL_NAME_TN.exists(i) loop
      (
        if BEN_PEN_PL_NAME_TN[i] like '%Smoker - Spouse/DP Supplemental Life' then
        (
          l_sp_curr_plan = BEN_PEN_PL_NAME_TN[i]
        )
        if BEN_PEN_PL_NAME_TN[i] like '%Smoker - Supplemental Group Term Life' then
        (
          l_emp_curr_plan = BEN_PEN_PL_NAME_TN[i]
        ) 
        i=i+1
      )
    )

    i = 1
    CHANGE_CONTEXTS(EFFECTIVE_DATE = add_days(l_cvg_strt_dt, -1))
    (
      while BEN_PEN_PL_NAME_TN.exists(i) loop
      (
        if BEN_PEN_PL_NAME_TN[i] like '%Smoker - Spouse/DP Supplemental Life' then
        (
          l_sp_prev_plan = BEN_PEN_PL_NAME_TN[i]
        )

        if BEN_PEN_PL_NAME_TN[i] like '%Smoker - Supplemental Group Term Life' then
        (
          l_emp_prev_plan = BEN_PEN_PL_NAME_TN[i]
        ) 
        i=i+1
      )
    )

    /* Adding Smoker and Non Smoker here will resolve the 
       1. Issue with 2016 OE, where the plan names are not these effective 31-Dec-2015
       2. Will let the user change from Non Smoker to Smoker plans */
    if l_sp_prev_plan like 'Smoker%' AND l_sp_curr_plan like 'Non Smoker%' then
    (
      SUCCESSFUL = 'N'
      ERROR_MESSAGE = 'Please contact Benefits Administrator to change enrollment from '||l_sp_prev_plan||' to '||l_sp_curr_plan
    )

    if l_emp_prev_plan like 'Smoker%' AND l_emp_curr_plan like 'Non Smoker%' then
    (
      SUCCESSFUL = 'N'
      ERROR_MESSAGE = 'Please contact Benefits Administrator to change enrollment from '||l_emp_prev_plan||' to '||l_emp_curr_plan
    )
  )
)
return SUCCESSFUL,ERROR_MESSAGE

/****************************************************************
FORMULA NAME : MOL_BEN_VOL_DEP_LIFE_POST_ELEC_EDIT_FF
FORMULA TYPE : Postelection Edit 
DESCRIPTION  : Employee should be able to save elections in Voluntary Spouse Life 
			   or Voluntary Child life, only if employee is enrolled in Voluntary 
			   Employee Life Insurance. This Fast Formula checks that and raises 
			   suitable error messages
*****************************************************************
Change History:
Name                   Date              Description
-----------------------------------------------------------------
Somasundaram N        21-May-2015       Initial Version
****************************************************************/

DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE for BEN_PEN_PL_NAME_TN is 'My-Default' 
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE for BEN_PEN_OPT_NAME_TN is 'My-Default' 
DEFAULT FOR BEN_LER_NAME IS 'default'
DEFAULT FOR BEN_PIL_LF_EVT_OCRD_DT IS '1951/01/01 00:00:00'(date)
DEFAULT FOR PER_ASG_REL_DATE_START IS '1901-01-01 00:00:00' (DATE)

/* return variables */
SUCCESSFUL    ='Y'
ERROR_MESSAGE =' '

/* local variables */
i=1
l_spouse_lf_enr='N'
l_child_lf_enr ='N'
l_emp_lf_enr   ='N'
l_ler_name              = BEN_LER_NAME
l_le_ocrd_dt            = BEN_PIL_LF_EVT_OCRD_DT
l_latest_strt_date = PER_ASG_REL_DATE_START

IF (l_ler_name = 'New Hire') OR (l_ler_name = 'Legal Separation, Divorce') OR (l_ler_name = 'Gain/Lose Coverage')
THEN
(
  IF (l_le_ocrd_dt = l_latest_strt_date)
  THEN
  (
    L_CVG_ST_DT = ADD_DAYS(LAST_DAY(ADD_DAYS(l_latest_strt_date,30)),1) 
  )
  ELSE
  (
    IF (l_ler_name = 'New Hire')
	THEN
	(
	  IF DAYS_BETWEEN(l_le_ocrd_dt, l_latest_strt_date) < 30
	  THEN
	  (
	    L_CVG_ST_DT = ADD_DAYS(LAST_DAY(ADD_DAYS(l_latest_strt_date,30)),1) 
	  )
	  ELSE
	  (
	    L_CVG_ST_DT = ADD_DAYS(LAST_DAY(l_le_ocrd_dt),1)
      )
	)
    IF (l_ler_name = 'Legal Separation, Divorce') OR (l_ler_name = 'Gain/Lose Coverage')
	THEN
	(
	  L_CVG_ST_DT = ADD_DAYS(LAST_DAY(l_le_ocrd_dt),1)
	)
  )  
  CHANGE_CONTEXTS(EFFECTIVE_DATE = L_CVG_ST_DT)
  (
    i =1 
	while (BEN_PEN_PL_NAME_TN.exists(i)) loop
    (
	  if (BEN_PEN_PL_NAME_TN[i]='Voluntary Spouse Life Insurance') and (BEN_PEN_OPT_NAME_TN[i] <> 'Waive Coverage') then
  	  (
	    l_spouse_lf_enr='Y'
	  )
	  if(BEN_PEN_PL_NAME_TN[i]='Voluntary Child Life Insurance') and (BEN_PEN_OPT_NAME_TN[i] <> 'Waive Coverage') then
	  (
	    l_child_lf_enr='Y'
	  )
	  if(BEN_PEN_PL_NAME_TN[i]='Voluntary Employee Life Insurance') and (BEN_PEN_OPT_NAME_TN[i] <> 'Waive Coverage') then
	  (
	    l_emp_lf_enr='Y'
	  )
	  i=i+1
    )
   )
)
ELSE
(
  i = 1
  /* logic */
  while (BEN_PEN_PL_NAME_TN.exists(i)) 
  loop
  (
	if (BEN_PEN_PL_NAME_TN[i]='Voluntary Spouse Life Insurance') and (BEN_PEN_OPT_NAME_TN[i] <> 'Waive Coverage') then
	(
	 l_spouse_lf_enr='Y'
	)
	if(BEN_PEN_PL_NAME_TN[i]='Voluntary Child Life Insurance') and (BEN_PEN_OPT_NAME_TN[i] <> 'Waive Coverage') then
	(
	 l_child_lf_enr='Y'
	)
	if(BEN_PEN_PL_NAME_TN[i]='Voluntary EmployeeLife Insurance') and (BEN_PEN_OPT_NAME_TN[i] <> 'Waive Coverage') then
	(
	 l_emp_lf_enr='Y'
	)
	i=i+1
  )
)

if (l_spouse_lf_enr = 'Y' and l_emp_lf_enr = 'N')THEN
    (
	 SUCCESSFUL = 'N'
	 ERROR_MESSAGE='You must enroll in Voluntary Employee life, to be able to enroll in Voluntary Spouse Life'
    ) 
	
if (l_child_lf_enr = 'Y' and l_emp_lf_enr = 'N') THEN
    (
	 SUCCESSFUL = 'N'
	 ERROR_MESSAGE='You must enroll in Voluntary Employee life, to be able to enroll in Voluntary Child Life'
	)

return SUCCESSFUL,ERROR_MESSAGE

/****************************************************************

/* Get waiting period for new hires */

EXECUTE ( 'AB_BEN_ELIG_WAIT_NEWHIRE')
l_wait_perd_val ( NUMBER )  = GET_OUTPUT ('WAIT_PERD_VAL', 0)

IF ( l_wait_perd_val  > 0)
THEN
    (

        IF ( l_wait_perd_uom = 'DY' )
        THEN

            )

    )

/* *** Start Change v1.2 * ****/
IF NOT ( ( BEN_LER_NAME WAS DEFAULTED ) AND ( BEN_PIL_LF_EVT_OCRD_DT WAS DEFAULTED ))
THEN
   (
   IF ( BEN_LER_NAME = 'Open' )
   THEN
      (
       l_Open_le_cvt_dt =  BEN_PIL_LF_EVT_OCRD_DT
       l_eff_date       =  GREATEST ( l_eff_date, l_Open_le_cvt_dt)
      )
   )
/* *** End Change v1.2 * ****/

CHANGE_CONTEXTS(EFFECTIVE_DATE = l_eff_date )
(   /* Obtain the enrolled flags by looping through the enrollment results */    
   
   WHILE BEN_PEN_PL_NAME_TN.EXISTS(i)
   LOOP(  
         
         /* Set the flag required for Employee Supplemental Life insurance*/
         IF  UPPER(BEN_PEN_PL_NAME_TN[i]) = UPPER('Employee Supplemental Life')

         THEN( 
		       IF UPPER(BEN_PEN_OPT_NAME_TN[i]) = UPPER('Elect')

				      l_supp_chld_enrld='Y'

             )

/* Start the validation  */
 IF (l_supp_chld_enrld ='Y' ) 
 THEN(
       IF l_supp_emp_enrld = 'N' 
	   THEN(
	         SUCCESSFUL = 'N'
             ERROR_MESSAGE = 'To select Child Supplemental Life, you must also elect at least $5,000 of Employee Supplemental Life coverage'

 RETURN SUCCESSFUL,ERROR_MESSAGE

default for ERROR_MESSAGE is ' '

SUCCESSFUL='Y'

while BEN_PEN_PL_NAME_TN.exists(i) loop
(
if BEN_PEN_PL_NAME_TN[i]='ZBEN_PARTICIPANT_PL' then

)

default for PER_ASG_MARITAL_STATUS_DATE is '01-JAN-1951'(date)
