/*******************************************************************************
FORMULA NAME: AB_BEN_SALARY_COMMISSION_CALC_FF
FORMULA TYPE: Compensation calculation
DESCRIPTION: Calculate the commission amount to be used for benefits
Change History:
Name Date Comments
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Naveen     8-AUG-2013   Ver 1.1
******************************************************************************************************* */
DEFAULT FOR CMP_ASSIGNMENT_SALARY_AMOUNT IS 0
DEFAULT FOR CMP_ASSIGNMENT_SALARY_ANNUALIZATION_FACTOR IS 0
DEFAULT FOR CMP_ASSIGNMENT_SALARY_FTE_VALUE IS 0
DEFAULT FOR CMP_ASSIGNMENT_SALARY_BASIS_CODE IS 'ABC'
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR BEN_PBB_BNFTS_BAL_NAME_TN IS 'BEN'
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR BEN_PBB_VAL_NN IS 0
l_output (NUMBER) = 0

l_salary (NUMBER)                   = CMP_ASSIGNMENT_SALARY_AMOUNT * CMP_ASSIGNMENT_SALARY_ANNUALIZATION_FACTOR
l_annual_salary (NUMBER)            =   0
l_commission_estimated (NUMBER)     =   0           /* Estimated Commission Amount  */
l_assignment_id (NUMBER)            =   0
l_bg_id (NUMBER)                    =   0

IF NOT (CMP_ASSIGNMENT_SALARY_FTE_VALUE WAS DEFAULTED)
THEN
(
  IF CMP_ASSIGNMENT_SALARY_ANNUALIZATION_FACTOR = 2080
  THEN
   (
     l_annual_salary = l_salary * CMP_ASSIGNMENT_SALARY_FTE_VALUE
     )
  ELSE IF CMP_ASSIGNMENT_SALARY_ANNUALIZATION_FACTOR = 1
       THEN
         (
          l_annual_salary = l_salary  /* CMP_ASSIGNMENT_SALARY_FTE_VALUE */
          )
     )
ELSE
 (
   l_annual_salary = l_salary
   )

 IF NOT (CMP_ASSIGNMENT_SALARY_BASIS_CODE WAS DEFAULTED) AND CMP_ASSIGNMENT_SALARY_BASIS_CODE = 'HOURLY'
  THEN
 (
   l_annual_salary = l_salary * CMP_ASSIGNMENT_SALARY_FTE_VALUE
   )

/* Get Benift balance value */
/*adh changed 2015-09-09 to comment out this section:
 IF IS_EXECUTABLE('AB_BEN_BALANCE_FF') then
    (
    l_assignment_id                 = get_context ( HR_ASSIGNMENT_ID, 0)
    l_bg_id                         = get_context ( BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, 0)
    l_effective_date (DATE)         = get_context ( EFFECTIVE_DATE, TO_DATE('1951/01/01 00:00:00'))
    
    WSA_SET ( 'HR_ASSIGNMENT_ID', l_assignment_id)
    WSA_SET ( 'BUSINESS_GROUP_ID', l_bg_id)
    WSA_SET ( 'EFFECTIVE_DATE', l_effective_date)
    
    EXECUTE ('AB_BEN_BALANCE_FF')
    l_commission_estimated = GET_OUTPUT('L_VAL', 0)
    ) */
/*New Logic by adh 2015-09-09*/
i=1
WHILE  BEN_PBB_BNFTS_BAL_NAME_TN.exists(i) 
 LOOP 
 (  
    IF ( BEN_PBB_BNFTS_BAL_NAME_TN[i]='AB Commission - Estimated') 
    THEN 
    (  l_commission_estimated = BEN_PBB_VAL_NN[i] ) 
   i=i+1 
 ) 
l_output = l_annual_salary + l_commission_estimated

Return l_output

/*********************************************************************
Formula Name: CETERA_BEN_ANNUAL_COMP
Formula Type: Compensation Calculation
Purpose     : To use the Benefit Balance if it exists otherwise Salary
----------------------------------------------------------------------
****************************CHANGE HISTORY****************************
Srikanth Chanda 27-Feb-2015 Initial Version.
----------------------------------------------------------------------
*********************************************************************/
default for CMP_ASSIGNMENT_SALARY_ANNUAL_AMOUNT is 0
default_data_value for BEN_PBB_BNFTS_BAL_NAME_TN IS 'X'
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR BEN_PBB_VAL_NN IS 0

i=1
l_elig_earn = 0
while BEN_PBB_BNFTS_BAL_NAME_TN.exists(i)
loop
(
  IF BEN_PBB_BNFTS_BAL_NAME_TN[i] = 'Cetera Benefits Eligible Earnings' THEN
  (
    l_elig_earn = BEN_PBB_VAL_NN[i]
    l_log_data = ess_log_write('The Balance is '||to_char(l_elig_earn))
    exit
  )
  i=i+1
)

if l_elig_earn > 0 then
  L_OUTPUT = l_elig_earn
else
  L_OUTPUT = l_annual_salary

l_log_data = ess_log_write('In CETERA_BEN_ANNUAL_COMP, The Benefit Balance is '||to_char(l_elig_earn)||
                           ' Annual Salary is '||to_char(l_annual_salary)||' Annual Elig Comp is '||
                           to_char(L_OUTPUT)||' and Effective Date is '||to_char(GET_CONTEXT(EFFECTIVE_DATE, to_date('1951/01/01 00:00:00')), 'YYYYMMDD'))

RETURN L_OUTPUT

l_output = l_sal * l_ann_fctr

Return l_output

/****

     Formula validates the associated data element has only numbers and returns error if it contains other than numbers

*****/

DEFAULT FOR DATA_ELEMENTS IS EMPTY_TEXT_TEXT
DEFAULT FOR PARAMS IS EMPTY_TEXT_TEXT
DEFAULT FOR D IS EMPTY_TEXT_NUMBER
DEFAULT FOR DATA_ELEMENT_CODE IS 'NULL'
DEFAULT FOR PER_EXT_REC_DATA_ELE_NAME IS ' '
DEFAULT FOR pattern IS ' '
DEFAULT FOR CHCKSTRING IS ' '

DEFAULT FOR L_ATTRIBUTE_DATA_ELEMENT_TRANS_NAME IS ' '


INPUTS ARE DATA_ELEMENTS (TEXT_TEXT),
PARAMS (TEXT_TEXT), /* Runtime Parameters */
		  DATA_ELEMENT_CODE (TEXT)

L_DATA_ELEMENT_SHORT_CODE = ' '
L_DATA_ELEMENT_VALUE  = 'NULL'
VALIDATION_MESSAGE = 'NULL'
CHCKSTRING ='NULL'

/*
Note 1 for our customers:
The (example) pattern provided here is accepting numbers only.
This provided pattern attribute specifies a regular expression that the input element's value is checked against.
Please modify pattern assigned to specify a pattern as per needs of your country
*/

pattern =  '0123456789'


if lookup_exists('ORA_HRX_GLB_VALIDATION_OBJECTS', DATA_ELEMENT_CODE) = 'Y' then
(

	  /* Mandatory validator for the specified data element. */
	 IF DATA_ELEMENT_CODE like '%>FC' then
         (
		l_short_code = substr(DATA_ELEMENT_CODE, 1, instr(DATA_ELEMENT_CODE, '>') - 1)

  		L_ATTRIBUTE_DATA_ELEMENT_TRANS_NAME = get_data_element_name(l_short_code,'NULL')

               if DATA_ELEMENTS.exists(l_short_code) then
              (

                L_DATA_ELEMENT_VALUE = DATA_ELEMENTS[l_short_code]

/*
Note 2 to customers:  This section validates and reports error if asterisk is not found. Comment this code if * is a valid character.

*/

              IF (INSTR(L_DATA_ELEMENT_VALUE,'*') > 0) THEN
                 VALIDATION_MESSAGE = SUBSTR((get_mesg('HRX','HRX_LOCCM_SPL_CHRCHK_NBRS_ONLY','ENTITY_ATTRIBUTE', L_ATTRIBUTE_DATA_ELEMENT_TRANS_NAME||':'||L_DATA_ELEMENT_VALUE )),1,240)

    	      CHCKSTRING = REPLACE(TRANSLATE(L_DATA_ELEMENT_VALUE, pattern, '*'), '*')
              IF (CHCKSTRING != 'NULL' ) THEN
                   VALIDATION_MESSAGE = SUBSTR((get_mesg('HRX','HRX_LOCCM_SPL_CHRCHK_NBRS_ONLY','ENTITY_ATTRIBUTE', L_ATTRIBUTE_DATA_ELEMENT_TRANS_NAME ||':'||L_DATA_ELEMENT_VALUE )),1,240)
/*
Note 3 to customers: when you customize the formula to validate your own pattern, comment the above line and uncomment the below line
				VALIDATION_MESSAGE = SUBSTR((get_mesg('HRX','HRX_LOCCM_ATTRIB_NO_SPL_CHARS','ENTITY_ATTRIBUTE', L_ATTRIBUTE_DATA_ELEMENT_TRANS_NAME)),1,240)
*/

             )

      )
)
IF VALIDATION_MESSAGE !='NULL' THEN
RULE_VALUE = VALIDATION_MESSAGE
RETURN RULE_VALUE

DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR PER_EXT_PERSON_CITIZENSHIP_LEGISLATION_CODE IS ' '
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR PER_EXT_PERSON_CITIZENSHIP_STATUS IS ' '
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR PER_EXT_PERSON_CITIZENSHIP_DATE_FROM IS '0001/01/01 00:00:00' (DATE)
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR PER_EXT_PERSON_CITIZENSHIP_DATE_TO IS '4712/12/31 00:00:00' (DATE)
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR PER_PER_ALL_VISA_PERMITS_VISA_PERMIT_ID IS 0
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR PER_PER_ALL_VISA_PERMITS_ISSUING_COUNTRY IS ' '
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR PER_PER_ALL_VISA_PERMITS_VISA_PERMIT_TYPE IS ' '
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR PER_PER_ALL_VISA_PERMITS_VISA_PERMIT_NUMBER IS ' '
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR PER_PER_ALL_VISA_PERMITS_ISSUE_DATE IS '0001/01/01 00:00:00' (DATE)
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR PER_PER_ALL_VISA_PERMITS_EXPIRATION_DATE IS '4712/12/31 00:00:00' (DATE)
DEFAULT FOR PER_LEGAL_EMPLOYER_COUNTRY IS ' '
DEFAULT FOR DATA_ELEMENT_CODE IS 'NULL'

INPUTS ARE DATA_ELEMENTS (TEXT_TEXT),
PARAMS (TEXT_TEXT), /* Runtime Parameters */
    DATA_ELEMENT_CODE (TEXT)

need_context(EFFECTIVE_DATE)
l_eff_date = get_context(EFFECTIVE_DATE,'0001/01/01 00:00:00' (DATE))

indx = 1
l_is_domestic  = 'N'
l_is_foreigner = 'N'
WHILE (PER_EXT_PERSON_CITIZENSHIP_LEGISLATION_CODE.EXISTS(indx)) LOOP
  (
  l_cit_code  = PER_EXT_PERSON_CITIZENSHIP_LEGISLATION_CODE[indx]
  l_cit_sts   = PER_EXT_PERSON_CITIZENSHIP_STATUS[indx]
  l_date_from = PER_EXT_PERSON_CITIZENSHIP_DATE_FROM[indx]
  l_date_to   = PER_EXT_PERSON_CITIZENSHIP_DATE_TO[indx]
  IF l_eff_date >= l_date_from AND l_eff_date <= l_date_to AND l_cit_sts = 'A' THEN
    (
    IF l_cit_code = PER_LEGAL_EMPLOYER_COUNTRY THEN
      (
      l_is_domestic  = 'Y'
      )
    ELSE
      (
      l_is_foreigner = 'Y'
      )
    )
  indx = indx + 1
  )

IF l_is_domestic = 'N' AND l_is_foreigner = 'Y' THEN
  (
  indx2 = 1
  l_visa_found = 'N'
  l_code_visa_type = REPLACE(REPLACE(DATA_ELEMENT_CODE,'ORA_HRX_VISA_'),'>MC')
  WHILE (PER_PER_ALL_VISA_PERMITS_VISA_PERMIT_ID.EXISTS(indx2)) LOOP
    (
    l_visa_country    = PER_PER_ALL_VISA_PERMITS_ISSUING_COUNTRY[indx2]
    l_visa_type       = PER_PER_ALL_VISA_PERMITS_VISA_PERMIT_TYPE[indx2]
    l_visa_num        = PER_PER_ALL_VISA_PERMITS_VISA_PERMIT_NUMBER[indx2]
    l_visa_issue_date = PER_PER_ALL_VISA_PERMITS_ISSUE_DATE[indx2]
    l_visa_exp_date   = PER_PER_ALL_VISA_PERMITS_EXPIRATION_DATE[indx2]
    IF l_eff_date >= l_visa_issue_date AND l_eff_date <= l_visa_exp_date THEN
      (
      IF l_visa_country = PER_LEGAL_EMPLOYER_COUNTRY AND l_visa_type = l_code_visa_type AND l_visa_num != ' ' AND l_visa_issue_date > '0001/01/01 00:00:00' (DATE) AND l_visa_exp_date < '4712/12/31 00:00:00' (DATE) THEN
        (
        l_visa_found = 'Y'
        )
      )
    indx2 = indx2 + 1
    )

  IF l_visa_found = 'N' THEN
    (
    IF PER_LEGAL_EMPLOYER_COUNTRY = 'EG' THEN
      (
      RULE_VALUE = SUBSTR(get_mesg('HRX','HRX_EGPD_RESIDENT_PERM_REQ'),1,240)
      RETURN RULE_VALUE
      )
    )
  )

DEFAULT FOR DATA_ELEMENTS IS EMPTY_TEXT_TEXT

INPUTS ARE DATA_ELEMENTS (TEXT_TEXT)

l_sal =DATA_ELEMENTS['Salary']
l_Payment_Frequency =DATA_ELEMENTS['PaymentFrequency']
l_payroll_frequency = DATA_ELEMENTS['PayrollFrequency']

FORMULA_RESULTS = 'Payroll Interface Periodic Salary Calculator'
IF(IS_EXECUTABLE(FORMULA_RESULTS)) THEN
(
 call_formula (FORMULA_RESULTS,
                       l_sal > 'l_salary',
                       l_Payment_Frequency > 'l_PaymentFrequency',
                       l_payroll_frequency > 'l_payroll_freq',
                       l_period_amount <'l_periodic_amount' default 1)

RULE_VALUE = to_text(l_period_amount)
)


RETURN RULE_VALUE

DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR PER_PER_NI_LEGISLATION_CODE IS ' '
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR PER_PER_NI_TYPE IS ' '
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR PER_PER_NI_ISSUE_DATE IS '0001/01/01 00:00:00' (DATE)
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR PER_PER_NI_EXPIRATION_DATE IS '4712/12/31 00:00:00' (DATE)
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR PER_PER_NI_NUMBER IS ' '
DEFAULT FOR PER_PER_DATE_OF_BIRTH IS '0001/01/01 00:00:00' (date)

need_context(EFFECTIVE_DATE)
l_eff_date = get_context(EFFECTIVE_DATE,'0001/01/01 00:00:00' (DATE))

indx = 1
WHILE (PER_PER_NI_TYPE.EXISTS(indx)) LOOP
  (
  l_nid_leg_code   = PER_PER_NI_LEGISLATION_CODE[indx]
  l_nid_nid_type   = PER_PER_NI_TYPE[indx]
  l_nid_issue_date = PER_PER_NI_ISSUE_DATE[indx]
  l_nid_exp_date   = PER_PER_NI_EXPIRATION_DATE[indx]
  l_nid_nid_num    = PER_PER_NI_NUMBER[indx]
  IF l_eff_date >= l_nid_issue_date AND l_eff_date <= l_nid_exp_date THEN
    (
    IF l_nid_leg_code = 'ZA' AND l_nid_nid_type = 'ORA_HRX_ID_NUMBER' THEN
      (
      IF PER_PER_DATE_OF_BIRTH WAS NOT DEFAULTED THEN
        (
        l_dob = DATE_TO_TEXT(PER_PER_DATE_OF_BIRTH,'YYMMDD')
        IF l_dob = SUBSTR(l_nid_nid_num,1,6) THEN
          (
          RETURN
          )
        ELSE
          (
          RULE_VALUE = SUBSTR(get_mesg('HRX','HRX_ZAPD_IDNUMBER_XVAL_DOB'),1,240)
          RETURN RULE_VALUE
          )
        )
      )
    )
  indx = indx + 1
  )

/******************************************************************************
* Formula Name : KW_WORKER_VALIDATION_HOME_ADDRESS_CHECK_RULE
* Description  : Extract Rule Formula
*                A value for the home address of the employee is required.
******************************************************************************/
DEFAULT FOR PER_PER_PERSON_ADD_USAGE_ADDRESS_LINE1 IS ' '
DEFAULT FOR PER_PER_PERSON_ADD_USAGE_POSTAL_CODE IS ' '

change_contexts( ADDRESS_TYPE = 'HOME')
(
  IF PER_PER_PERSON_ADD_USAGE_ADDRESS_LINE1 WAS DEFAULTED AND PER_PER_PERSON_ADD_USAGE_POSTAL_CODE WAS DEFAULTED  THEN 
  (
	RULE_VALUE = SUBSTR((GET_MESG('HRX','HRX_KWPR_ADDRESS_MISSING')),1,240)
  ) 
)  
return RULE_VALUE

DEFAULT FOR DATA_ELEMENTS IS EMPTY_TEXT_TEXT
	INPUTS ARE DATA_ELEMENTS (TEXT_TEXT)

	l_effective_date = GET_PARAMETER_VALUE_DATE('EFFECTIVE_DATE')
	dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('effective_date1= '|| TO_CHAR(l_effective_date))

	l_effdt =   substr(to_char(l_effective_date),6,2)

	l_number = to_number(l_effdt)

	IF (l_number >= 4  and l_number <= 12) THEN 
	(
	ld_rem_month =  15 - l_number
	)
	IF (l_number >= 1  and l_number <= 3 ) THEN
	(
	ld_rem_month = 3 - l_number
	)

	RULE_VALUE = to_char(ld_rem_month)

	RETURN RULE_VALUE

DEFAULT FOR DATA_ELEMENTS IS EMPTY_TEXT_TEXT
INPUTS ARE DATA_ELEMENTS (TEXT_TEXT)

l_effective_date = GET_PARAMETER_VALUE_DATE('EFFECTIVE_DATE')
dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('effective_date in Document Name= '|| TO_CHAR(l_effective_date))

l_month =   substr(to_char(l_effective_date),6,2)

l_year = substr(to_char(l_effective_date),1,4)

l_number = to_number(l_month)

l_yr = to_number(l_year)

IF (l_number >= 4  and l_number <= 12) THEN 
(
l_fin_yr =  l_year + '-' + to_char(l_yr+1)
)
IF (l_number >= 1  and l_number <= 3 ) THEN
(
l_fin_yr =  to_char(l_yr-1) + '-' + l_year
)
dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('l_fin_yr= '|| l_fin_yr)
l_document_name = 'IT_Computation_'+l_fin_yr
rule_value = l_document_name


if DATA_ELEMENTS.EXISTS('PERSON_NUMBER') then
(
l_person_number =  DATA_ELEMENTS['PERSON_NUMBER']
dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('l_person_number= '|| l_person_number)
l_document_name = 'IT_Computation_'+ l_fin_yr + '_' + l_person_number
dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('l_document_name= '|| l_document_name)
rule_value = l_document_name
)
 return rule_value

/****************************************************************************
* Formula Name : HRX_IE_GPGAP_ASIGNMENT_CATEGORY_TPP_RULE                                            *
* Description  : Extract Rule Formula to validate the account number of     *
*                	third party		         								*
*****************************************************************************/
DEFAULT FOR IE_GPGR_HOURS_ASG_TU_R12MTH IS 0
DEFAULT FOR PER_ASG_FULL_PART_TIME IS ' '
DEFAULT FOR PER_ASG_PERMANENT_TEMPORARY_FLAG IS ' '
INPUTS ARE
DATA_ELEMENTS (TEXT_TEXT),
PARAMS (TEXT_TEXT), /* Runtime Parameters */
DATA_ELEMENT_CODE (TEXT)
DE_FULL_PART_TIME = 'FULL_PART_TIME'
DE_PERMANENT_TEMPRORARY = 'PERMANENT_TEMPRORARY'
FULL_PART_TIME=' '
PERMANENT_TEMPRORARY=' '
l_ff_name = 'HRX_IE_GPGAP_ASIGNMENT_CATEGORY_TPP_RULE::'

IF CONTEXT_IS_SET(HR_ASSIGNMENT_ID) THEN 
(
  IF (DATA_ELEMENTS.EXISTS(DE_FULL_PART_TIME)) THEN 
  FULL_PART_TIME=DATA_ELEMENTS[DE_FULL_PART_TIME] 
)

IF CONTEXT_IS_SET(HR_ASSIGNMENT_ID) THEN 
(
  IF (DATA_ELEMENTS.EXISTS(DE_PERMANENT_TEMPRORARY)) THEN 
  PERMANENT_TEMPRORARY=DATA_ELEMENTS[DE_PERMANENT_TEMPRORARY] 
)

IF FULL_PART_TIME='FULL_TIME'
THEN FULL_PART_TIME='Full time'
ELSE IF FULL_PART_TIME='PART_TIME'
THEN FULL_PART_TIME='Part time'



IF PERMANENT_TEMPRORARY='T'
THEN PERMANENT_TEMPRORARY='Temporary'
ELSE IF PERMANENT_TEMPRORARY='R'
THEN PERMANENT_TEMPRORARY='Regular'

RULE_VALUE=FULL_PART_TIME+'-'+PERMANENT_TEMPRORARY
RET = ESS_LOG_WRITE(l_ff_name || 'ASSGN: STR_VAL ' || RULE_VALUE)

return RULE_VALUE

DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR PER_EXT_PERSON_CITIZENSHIP_LEGISLATION_CODE IS ' '
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR PER_EXT_PERSON_CITIZENSHIP_STATUS IS ' '
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR PER_EXT_PERSON_CITIZENSHIP_DATE_FROM IS '0001/01/01 00:00:00' (DATE)
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR PER_EXT_PERSON_CITIZENSHIP_DATE_TO IS '4712/12/31 00:00:00' (DATE)
DEFAULT FOR PER_PER_PREV_LAST_NAME IS ' '
DEFAULT FOR PER_PER_SEX_EXTENDED IS ' '
DEFAULT FOR PER_PER_MARITAL_STATUS IS ' '

need_context(EFFECTIVE_DATE)
l_eff_date = get_context(EFFECTIVE_DATE,'0001/01/01 00:00:00' (DATE))

l_issue_found = 'N'
IF PER_PER_PREV_LAST_NAME WAS DEFAULTED THEN
  (
  IF PER_PER_SEX_EXTENDED WAS NOT DEFAULTED AND PER_PER_SEX_EXTENDED = 'F' THEN
    (
    IF PER_PER_MARITAL_STATUS WAS NOT DEFAULTED AND PER_PER_MARITAL_STATUS = 'M' THEN
      (
      l_issue_found = 'Y'
      )
    )
  )

IF l_issue_found = 'Y' THEN
  (
  indx = 1
  WHILE (PER_EXT_PERSON_CITIZENSHIP_LEGISLATION_CODE.EXISTS(indx)) LOOP
    (
    l_cit_code  = PER_EXT_PERSON_CITIZENSHIP_LEGISLATION_CODE[indx]
    l_cit_sts   = PER_EXT_PERSON_CITIZENSHIP_STATUS[indx]
    l_date_from = PER_EXT_PERSON_CITIZENSHIP_DATE_FROM[indx]
    l_date_to   = PER_EXT_PERSON_CITIZENSHIP_DATE_TO[indx]
    IF l_eff_date >= l_date_from AND l_eff_date <= l_date_to AND l_cit_sts = 'A' THEN
      (
      IF l_cit_code = 'TR' THEN
        (
        RULE_VALUE = SUBSTR(get_mesg('HRX','HRX_TRPD_NAME_CHECK'),1,240)
        RETURN RULE_VALUE
        )
      )
    indx = indx + 1
    )
  )

/* $Header: fusionapps/hcm/hwm/db/data/HcmWfmRulesTemplates/HWM/FormulaAllSD.xml /st_fusionapps_pt-v1hcmagdv/2 2012/07/25 20:09:04 dcohanof Exp $ */
/* +======================================================================+
   |                Copyright (c) 2009 Oracle Corporation                 |
   |                   Redwood Shores, California, USA                    |
   |                        All rights reserved.                          |
   +======================================================================+
 *
 * Formula Name : WFM_TER_PERIOD_MAXIMUM_HOURS
 *                 
 * Description:   WFM TER Period Maximum Hours  
 *
 * Formula Type:  WORKFORCE_MANAGEMENT_REPOSITORY_RULES
 *  
 * Detail:     This Max Hours formula will ONLY calculate overtime 
 *             for single Defined Limit duration of time card period. 
 *             This function determines if total work hours in a period
 *             exceeds a single Defined limit.  If total hours exceeds max 
 *             Defined limit FF will output a message code/token(s) to 
 *             rule engine. 
 *             For example, if a weekly timecard has total of 52 hours 
 *             and Defined limit value is 40 Hours. FF will pass a 
 *             message code and token(s) back to Rule Engine for further 
 *             processing.
 *             
 *
 *
 *  Change History
 *  --------------
 *
 *  Who               Ver     Date          Description
 *-----------------  ------  ------------  -----------------------------------------
 * David Cohanoff     6.25a     2012-APRIL-10    Created.
 *
 * 
***************************************************************************/  
default for measure(number)  is  0 

INPUTS ARE   
   measure(number)  

/*  Following 2 lines are required right after inputs for all OTL and HWM formulas */
ffs_id = GET_CONTEXT(HWM_FFS_ID, 0)
l_status = init_util(ffs_id ,   GET_CONTEXT(HWM_RULE_ID,  0) )


l_sum_lvl = GET_CONTEXT(HWM_SUMMATION_LEVEL, 'TIMECARD')
l_rec_position = GET_CONTEXT(HWM_RECORD_POSITION, 'DETAIL')

l_text = '( '  ||  
 ' , l_sum_lvl='  ||   l_sum_lvl ||  
 ' , l_rec_position ='  ||  l_rec_position ||  
 ' , ffs_id ='  ||  TO_CHAR( ffs_id ) ||  
 ' ) '
 l_status = add_log (ffs_id ,l_text )



l_send_msg = 0
/*
l_default_last_date =  '01-JAN-1900'(DATE)  
wk_date_last       = get_wrk_date (ffs_id , 'wk_date_last' , 0, l_default_last_date ) 
*/
   
l_max_hr  = get_fvalue_number (ffs_id ,'DEFINED_LIMIT', 0) 
l_msg_cd  = GET_FVALUE_TEXT (ffs_id ,'MESSAGE_CODE', 'HWM_ MAX_HOURS_EXCEEDS_NN')   
l_time_category  = GET_FVALUE_TEXT (ffs_id ,'WORKED_TIME_CONDITION', 'NULL')   
l_variance  = GET_FVALUE_TEXT (ffs_id ,'VARIANCE', 'NULL')   


wk_hrs_total_day   = get_wrk_num  (ffs_id , 'wk_hrs_total_day' , 0, 0 ) 
wk_hrs_total_tc   = get_wrk_num  (ffs_id , 'wk_hrs_total_tc' , 0, 0 )   
 
l_hrs_total_day = wk_hrs_total_day + measure
l_hrs_total_tc  = wk_hrs_total_tc  + measure 
  
l_text = '( '  || 
 ' , max_hr ='  ||  TO_CHAR( l_max_hr) || 
 ' , msg_cd='  ||   l_msg_cd ||  
 ' , time_cat='  ||  l_time_category  ||  
 ' , hrs_total_day ='  ||  TO_CHAR( l_hrs_total_day ) || 
 ' , hrs_total_tc ='  ||  TO_CHAR( l_hrs_total_tc) ||  
 ' ) '
 l_status = add_log (ffs_id ,l_text )

   
is_create_msg = 'N'

if (l_sum_lvl = 'TIMECARD' AND l_hrs_total_tc > l_max_hr ) then (   
   is_create_msg = 'Y' 
) ELSE IF (l_sum_lvl = 'DAY' AND wk_hrs_total_day > l_max_hr ) then (   
   is_create_msg = 'Y' 
) ELSE IF ( l_sum_lvl = 'DETAIL' AND measure > l_max_hr  ) then (   
   is_create_msg = 'Y' 
) 


if ( is_create_msg = 'Y' ) then (   
   /* desfault l_msg_cd  =  Maximum hours exceeds {DEF_LIMIT} hours per week */
   l_tkn1 = '{DEF_LIMIT}' 
   l_val1 = TO_CHAR( l_max_hr ) 
   l_msg_cd = l_msg_cd  
    OUT_MSG = get_output_msg1 ( 'FND' ,l_msg_cd ,l_tkn1 , l_val1 )
  
   l_text = '( '  ||   ' , OUT_MSG ='  ||  OUT_MSG  ||    ' )'
   l_status = add_log (ffs_id ,l_text )

 )


wk_hrs_total_day   = l_hrs_total_day    
wk_hrs_total_tc   = l_hrs_total_tc     

if (l_rec_position = 'LAST_DETAIL') then  (
   wk_hrs_total_day    = 0
)  ELSE IF (l_rec_position = 'LAST_DAY') then  (
   wk_hrs_total_day    = 0
   wk_hrs_total_tc    = 0
)
 

 l_status = set_wrk_num  (ffs_id , 'wk_hrs_total_day' , 0, wk_hrs_total_day) 
 l_status = set_wrk_num  (ffs_id , 'wk_hrs_total_tc ' , 0, wk_hrs_total_tc ) 

RETURN  OUT_MSG

rule_id = GET_CONTEXT(HWM_RULE_ID, 0) 
rLog    = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, 'Enter >>' || ffName   )
  
NullDate =  '01-JAN-1900'(DATE)   
NullText =  '**FF_NULL**'
        

pReSubValidationFlag  = get_rvalue_text (rule_id ,'ORA_HWM_FF_RESUB_VALIDATION', 'ORA_HWM_FF_RESUB_VALIDATION')    
    
rLog = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, 'Rule Parameters: '  ||     
					  ' , pReSubValidationFlag='      ||  pReSubValidationFlag      )   
   
if (pReSubValidationFlag <> 'ORA_HWM_FF_RESUB_VALIDATION') then ( 
		ex = raise_error (ffs_id, rule_id, 'Formula ' || ffName ||
				'. Invalid reSubmitt Validation flag, pReSubValidationFlag = '  || pReSubValidationFlag  ) 
)
  
rLog    = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, 'Exit >>>' || ffName   )   
 

RETURN

code:
/*
     Formula Name : HR PERSON GROUP LEVEL SUMMARY FORMULA
     Decription
         This formula calls the formulae in the Person Group for the level passed as input
         - until membership has been established.

*/
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR PERSON_GROUP_PER_REL_LEVEL_FORMULA_NAME is 'null'
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR PERSON_GROUP_PER_TERM_LEVEL_FORMULA_NAME is 'null'
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR PERSON_GROUP_PER_ASG_LEVEL_FORMULA_NAME is 'null'

INPUTS ARE level_name(text)

NEED_CONTEXT(HR_RELATIONSHIP_ID)
NEED_CONTEXT(HR_TERM_ID)
NEED_CONTEXT(HR_ASSIGNMENT_ID)
NEED_CONTEXT(DATE_EARNED)
NEED_CONTEXT(EFFECTIVE_DATE)

in_group = 'N'

IF (level_name = 'HR_REL') THEN
  form_name = PERSON_GROUP_PER_REL_LEVEL_FORMULA_NAME
IF (level_name = 'HR_TERM') THEN
  form_name = PERSON_GROUP_PER_TERM_LEVEL_FORMULA_NAME
IF (level_name = 'HR_ASG') THEN
  form_name = PERSON_GROUP_PER_ASG_LEVEL_FORMULA_NAME

i=1
WHILE (form_name.exists(i)) LOOP
(
  EXECUTE (form_name[i])
  in_group = GET_OUTPUT('INCLUDE_FLAG', 'N')

  IF in_group = 'N' THEN
     EXIT

  i = i + 1
)

IF in_group = 'Y' THEN
  INCLUDE_FLAG = 'Y'

RETURN INCLUDE_FLAG

ELSE IF OPERATION='MAP' THEN

ELSE
RETURN OUTPUTVALUE

/************************************************************************************
FORMULA NAME: Partial Accrual Period Rate Formula
FORMULA TYPE: Global Absence Partial Accrual Period Rate
DESCRIPTION: This sample formula returns the Accrual based on Length of Service for partial period.
Change History:
Name                 Date        Comments
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Guru Prasad Havaligi 23-Apr-2013 Initial Version
************************************************************************************/
/*=========== DATABASE ITEM DEFAULTS BEGIN =====================*/
DEFAULT for PER_ASG_REL_ORIGINAL_DATE_OF_HIRE is '4712/12/31 00:00:00' (date)
/*=========== DATABASE ITEM DEFAULTS ENDS======================*/
l_no_of_days=days_BETWEEN(GET_CONTEXT(EFFECTIVE_DATE,'4712/12/31 00:00:00' (date)),PER_ASG_REL_ORIGINAL_DATE_OF_HIRE)
l_length_of_service=Floor(l_no_of_days/365)
/*================ FORMULA SECTION BEGIN =======================*/
If (( l_length_of_service >0 ) and ( l_length_of_service< 5))
then
  ( accrual = 0.5)
Else If (( l_length_of_service >=5) and (l_length_of_service< 10))
then
(   accrual = 1)
Else If ((l_length_of_service >=10) and (l_length_of_service< 15))
then
 (  accrual = 1.5)
Else If ((l_length_of_service >=15) and (l_length_of_service< 20))
then
    (   accrual = 2.0)
Else
 (  accrual = 3.0)
/*================ FORMULA SECTION BEGIN =======================*/
Return accrual

/* ORA_HRX_GB_ABS_SSP_SUB_LETTER */
/*
###############################################################################
#
# BASENAME: ORA_HRX_GB_ABS_SSP_SUB_LETTER
# NAME:		UK Statutory Sick Pay Linking Letter Detection
# TYPE:		Global Absence Plan Entitlement
# Descr:	Formula to find if a linking letter exists for statutory sick pay.
#
# Formula must be in an LDG to work because of dbi.ORA_HRX_GB_PAY_PERIOD_START
###############################################################################
# Updates:
# 20190808 created as external formula, bug 30157568
###############################################################################
# WARNING: if you customize this formula then please leave in at least the
# latest update datestamp so that we can understand which version your
# customization was derived from. Thank you.
###############################################################################
*/

/***
Input conditions:    absence is not linked
INPUT:     l_start_date
OUTPUT:    link_letter_cert_flag
contexts used in dbis:    PER_PER_DOR_DOCUMENT_CODE: PERSON_ID
*/

DEFAULT FOR PER_PER_DOR_DOCUMENT_CODE is EMPTY_TEXT_NUMBER
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE for PER_PER_DOR_DOCUMENT_CODE is 'X'

DEFAULT FOR PER_PER_DOR_DOCUMENT_TYPE_ID is EMPTY_NUMBER_NUMBER
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE for PER_PER_DOR_DOCUMENT_TYPE_ID is 0

DEFAULT FOR PER_PER_DOR_SYSTEM_DOCUMENT_TYPE_NAME is EMPTY_TEXT_NUMBER
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE for PER_PER_DOR_SYSTEM_DOCUMENT_TYPE_NAME is 'X'

DEFAULT FOR PER_PER_DOR_DATE_FROM is EMPTY_DATE_NUMBER
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE for PER_PER_DOR_DATE_FROM is '4712/12/31 00:00:00' (DATE)

DEFAULT FOR PER_PER_DOR_DATE_TO is EMPTY_DATE_NUMBER
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE for PER_PER_DOR_DATE_TO is '4712/12/31 00:00:00' (DATE)


INPUTS are IV_L_START_DATE (date)
    l_start_date=IV_L_START_DATE
    link_letter_cert_flag = 'N'

	ni=PER_PER_DOR_DOCUMENT_CODE.FIRST(-1)
	if PER_PER_DOR_DOCUMENT_CODE.exists(ni) then (
		/* we have at least some document */
		l_found=0
		while (PER_PER_DOR_DOCUMENT_CODE.exists(ni) and l_found=0) loop (
				l_dor_document_code=PER_PER_DOR_DOCUMENT_CODE[ni]
				l_dor_document_type_id=PER_PER_DOR_DOCUMENT_TYPE_ID[ni]
				l_dor_system_doc_type=PER_PER_DOR_SYSTEM_DOCUMENT_TYPE_NAME[ni]
				l_dor_date_from=PER_PER_DOR_DATE_FROM[ni]
				l_dor_date_to=PER_PER_DOR_DATE_TO[ni]


				if 'ORA_HRX_GB_JC_LINK_LETTER'=l_dor_system_doc_type then (
					if l_start_date >= l_dor_date_from and l_start_date <= l_dor_date_to then (
						/* 'ORA_HRX_GB_ABS_SSP_ENTITLEMENT_LL4:Absence Start within LinkingLetter Period!' */
						l_found=1		  /* stop looking further */

						/* queue a certification */
						link_letter_cert_flag = 'Y'
					)
				    /* else: we have the document and it is n/a, there may be another */
				)
				ni=PER_PER_DOR_DOCUMENT_CODE.NEXT(ni,-1)
		)
	)
    /* else: 'ORA_HRX_GB_ABS_SSP_ENTITLEMENT_LL:document search:NO DOCUMENTS' */

return link_letter_cert_flag

/******************************************************************************
FORMULA NAME: ANCDEVONLY_PLAN_DUR_FORMULA_CALDAYS
FORMULA TYPE: Global Absence Plan Duration Formula
DESCRIPTION: Plan duration formula to return duration in calendar days
Change History:
Name		Date       	Comments
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*******************************************************************************/

DEFAULT FOR IV_START_DATE IS '4712/12/31 00:00:00' (date)
DEFAULT FOR IV_END_DATE IS '4712/12/31 00:00:00' (date)
DEFAULT FOR IV_START_TIME IS '00:00'
DEFAULT FOR IV_END_TIME IS '23:59'
DEFAULT FOR IV_START_DURATION IS 1
DEFAULT FOR IV_END_DURATION IS 1

INPUTS ARE 
IV_START_DATE (date), 
IV_END_DATE (date), 
IV_START_TIME(text),
IV_END_TIME(text), 
IV_START_DURATION(number), 
IV_END_DURATION(number)

duration = 0

IF (IV_START_DURATION > 0 AND ((DAYS_BETWEEN(TRUNC(IV_END_DATE), TRUNC(IV_START_DATE)) + 1) = 1))
THEN
	(
		duration = IV_START_DURATION
	)
else if(IV_END_DURATION > 0 AND ((DAYS_BETWEEN(TRUNC(IV_END_DATE), TRUNC(IV_START_DATE)) + 1) = 1))
THEN
	(
		duration = IV_END_DURATION
	)
else
	(
		ld_period_start_date = to_date(to_char(IV_START_DATE,'DD/MM/RRRR')||' '||'00:00','DD/MM/RRRR HH24:MI:SS')
		ld_period_end_date = to_date(to_char(IV_END_DATE,'DD/MM/RRRR')||' '||'23:59','DD/MM/RRRR HH24:MI:SS')

		duration = days_between(ld_period_end_date,ld_period_start_date)
	)

return duration

/******************************************************************************
FORMULA NAME: ANCDEVONLY_TYPE_DURATION_FORMULA
FORMULA TYPE: Global Absence Type Duration Formula
DESCRIPTION: This formula returns the pro-rated duration for absence entries based on work schedule details
Change History:
Name      Date        Version  Comments
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*******************************************************************************/

DEFAULT FOR IV_START_DATE IS '4712/12/31 00:00:00' (date)
DEFAULT FOR IV_END_DATE IS '4712/12/31 00:00:00' (date)
DEFAULT FOR IV_START_TIME IS '00:00'
DEFAULT FOR IV_END_TIME IS '23:59'
DEFAULT FOR IV_START_DURATION IS 0
DEFAULT FOR IV_END_DURATION IS 0

INPUTS ARE IV_START_DATE (date), IV_END_DATE (date), IV_START_TIME(text),IV_END_TIME(text), IV_START_DURATION(number), IV_END_DURATION(number)

duration = 0
lc_use_sch_asg_y = 'Y'
lc_use_sch_inh_y = 'Y'
lc_include_noshift_y = 'Y'
lc_include_calevents_y = 'Y'
lc_calc_units_d = 'D'
lc_asg_resource_type = 'ASSIGN'

l_log = ESS_LOG_WRITE('||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||' )
l_log = ESS_LOG_WRITE('IV_START_DATE: ' || to_char(IV_START_DATE))
l_log = ESS_LOG_WRITE('IV_END_DATE: ' || to_char(IV_END_DATE))
l_log = ESS_LOG_WRITE('IV_START_DURATION: ' || to_char(IV_START_DURATION))
l_log = ESS_LOG_WRITE('IV_END_DURATION: ' || to_char(IV_END_DURATION))

IF (IV_START_DURATION > 0 AND ((DAYS_BETWEEN(TRUNC(IV_END_DATE), TRUNC(IV_START_DATE)) + 1) = 1))
THEN
	(
		l_log = ESS_LOG_WRITE('1st IF ')
		duration = IV_START_DURATION
	)

else if(IV_END_DURATION > 0 AND ((DAYS_BETWEEN(TRUNC(IV_END_DATE), TRUNC(IV_START_DATE)) + 1) = 1))
THEN
	(
		l_log = ESS_LOG_WRITE('1st IF Part 2')
		duration = IV_END_DURATION
	)

ELSE 
	(
		IF(IV_START_DURATION > 0 AND IV_END_DURATION> 0 AND (DAYS_BETWEEN(TRUNC(IV_END_DATE), TRUNC(IV_START_DATE)) + 1) = 2)
		THEN
			(
				l_log = ESS_LOG_WRITE('2nd IF ')
				duration = IV_START_DURATION + IV_END_DURATION
			)
		else 
			(
				l_log = ESS_LOG_WRITE('3rd IF ')
				IV_START_TIME = '00:00'
				IV_END_TIME = '23:59'

				ld_period_start_date = to_date(to_char(IV_START_DATE,'DD/MM/RRRR')||' '||IV_START_TIME,'DD/MM/RRRR HH24:MI:SS')
				ld_period_end_date = to_date(to_char(IV_END_DATE,'DD/MM/RRRR')||' '||IV_END_TIME,'DD/MM/RRRR HH24:MI:SS')

				l_log = ESS_LOG_WRITE('1 ld_period_start_date: ' || to_char(ld_period_start_date))
				l_log = ESS_LOG_WRITE('1 ld_period_end_date: ' || to_char(ld_period_end_date))
				
				IF(IV_START_DURATION > 0)
				THEN
					(
						duration = IV_START_DURATION 
						ld_period_start_date = ADD_DAYS(ld_period_start_date,1)
						l_log = ESS_LOG_WRITE('1 duration: ' || to_char(IV_START_DURATION))
					)
				IF(IV_END_DURATION > 0)
				THEN
					(
						duration = duration + IV_END_DURATION 
						ld_period_end_date = ADD_DAYS(ld_period_end_date,-1)
						l_log = ESS_LOG_WRITE('2 duration: ' || to_char(IV_END_DURATION))
					)
				
				l_log = ESS_LOG_WRITE('2 ld_period_start_date: ' || to_char(ld_period_start_date))
				l_log = ESS_LOG_WRITE('2 ld_period_end_date: ' || to_char(ld_period_end_date))
				
				durationTemp = GET_PAY_AVAILABILITY (lc_asg_resource_type,
					ld_period_start_date,
					ld_period_end_date,
					lc_use_sch_asg_y,
					lc_use_sch_inh_y,
					lc_include_noshift_y,
					lc_include_calevents_y,
					lc_calc_units_d)
					
				duration = duration + durationTemp
					
				l_log = ESS_LOG_WRITE('3 duration: ' || to_char(durationTemp))
			
			)
	)
	

l_log = ESS_LOG_WRITE('duration: ' || to_char(duration))	
l_log = ESS_LOG_WRITE('________________________________________' )
	
RETURN duration

DEFAULT FOR IV_START_DATE IS '4712/12/31 00:00:00' (date)
	DEFAULT FOR IV_END_DATE IS '4712/12/31 00:00:00' (date)

	DEFAULT FOR IV_END_TIME IS '23:59'
	DEFAULT FOR IV_START_DURATION IS 1
	DEFAULT FOR IV_END_DURATION IS 1
	DEFAULT FOR PER_ASG_FTE_VALUE IS 1
        DEFAULT FOR PER_ASG_EMPLOYMENT_CATEGORY IS 'UNKNOWN'
	
	INPUTS ARE IV_START_DATE (date), IV_END_DATE (date), IV_START_TIME(text),IV_END_TIME(text), IV_START_DURATION(number), IV_END_DURATION(number)
	
	ln_duration = 0
	ln_unrounded_duration_d = 0
	
	lc_asg_resource_type = 'ASSIGN'
	ld_period_start_date = to_date(to_char(IV_START_DATE,'DD/MM/RRRR')||' '||IV_START_TIME,'DD/MM/RRRR HH24:MI:SS')
	ld_period_end_date = to_date(to_char(IV_END_DATE,'DD/MM/RRRR')||' '||IV_END_TIME,'DD/MM/RRRR HH24:MI:SS')
	lc_use_sch_asg_y = 'Y'
	lc_use_sch_inh_y = 'Y'
	lc_include_noshift_y = 'Y'
	lc_include_calevents_y = 'Y'
	lc_calc_units_d = 'D'
	
/* Retrieve the absence duration based on the work schedule */ 		
	ln_unrounded_duration_d = GET_PAY_AVAILABILITY (lc_asg_resource_type,
	    ld_period_start_date,
	    ld_period_end_date,
	    lc_use_sch_asg_y,
	    lc_use_sch_inh_y,
	    lc_include_noshift_y,
	    lc_include_calevents_y,
	    lc_calc_units_d)

/* test if (vertical) Part time apply the FTE */ 	
       IF PER_ASG_EMPLOYMENT_CATEGORY ='FR_20' THEN 
	   ln_duration = ln_unrounded_duration_d * (1/PER_ASG_FTE_VALUE)
       ELSE ln_duration = ln_unrounded_duration_d
	  /*duration = ROUND(ln_duration,2)*/
       duration = ln_duration
	
       RETURN duration

/******************************************************************************
FORMULA NAME: RM_ABS_FF
FORMULA TYPE: Global Absence Type Duration Formula CREATED BY: Richard Mondal
DESCRIPTION: This formula returns the  duration for absence entries based on duration formula  that reduces the absence duration by 1 hour if the entered absence is  >= 4 hours. 2 hours if >=8hours.
Change History:
Name    Date        Version      Comments
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Oracle    20-Nov-2018    DRAFT 1A    Initial Version *******************************************************************************/

DEFAULT FOR IV_START_DATE IS '4712/12/31 00:00:00' (date) DEFAULT FOR IV_END_DATE IS '4712/12/31 00:00:00' (date) DEFAULT FOR IV_START_TIME IS '00:00'
DEFAULT FOR IV_END_TIME IS '23:59'
DEFAULT FOR PER_ASG_FTE_VALUE IS 1

INPUTS ARE IV_START_DATE (date), IV_END_DATE (date),
IV_START_TIME(text),IV_END_TIME(text)

ln_entry_duration_d = 0

ld_period_start_date = to_date(to_char(IV_START_DATE,'DD/MM/RRRR')||' 
'||IV_START_TIME,'DD/MM/RRRR HH24:MI:SS') ld_period_end_date = to_date(to_char(IV_END_DATE,'DD/MM/RRRR')||' 
'||IV_END_TIME,'DD/MM/RRRR HH24:MI:SS')

ln_entry_duration_d = GET_PAY_AVAILABILITY ('ASSIGN',
     ld_period_start_date,
     ld_period_end_date,
     'Y',
     'Y',
     'Y',
     'Y',
     'H')

IF (ln_entry_duration_d >=8 )
THEN
(ln_entry_duration_d = ln_entry_duration_d - 2) ELSE ( IF (ln_entry_duration_d >=4 )
     THEN
     (ln_entry_duration_d = ln_entry_duration_d - 1)
)
DURATION = ROUND(ln_entry_duration_d ,2)

RETURN DURATION

/**********************************************************************
FORMULA NAME: ORA_HRX_IE_PAR_VALIDATION
FORMULA TYPE: Global Absence Entry Validation 
DESCRIPTION : IE Parents Absence Validation
**********************************************************************/

DEFAULT FOR IV_START_DATE IS '0001/01/01 00:00:00' (DATE)
DEFAULT FOR IV_END_DATE IS '4712/12/31 00:00:00' (DATE)
DEFAULT FOR IV_ACTUALCHILDBIRTHDATE IS '4712/12/31 00:00:00' (DATE)
DEFAULT FOR IV_MATCHING_DATE IS '4712/12/31 00:00:00' (DATE)

INPUTS ARE IV_START_DATE, IV_END_DATE, IV_ACTUALCHILDBIRTHDATE, IV_MATCHING_DATE

VALID = 'Y'
ERROR_MESSAGE = 'Success'

l_start_date = IV_START_DATE
l_end_date = IV_END_DATE
l_birth_date = IV_ACTUALCHILDBIRTHDATE
l_matching_date = IV_MATCHING_DATE

/* Determine reference date: child birth OR adoption placement */
IF IV_ACTUALCHILDBIRTHDATE WAS NOT DEFAULTED THEN
(
   l_reference_date = l_birth_date
)
ELSE
(
   l_reference_date = l_matching_date
)

/* Rule 1: Leave must be taken within first 2 years */
IF (l_start_date > ADD_MONTHS(l_reference_date, 24)) THEN
(
   VALID = 'N'
   ERROR_CODE = 'W'
   ERROR_MESSAGE = 'HRX:::HRX_IE_PAR_LEAVE_LIMIT'
   RETURN VALID, ERROR_MESSAGE, ERROR_CODE
)

/* Rule 2: Leave must be in full week blocks */
l_days_duration = DAYS_BETWEEN(l_end_date, l_start_date) + 1
IF (MOD(TRUNC(l_days_duration), 7) != 0) THEN
(
   VALID = 'N'
   ERROR_CODE = 'E'
   ERROR_MESSAGE = 'HRX:::HRX_IE_PAR_WK_BLOCKS'
   RETURN VALID, ERROR_MESSAGE, ERROR_CODE
  
)

RETURN VALID

/* End */

/**********************************************************************
FORMULA NAME: ORA_HRX_IE_MAT_VALIDATION
FORMULA TYPE: Global Absence Entry Validation 
DESCRIPTION : IE Maternity Absence Validation
**********************************************************************/

DEFAULT FOR IV_START_DATE IS '0001/01/01 00:00:00' (DATE)
DEFAULT FOR IV_END_DATE IS '4712/12/31 00:00:00' (DATE)
DEFAULT FOR IV_EXPECTEDCHILDBIRTHDATE IS '4712/12/31 00:00:00' (DATE)

INPUTS ARE IV_START_DATE, IV_END_DATE, IV_EXPECTEDCHILDBIRTHDATE

VALID = 'Y'

l_start_date = IV_START_DATE
l_end_date = IV_END_DATE
l_expected_birth_date = IV_EXPECTEDCHILDBIRTHDATE
l_days_duration  = 0

/* Calculate Saturday of birth week */
l_day_of_week = GET_DATE_DAY_OF_WEEK(l_expected_birth_date)
IF(l_day_of_week = 'SUN') THEN
	( l_birth_week_end = ADD_DAYS(l_expected_birth_date, 6))
ELSE IF(l_day_of_week = 'MON') THEN
	(l_birth_week_end = ADD_DAYS(l_expected_birth_date, 5))
ELSE IF (l_day_of_week = 'TUE') THEN
	(l_birth_week_end = ADD_DAYS(l_expected_birth_date, 4))
ELSE IF (l_day_of_week = 'WED') THEN
	(l_birth_week_end = ADD_DAYS(l_expected_birth_date, 3))
ELSE IF (l_day_of_week = 'THU') THEN
	(l_birth_week_end = ADD_DAYS(l_expected_birth_date, 2))
ELSE IF (l_day_of_week = 'FRI') THEN
	(l_birth_week_end = ADD_DAYS(l_expected_birth_date, 1))
ELSE IF (l_day_of_week = 'SAT') THEN
	(l_birth_week_end = l_expected_birth_date)

/* Rule 1: Start date should be at least 2 weeks before end of birth week */
IF(l_start_date > ADD_DAYS(l_birth_week_end, -14)) THEN
(
  VALID = 'N'
  ERROR_CODE = 'W'
  ERROR_MESSAGE = 'HRX:::HRX_IE_ABS_START_DATE_MAT'
  return VALID, ERROR_MESSAGE, ERROR_CODE
)

/* Rule 2: End date should be at least 4 weeks after end of birth week */
IF(l_end_date < ADD_DAYS(l_birth_week_end, 28)) THEN
(
  VALID = 'N'
  ERROR_CODE = 'W'
  ERROR_MESSAGE = 'HRX:::HRX_IE_ABS_END_DATE_MAT'
  return VALID, ERROR_MESSAGE, ERROR_CODE
)

/* Rule 3: Duration must not exceed 294 days (42 weeks) */

l_days_duration = DAYS_BETWEEN(l_end_date ,l_start_date)
IF(l_days_duration > 294) THEN
(
  VALID = 'N'
  ERROR_CODE = 'W'
  ERROR_MESSAGE = 'HRX:::HRX_IE_MAT_DURATION'
  return VALID, ERROR_MESSAGE, ERROR_CODE
)

RETURN VALID

/* End */

id: oracle_ZHRX_KW_REGRESSION ADDSI23 SOCIAL INSURANCE DEDUCTION CONTEXT OVERRIDE
code:
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR ALL_TAX_UNIT_BY_DIR_CARD IS 0
DEFAULT FOR DEDUCTION_CARD_BY_EE IS 0
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR ZHRX_KW_REGRESSION_ADDSI23_DIR_COMP_DIR_CARD_COMP_ID IS 0
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE for KUWAIT_EMPLOYEE_SOCIAL_INSURANCE_DETAILS_DIR_CARD_DIR_CARD_ID is -1
DEFAULT FOR PAY_DIR_COMP_CONTEXT_VALUE1 IS '0'

dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('[ZHRX_KW_REGRESSION_ADDSI23_INVDED_AUTO_INDIRECT] - Entering')

a_ret_ref_code = EMPTY_TEXT_NUMBER
a_ret_cb_id    = EMPTY_NUMBER_NUMBER
a_ret_tu_id    = EMPTY_NUMBER_NUMBER
a_ret_ins_type = EMPTY_TEXT_NUMBER

CHANGE_CONTEXTS(DEDUCTION_CARD_ID = DEDUCTION_CARD_BY_EE) (
    a_comp_id = ZHRX_KW_REGRESSION_ADDSI23_DIR_COMP_DIR_CARD_COMP_ID

  i_idx = a_comp_id.first(-1)
  i_cnt = 0
  WHILE (a_comp_id.exists(i_idx)) LOOP (
    l_comp_id = a_comp_id[i_idx]
    CHANGE_CONTEXTS(DIR_CARD_COMP_ID = l_comp_id) (
      l_ref_code = to_char(l_comp_id)
      l_ins_type = PAY_DIR_COMP_CONTEXT_VALUE1
      i_cb_id = KUWAIT_EMPLOYEE_SOCIAL_INSURANCE_DETAILS_DIR_CARD_DIR_CARD_ID[1]
      i_cnt = i_cnt + 1
      a_ret_ref_code[i_cnt] = l_ref_code
      a_ret_ins_type[i_cnt] = l_ins_type
      a_ret_cb_id[i_cnt] = i_cb_id
    )
    i_idx = a_comp_id.next(i_idx,-1)
  ) /* end while */
  /* ------------------------------
  ** Setup TU for each CB
  ** ------------------------------
  **/
  I = a_ret_cb_id.FIRST(-1)
  WHILE a_ret_cb_id.EXISTS(I) LOOP (
    CHANGE_CONTEXTS(CALC_BREAKDOWN_ID = a_ret_cb_id[I]) (
      a_ret_tu_id[I] =  ALL_TAX_UNIT_BY_DIR_CARD[1]
      dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('[ZHRX_KW_REGRESSION_ADDSI23_INVDED_AUTO_INDIRECT] - Tax Unit Id = '|| to_char(a_ret_tu_id[I]))
    )
    I = a_ret_cb_id.NEXT(I , -1)
  )
)
  A_RETURN_CTX1 = a_ret_cb_id /* standard context */
  A_RETURN_CTX2 = a_ret_ref_code
  A_RETURN_CTX3 = a_ret_tu_id
  A_RETURN_CTX6 = a_ret_ins_type
  dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('[ZHRX_KW_REGRESSION_ADDSI23_INVDED_AUTO_INDIRECT] - Leaving')
  return A_RETURN_CTX1, A_RETURN_CTX2, A_RETURN_CTX3, A_RETURN_CTX6

/*
     Formula Name : ORA_CALL_CALC_VALUE_DATE
     Decription
         This formula performs the call to the CALC_DIR_VALUE_TEXT function
         and convert to a date.
*/
DEFAULT FOR range_low_override is EMPTY_NUMBER_NUMBER
DEFAULT FOR range_high_override is EMPTY_NUMBER_NUMBER
default for value_name is EMPTY_TEXT_NUMBER
default for value_value is EMPTY_TEXT_NUMBER
default for value_datatype is EMPTY_TEXT_NUMBER
INPUTS ARE range,
           range_low_override,
           range_high_override,
           value_name,
           value_value,
           value_datatype

/* Setup the Overrides */
/* This uses the VBC functions as they use the same cache */

  l_dummy = VALUE_CRITERIA_INIT()

  i = 1
  while (i =< value_name.count) loop
  (
     dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('Put Value')
     l_dummy = VALUE_CRITERIA_PUT_VALUE(value_name[i], value_value[i], value_datatype[i])
     i = i + 1
  )

local_range = range

/* Do we have a range overrides. If so validate that
   the arrays match. The create the dynamic range
*/
if ((    range_low_override was defaulted
     and range_high_override was not defaulted)
    or
    (    range_low_override was not defaulted
     and range_high_override was defaulted)
    or
    (    range_low_override.count <> range_high_override.count)
   ) then
     x1 = PAY_LOG_ERROR('PAY_ARRAY_NOT_MATCH')

if (range_high_override was not defaulted) then
(
    rge_name = 'CoreTemp'
    x = DEFINE_RANGE(rge_name)
    counter = 1
    while (counter <= range_high_override.count) loop
    (
        x = DEFINE_RANGE_ITEM(rge_name, range_low_override[counter], range_high_override[counter])
        counter = counter + 1
    )
    out_date_text = CALC_DIR_TEXT_VALUE(local_range)
)
else
(
    out_date_text = CALC_DIR_TEXT_VALUE(local_range)
)
out_date = to_date(out_date_text)
RETURN out_date

RETURN state

a_from[35]  = a_ni_cat['CN']
a_to[1]  = a_ni_cat['LN']
a_to[2]  = a_ni_cat['JN']
a_to[3]  = a_ni_cat['MN']
a_to[4]  = a_ni_cat['FN']
a_to[5]  = a_ni_cat['AN']
a_to[6]  = a_ni_cat['VN']
a_to[7]  = a_ni_cat['FN']
a_to[8]  = a_ni_cat['AN']
a_to[9]  = a_ni_cat['VN']
a_to[10]  = a_ni_cat['JN']
a_to[11]  = a_ni_cat['SN']
a_to[12]  = a_ni_cat['CN']
a_to[13]  = a_ni_cat['SN']
a_to[14]  = a_ni_cat['CN']
a_to[15]  = a_ni_cat['BN']
a_to[16]  = a_ni_cat['FN']
a_to[17]  = a_ni_cat['AN']
a_to[18]  = a_ni_cat['VN']
a_to[19]  = a_ni_cat['SN']
a_to[20]  = a_ni_cat['CN']
a_to[21]  = a_ni_cat['FN']
a_to[22]  = a_ni_cat['AN']
a_to[23]  = a_ni_cat['SN']
a_to[24]  = a_ni_cat['CN']
a_to[25]  = a_ni_cat['VN']
a_to[26]  = a_ni_cat['AN']
a_to[27]  = a_ni_cat['SN']
a_to[28]  = a_ni_cat['CN']
a_to[29]  = a_ni_cat['VN']
a_to[30]  = a_ni_cat['SN']
a_to[31]  = a_ni_cat['CN']
a_to[32]  = a_ni_cat['VN']
a_to[33]  = a_ni_cat['CN']
a_to[34]  = a_ni_cat['VN']
a_to[35]  = a_ni_cat['VN']


idx = a_from.first(-1)
WHILE (a_from.exists(idx)) LOOP
(
  dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('NI Rollup :: Checking LEL :: ' || a_index[a_from[idx]] || ' into ' || a_index[a_to[idx]])
  IF (a_lel_calc[a_from[idx]] <> 0 and a_pt[a_from[idx]] = 0) THEN
  (
    IF (a_lel_calc[a_to[idx]] <> 0 and a_pt[a_to[idx]] <> 0) THEN
    (
       dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('NI Rollup :: LEL ' || a_index[a_from[idx]] || ' into ' || a_index[a_to[idx]])
       a_lel_calc[a_to[idx]] = a_lel_calc[a_to[idx]] + a_lel_calc[a_from[idx]]
       a_lel_calc[a_from[idx]] = 0
       IF (a_lel_calc[a_to[idx]] = i_rate_LEL) THEN 
       (
          a_lel[a_to[idx]] = a_lel_calc[a_to[idx]]
       )
       WSA_SET('GB_NI_LEL_ROLLUP_' || a_index[a_from[idx]] || to_char(i_cb_id), 'Y')
       dummy = PAY_LOG_WARNING('HRX:HRX_GBPC_NI_LEL_ROLLUP','NI_CAT_FROM='||substr(a_index[a_from[idx]],1,1),'NI_CAT_TO='||substr(a_index[a_to[idx]],1,1))
    )
  )
  idx = a_from.next(idx, -1)
)

/* Contrib Rollup is no longer required */

dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('NI Rollup :: Leaving')
return a_lel, a_lel_calc, a_ee_ded, a_er_ded

/*
 * Returns whether the payroll assignment is linked to CIR Component or not.
 *
 * Inputs:
 *   ASG_ID - Payroll Assignment ID
 *
 * Return:
 *   LINK_FLAG - Y:  Linked to CIR Component
 *               N:  Not linked to CIR Component
 */

inputs are ASG_ID (NUMBER)

need_context(DIR_CARD_COMP_ID)

LINK_FLAG = 'N'

i = ALL_ASGS_LINK_TO_DEDUCTION_COMPONENT.first(-1)
while ALL_ASGS_LINK_TO_DEDUCTION_COMPONENT.exists(i) loop
(
  if ASG_ID = ALL_ASGS_LINK_TO_DEDUCTION_COMPONENT[i] then
  (
    LINK_FLAG = 'Y'
    return LINK_FLAG
  )

  i = ALL_ASGS_LINK_TO_DEDUCTION_COMPONENT.next(i, -1)
)

return LINK_FLAG

/*
     Formula Name : ORA_HRX_CA_EAPBR_PER_NI
     Decription
         ...

     Note: ...
*/
DEFAULT FOR PER_PERSON_NID_NUMBER is 'UNDEFINED'
INPUTS ARE is_masked (text)
l_ni            = '000-000-000'

    (

    (

    )
)

*/
RETURN l_ni

/**********************************************************************
Formula Name: CETERA_BEN_RT_END_DATE_INELIG
Formula Type: Rate End Date
Purpose     : To Calculate the Rate End Date for Termination and Ineligible
***********************************************************************/
l_lf_evt_ocrd_dt_char = ben_fn_get_char_value('BEN_PER_IN_LER', 'LF_EVT_OCRD_DT', ' ', ' ', 'BENEFIT_RELATION_NAME', 'DFLT')

if (l_lf_evt_ocrd_dt_char <> 'NA' and l_lf_evt_ocrd_dt_char <> 'NO_DATA_FOUND') then
  l_lf_evt_ocrd_dt = TO_DATE(l_lf_evt_ocrd_dt_char)

l_log_data = ess_log_write('The Life Event Date is '||to_char(l_lf_evt_ocrd_dt, 'MMDDYYYY'))

if l_lf_evt_ocrd_dt = trunc(l_lf_evt_ocrd_dt, 'Month') then
  l_rt_end_date = add_days(l_lf_evt_ocrd_dt, -1)
else
  l_rt_end_date = last_day(l_lf_evt_ocrd_dt)

l_log_data = ess_log_write('The Rate End Date is '||to_char(l_rt_end_date, 'MMDDYYYY'))

return l_rt_end_date

/*******************************************************************
Formula Name: CETERA_BEN_COMP_DATE
Formula Type: Compensation Determination Date
Purpose     : Return the greatest of Latest Hire Date and First of Life Event Year
*******************************************************************/
DEFAULT FOR PER_PER_LATEST_REHIRE_DATE IS '1900/01/01'(date)
DEFAULT FOR BEN_PPL_LF_EVT_OCRD_DT IS '1951/01/01'(date)
DEFAULT FOR BEN_LER_NAME IS 'X'

l_lf_evt_ocrd_dt = BEN_PPL_LF_EVT_OCRD_DT
l_log_data = ess_log_write('The Life Event Date is '||to_char(l_lf_evt_ocrd_dt, 'DD-MON-YYYY'))

if BEN_LER_NAME = 'Legal Employer Change' then
  l_latest_hire_dt = l_lf_evt_ocrd_dt
else
  l_latest_hire_dt = PER_PER_LATEST_REHIRE_DATE

l_log_data = ess_log_write('The Latest PER Hire Date is '||to_char(l_latest_hire_dt, 'DD-MON-YYYY'))

l_lf_evt_boy = trunc(BEN_PPL_LF_EVT_OCRD_DT, 'Year')
l_log_data = ess_log_write('The first day of life event year is '||to_char(l_lf_evt_boy, 'DD-MON-YYYY'))

if l_latest_hire_dt > l_lf_evt_boy then
  L_OUTPUT = l_latest_hire_dt
else
  L_OUTPUT = l_lf_evt_boy

l_log_data = ess_log_write('The Comp Determination Date is '||to_char(L_OUTPUT, 'DD-MON-YYYY'))

return L_OUTPUT

/****************************************************************
FORMULA NAME: CETERA_BEN_GET_TRANSIT_COVERAGE_AMT
FORMULA TYPE: Extra Input
DESCRIPTION : Get GTL Coverage Amount
DISCLAIMER  :
****************************************************************/
DEFAULT FOR BEN_LER_NAME is 'abc '
default for BEN_PLN_NAME is 'none'
default_data_value for BEN_PBB_BNFTS_BAL_NAME_TN IS 'X'
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR BEN_PBB_VAL_NN IS 0

COVERAGE_AMT = 0
l_counter = 1
l_outside_firm_ytd_contr = 0
l_ler_name = BEN_LER_NAME
l_lf_evt_ocrd_dt = to_date(ben_fn_get_char_value('BEN_PER_IN_LER', 'LF_EVT_OCRD_DT', ' ', ' ', 'BENEFIT_RELATION_NAME', 'DFLT'))

if l_ler_name = 'Benefits Administration' OR
   l_ler_name = 'Open' OR
   l_ler_name = 'System Implementation' OR
   l_ler_name = 'Change HSA/Transportation' OR
   l_ler_name = 'Age Changed' OR
   l_ler_name = 'Legal Employer Change' OR
   l_ler_name = 'Birth/Adoption/Guardianship' OR
   l_ler_name = 'Rate/STD Eligibility Check' /* Coverage Starts on the event for these life event */ then
   l_cvg_strt_dt = l_lf_evt_ocrd_dt
else
(
 l_cvg_strt_dt = trunc(l_lf_evt_ocrd_dt, 'Month')
 l_cvg_strt_dt = add_months(l_cvg_strt_dt, 1)
)
/*l_log_data = ess_log_write('The context Date is '||to_char(l_cvg_strt_dt, 'YYYYMMDD'))*/

CHANGE_CONTEXTS(EFFECTIVE_DATE=l_cvg_strt_dt)
(
  if BEN_PLN_NAME = 'Transit' then
  (
    COVERAGE_AMT_txt = ben_fn_get_char_value('BEN_PRTT_ENRT_RSLT', 'BNFT_AMT', 'Transit', 'Elect Coverage')
    /*l_log_data = ess_log_write('The Coverage Amount is '||COVERAGE_AMT_txt)*/
    
    if COVERAGE_AMT_txt != 'NO_DATA_FOUND' AND
       COVERAGE_AMT_txt != 'N' then
      COVERAGE_AMT = to_number(COVERAGE_AMT_txt)
    else
      COVERAGE_AMT = 0
  )

  /* Add the Outside Firm Contributions only if the life event is in 2015 */
  if l_lf_evt_ocrd_dt < to_date('01/01/2016', 'MM/DD/YYYY') then
  (
    while BEN_PBB_BNFTS_BAL_NAME_TN.exists(l_counter)
    loop
    (
      IF BEN_PBB_BNFTS_BAL_NAME_TN[l_counter] = 'Transit Contributions at Outside Firm' THEN
      (
        l_outside_firm_ytd_contr = BEN_PBB_VAL_NN[l_counter]
        exit
      )
      l_counter = l_counter + 1
    )
  )
)

COVERAGE_AMT = COVERAGE_AMT + l_outside_firm_ytd_contr

return COVERAGE_AMT

l_paytype (Text) = 'Calendar Month'

/****************************************************************
FORMULA NAME: CETERA_BEN_GET_DEPENDENT_FSA_COVERAGE_AMT
FORMULA TYPE: Extra Input
DESCRIPTION : Get Dep FSA Coverage Amount
DISCLAIMER  :
****************************************************************/
DEFAULT FOR BEN_LER_NAME is 'abc '
default for BEN_PLN_NAME is 'none'
default_data_value for BEN_PBB_BNFTS_BAL_NAME_TN IS 'X'
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR BEN_PBB_VAL_NN IS 0

COVERAGE_AMT = 0
l_counter = 1
l_outside_firm_ytd_contr = 0
l_ler_name = BEN_LER_NAME
l_lf_evt_ocrd_dt = to_date(ben_fn_get_char_value('BEN_PER_IN_LER', 'LF_EVT_OCRD_DT', ' ', ' ', 'BENEFIT_RELATION_NAME', 'DFLT'))

if l_ler_name = 'Benefits Administration' OR
   l_ler_name = 'Open' OR
   l_ler_name = 'System Implementation' OR
   l_ler_name = 'Change HSA/Transportation' OR
   l_ler_name = 'Age Changed' OR
   l_ler_name = 'Legal Employer Change' OR
   l_ler_name = 'Birth/Adoption/Guardianship' OR
   l_ler_name = 'Rate/STD Eligibility Check' /* Coverage Starts on the event for these life event */ then
   l_cvg_strt_dt = l_lf_evt_ocrd_dt
else
(
 l_cvg_strt_dt = trunc(l_lf_evt_ocrd_dt, 'Month')
 l_cvg_strt_dt = add_months(l_cvg_strt_dt, 1)
)
/*l_log_data = ess_log_write('The context Date is '||to_char(l_cvg_strt_dt, 'YYYYMMDD'))*/

CHANGE_CONTEXTS(EFFECTIVE_DATE=l_cvg_strt_dt)
(
  if BEN_PLN_NAME = 'Dependent Care FSA' then
  (
    COVERAGE_AMT_txt = ben_fn_get_char_value('BEN_PRTT_ENRT_RSLT', 'BNFT_AMT', 'Dependent Care FSA', 'Elect Coverage')
    /*l_log_data = ess_log_write('The Coverage Amount is '||COVERAGE_AMT_txt)*/
    
    if COVERAGE_AMT_txt != 'NO_DATA_FOUND' AND
       COVERAGE_AMT_txt != 'N' then
      COVERAGE_AMT = to_number(COVERAGE_AMT_txt)
    else
      COVERAGE_AMT = 0
  )

  /* Add the Outside Firm Contributions only if the life event is in 2015 */
  if l_lf_evt_ocrd_dt < to_date('01/01/2016', 'MM/DD/YYYY') then
  (
    while BEN_PBB_BNFTS_BAL_NAME_TN.exists(l_counter)
    loop
    (
      IF BEN_PBB_BNFTS_BAL_NAME_TN[l_counter] = 'Dependent Care FSA Contributions at Outside Firm' THEN
      (
        l_outside_firm_ytd_contr = BEN_PBB_VAL_NN[l_counter]
        exit
      )
      l_counter = l_counter + 1
    )
  )
)

COVERAGE_AMT = COVERAGE_AMT + l_outside_firm_ytd_contr

return COVERAGE_AMT

/*******************************************
FORMULA Name : CETERA_BEN_SPDP_SUPP_LIFE_INTERIM_CVG
FORMULA TYPE : Default to Assign Pending Action
********************************************/
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR BEN_EPE_ELIG_PER_ELCTBL_CHC_ID_NN is 0 
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR BEN_EPE_PL_NAME_TN is 'WAIVE' 
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR BEN_EPE_CRNTLY_ENRD_FLAG_TN is 'N'
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR BEN_EPE_OPT_NAME_TN is 'Option'
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR BEN_EPE_CVRD_FLAG_TN is 'N'

/* initialization */ 
L_ELIG_PER_ELCTBL_CHC_ID=345
i=1
l_int = 1
l_cvrd=1

/*main()*/ 
while (BEN_EPE_ELIG_PER_ELCTBL_CHC_ID_NN.exists(i)) loop
(

 if ( (BEN_EPE_PL_NAME_TN[i]='Spouse/DP Supplemental Life') and (BEN_EPE_OPT_NAME_TN[i]='Waive Coverage') )then
  (L_TEMP_ID[1]=BEN_EPE_ELIG_PER_ELCTBL_CHC_ID_NN[i]
  )
 else if ( (BEN_EPE_PL_NAME_TN[i]='Spouse/DP Supplemental Life') and (BEN_EPE_OPT_NAME_TN[i]='$20,000') )then
  (L_TEMP_ID[2]=BEN_EPE_ELIG_PER_ELCTBL_CHC_ID_NN[i]
  )
 else if ( (BEN_EPE_PL_NAME_TN[i]='Spouse/DP Supplemental Life') and (BEN_EPE_OPT_NAME_TN[i]='$40,000') )then
  (L_TEMP_ID[3]=BEN_EPE_ELIG_PER_ELCTBL_CHC_ID_NN[i]
  )
 else if ( (BEN_EPE_PL_NAME_TN[i]='Spouse/DP Supplemental Life') and (BEN_EPE_OPT_NAME_TN[i]='$60,000') )then
  (L_TEMP_ID[4]=BEN_EPE_ELIG_PER_ELCTBL_CHC_ID_NN[i]
  )
 else if ( (BEN_EPE_PL_NAME_TN[i]='Spouse/DP Supplemental Life') and (BEN_EPE_OPT_NAME_TN[i]='$80,000') )then
  (L_TEMP_ID[5]=BEN_EPE_ELIG_PER_ELCTBL_CHC_ID_NN[i]
  )
 else if ( (BEN_EPE_PL_NAME_TN[i]='Spouse/DP Supplemental Life') and (BEN_EPE_OPT_NAME_TN[i]='$100,000') )then
  (L_TEMP_ID[6]=BEN_EPE_ELIG_PER_ELCTBL_CHC_ID_NN[i]
  )
  
 if (BEN_EPE_CVRD_FLAG_TN[i] = 'Y' ) then 
 (
   if ( (BEN_EPE_PL_NAME_TN[i]='Spouse/DP Supplemental Life') and (BEN_EPE_OPT_NAME_TN[i]='Waive Coverage') )then
   (l_cvrd=1)
   else if ( (BEN_EPE_PL_NAME_TN[i]='Spouse/DP Supplemental Life') and (BEN_EPE_OPT_NAME_TN[i]='$20,000') )then
   (l_cvrd=2)
   else if ( (BEN_EPE_PL_NAME_TN[i]='Spouse/DP Supplemental Life') and (BEN_EPE_OPT_NAME_TN[i]='$40,000') )then
   (l_cvrd=3)
   else if ( (BEN_EPE_PL_NAME_TN[i]='Spouse/DP Supplemental Life') and (BEN_EPE_OPT_NAME_TN[i]='$60,000') )then
   (l_cvrd=4)
   else if ( (BEN_EPE_PL_NAME_TN[i]='Spouse/DP Supplemental Life') and (BEN_EPE_OPT_NAME_TN[i]='$80,000') )then
   (l_cvrd=5)
   else if ( (BEN_EPE_PL_NAME_TN[i]='Spouse/DP Supplemental Life') and (BEN_EPE_OPT_NAME_TN[i]='$100,000') )then
   (l_cvrd=6)  
  ) /* end if cvrd flag */

  /* increment the counter */
  i=i+1
) /* end loop */

if l_cvrd >= 2 then 
(
  l_int = 2
) 
else if l_cvrd < 2 then
( 
  l_int = l_cvrd
) 

L_ELIG_PER_ELCTBL_CHC_ID=L_TEMP_ID[l_int]

return L_ELIG_PER_ELCTBL_CHC_ID

/****************************************************************
FORMULA NAME: CETERA_BEN_SUPP_PA_COVERAGE_LIMIT
FORMULA TYPE: Coverage Upper Limit
DESCRIPTION : To determine coverage Limit for Supplemental PA Options
DISCLAIMER  :
*****************************************************************/
DEFAULT FOR BEN_PIL_LF_EVT_OCRD_DT is '1950/01/01 00:00:00'(date)
DEFAULT FOR BEN_LER_NAME is 'abc '
DEFAULT FOR BEN_OPT_NAME is 'abc '
DEFAULT for CMP_ASSIGNMENT_SALARY_AMOUNT is 0
DEFAULT for CMP_ASSIGNMENT_SALARY_ANNUALIZATION_FACTOR is 0
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE for BEN_PBB_BNFTS_BAL_NAME_TN IS 'X'
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR BEN_PBB_VAL_NN IS 0
DEFAULT FOR PER_PER_LATEST_REHIRE_DATE IS '4712/12/31'(date)

l_lf_evt_ocrd_dt = BEN_PIL_LF_EVT_OCRD_DT
l_comp_calc_date = trunc(l_lf_evt_ocrd_dt, 'Year')
l_ler_name = BEN_LER_NAME
l_option_name = BEN_OPT_NAME
l_cvg_strt_dt = l_lf_evt_ocrd_dt
l_annual_salary = 0
l_counter = 1
l_elig_earn = 0
l_bnft_bal = 0
l_life_limit = 0
l_gtl_bnft_amt = 0
l_cvg_amt = 0
L_MX_CVG_ALWD_AMT = 0

if l_ler_name = 'Legal Employer Change' then
  l_latest_hire_dt = l_lf_evt_ocrd_dt
else
  l_latest_hire_dt = PER_PER_LATEST_REHIRE_DATE
l_log_data = ess_log_write('Supp PA Coverage - The greatest PER Hire Date is '||to_char(l_latest_hire_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD'))
ret = HR_TRACE ('Supp PA Coverage - The greatest PER Hire Date is '||to_char(l_latest_hire_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD'))

/* If Employee is hired mid-year, use the Hire Date to calculate compensation */
if l_latest_hire_dt > l_comp_calc_date then
  l_comp_calc_date = l_latest_hire_dt
l_log_data = ess_log_write('The Comp Calc Date is '||to_char(l_comp_calc_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD'))
ret = hr_trace('The Comp Calc Date is '||to_char(l_comp_calc_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD'))

CHANGE_CONTEXTS(EFFECTIVE_DATE=l_comp_calc_date)
(
  /* Capture Annual Salary */
  l_annual_salary = CMP_ASSIGNMENT_SALARY_AMOUNT * CMP_ASSIGNMENT_SALARY_ANNUALIZATION_FACTOR
  l_log_data = ess_log_write('The Annual Salary is '||to_char(l_annual_salary))
  ret = hr_trace('The Annual Salary is '||to_char(l_annual_salary))

  /* Get Benefits Eligible Earnings from Balances */
  while BEN_PBB_BNFTS_BAL_NAME_TN.exists(l_counter)
  loop
  (
    IF BEN_PBB_BNFTS_BAL_NAME_TN[l_counter] = 'Cetera Benefits Eligible Earnings' THEN
    (
      l_bnft_bal = BEN_PBB_VAL_NN[l_counter]
      l_log_data = ess_log_write('SUPP PA '||l_option_name||' Max Cvg: The Eligible Comp from Benefit Balance is '||to_char(l_bnft_bal))
      ret = hr_trace('SUPP PA '||l_option_name||' Max Cvg: The Eligible Comp from Benefit Balance is '||to_char(l_bnft_bal))
      exit
    )
    l_counter= l_counter + 1
  )

  if l_bnft_bal > 0 then
    l_elig_earn = l_bnft_bal
  else
    l_elig_earn = l_annual_salary

  l_log_data = ess_log_write('The Eligible Compensation is '||to_char(l_elig_earn))
  ret = hr_trace('The Eligible Compensation is '||to_char(l_elig_earn))

  BEN_TABLE = 'CETERA_BENEFIT_LIMITS'
  BEN_TABLE_COLUMN = 'GTL_COVERAGE_LIMIT'
  BEN_ROW_VALUE = 'GTL_COVERAGE_LIMIT'
  l_life_limit = to_num(get_table_value( BEN_TABLE, BEN_TABLE_COLUMN, BEN_ROW_VALUE))
  l_log_data = ess_log_Write('The Life Limit from table is '||to_char(l_life_limit))
  ret = hr_trace('The Life Limit from table is '||to_char(l_life_limit))
)

IF MOD(l_elig_earn, 1000) = 0 THEN
  l_1times =  l_elig_earn
ELSE
  l_1times =  (FLOOR(l_elig_earn/1000)+1)*1000

if l_option_name = '1 * Compensation' then
  l_cvg_amt = l_elig_earn
if l_option_name = '2 * Compensation' then
  l_cvg_amt = 2*l_elig_earn
if l_option_name = '3 * Compensation' then
  l_cvg_amt = 3*l_elig_earn
if l_option_name = '4 * Compensation' then
  l_cvg_amt = 4*l_elig_earn
if l_option_name = '5 * Compensation' then
  l_cvg_amt = 5*l_elig_earn

/* Round Coverage to the Next Thousand */
if mod(l_cvg_amt, 1000) = 0 then
  l_cvg_amt = l_cvg_amt
else
  if l_cvg_amt > 0 then
    l_cvg_amt = TRUNC(l_cvg_amt/1000)*1000+1000
  else
    l_cvg_amt = 0

/*l_cvg_amt = l_cvg_amt + l_1times*/

  l_log_data = ess_log_write('The Coverage amount before limit applied is '||to_char(l_cvg_amt))
  ret = hr_trace('The Coverage amount before limit applied is '||to_char(l_cvg_amt))

  if l_cvg_amt +l_1times> l_life_limit then
    l_cvg_amt = l_life_limit - l_1times

  l_log_data = ess_log_write('The Coverage amount after limit applied is '||to_char(l_cvg_amt))
  ret = hr_trace('The Coverage amount after limit applied is '||to_char(l_cvg_amt))

  /*if l_cvg_amt < 0 then
    l_cvg_amt = 0*/

  l_log_data = ess_log_write('The final coverage amount is '||to_char(l_cvg_amt))
  ret = hr_trace('The final coverage amount is '||to_char(l_cvg_amt))

  L_MX_CVG_ALWD_AMT = l_cvg_amt

return L_MX_CVG_ALWD_AMT

/****************************************************************
FORMULA NAME: CETERA_BEN_DEPCARE_FSA_MAX_COVERAGE
FORMULA TYPE: Coverage Upper Limit
DESCRIPTION : To determine coverage limit for Dependent Care FSA
DISCLAIMER  :
*****************************************************************/
DEFAULT FOR BEN_PIL_LF_EVT_OCRD_DT is '1950/01/01 00:00:00'(date)
default_data_value for BEN_PBB_BNFTS_BAL_NAME_TN IS 'X'
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR BEN_PBB_VAL_NN IS 0

l_lf_evt_ocrd_dt = BEN_PIL_LF_EVT_OCRD_DT
i = 1
l_outside_firm_ytd_contr = 0

if l_lf_evt_ocrd_dt < to_date('01/01/2016', 'mm/dd/yyyy') then
(
  CHANGE_CONTEXTS(EFFECTIVE_DATE = l_lf_evt_ocrd_dt)
  (
    BEN_TABLE = 'CETERA_BENEFIT_LIMITS'
    BEN_TABLE_COLUMN = 'DEPENDENT_CARE_FSA'

    BEN_ROW_VALUE = 'ANNUAL'
    L_MX_CVG_ALWD_AMT = to_num(get_table_value( BEN_TABLE, BEN_TABLE_COLUMN, BEN_ROW_VALUE))

    while BEN_PBB_BNFTS_BAL_NAME_TN.exists(i)
    loop
    (
      IF BEN_PBB_BNFTS_BAL_NAME_TN[i] = 'Dependent Care FSA Contributions at Outside Firm' THEN
      (
        l_outside_firm_ytd_contr = BEN_PBB_VAL_NN[i]
        exit
      )
      i=i+1
    )
  )
)
L_MX_CVG_ALWD_AMT = L_MX_CVG_ALWD_AMT - l_outside_firm_ytd_contr

/*l_log_data = ess_log_write('In CETERA_BEN_DEPCARE_FSA_MAX_COVERAGE, The Annual limit and YTD Balance are '||to_char(L_MX_CVG_ALWD_AMT)||' and '||TO_char(l_outside_firm_ytd_contr))*/

return L_MX_CVG_ALWD_AMT

/****************************************************************
FORMULA NAME : MOL_BEN_VOL_EE_LIFE_CVG_MAX_FF
FORMULA TYPE : Coverage Upper Limit
DESCRIPTION  : Fast formula to determine the maximum coverage for Voluntary Employee Life Insurance Plan  
               
*****************************************************************
Change History:
Name                   Date              Description
-----------------------------------------------------------------
Somasundaram N         21-May-2015        Initial Version
****************************************************************/
DEFAULT FOR CMP_ASSIGNMENT_SALARY_AMOUNT IS 0
DEFAULT FOR CMP_ASSIGNMENT_SALARY_ANNUALIZATION_FACTOR IS 0

L_MX_CVG_ALWD_AMT = LEAST(6* CMP_ASSIGNMENT_SALARY_AMOUNT * CMP_ASSIGNMENT_SALARY_ANNUALIZATION_FACTOR, 300000)

RETURN L_MX_CVG_ALWD_AMT

/*****************************************************************
FORMULA NAME: CETERA_BEN_PARKING_CVG_UPPER_LIMIT
FORMULA TYPE: Coverage Upper Limit
DESCRIPTION : Coverage upper limit for Parking Plan 
DISCLAIMER  :
*****************************************************************/
DEFAULT FOR BEN_PIL_LF_EVT_OCRD_DT is '1951/01/01 00:00:00'(date)
DEFAULT FOR BEN_LER_NAME is 'abc '

l_lf_evt_ocrd_dt = BEN_PIL_LF_EVT_OCRD_DT
l_ler_name = BEN_LER_NAME
l_parking_limit = 0

/* Derive the Coverage Start Date */
if l_ler_name = 'Benefits Administration' OR
   l_ler_name = 'Open' OR
   l_ler_name = 'System Implementation' OR
   l_ler_name = 'Change HSA/Transportation' OR
   l_ler_name = 'Age Changed' OR
   l_ler_name = 'Legal Employer Change' OR
   l_ler_name = 'Birth/Adoption/Guardianship' OR
   l_ler_name = 'Rate/STD Eligibility Check' /* Coverage Starts on the event for these life event */ then
   l_cvg_strt_dt = l_lf_evt_ocrd_dt
else
(
 l_cvg_strt_dt = trunc(l_lf_evt_ocrd_dt, 'Month')
 l_cvg_strt_dt = add_months(l_cvg_strt_dt, 1)
)
/*l_log_data = ess_log_write('PARKING UPPER LIMIT: The Cvg Strt Dt is '||to_char(l_cvg_strt_dt, 'MM/DD/YYYY'))*/

CHANGE_CONTEXTS(EFFECTIVE_DATE = l_cvg_strt_dt)
(
  l_orgnl_enrt_dt_char = ben_fn_get_char_value('BEN_PRTT_ENRT_RSLT', 'ORGNL_ENRT_DT', 'Parking', 'Elect Coverage')
  /*l_log_data = ess_log_write('PARKING UPPER LIMIT: The Original Enrolment Date from Function is '||l_orgnl_enrt_dt_char)*/
)

if l_orgnl_enrt_dt_char <> 'N' and l_orgnl_enrt_dt_char <> ' ' and l_orgnl_enrt_dt_char <> 'NO_DATA_FOUND' then
  l_orgnl_enrt_dt = to_date(l_orgnl_enrt_dt_char)
else
  l_orgnl_enrt_dt = l_cvg_strt_dt

/*l_log_data = ess_log_write('PARKING UPPER LIMIT: The ORGNL_ENRT_DT is '||to_char(l_orgnl_enrt_dt, 'MM/DD/YYYY'))*/

/*Getting the number of months between the Original enrolment date and End of year including the month on which the election was made*/
l_months_remaining = 12 - to_number(to_char(l_orgnl_enrt_dt, 'mm')) + 1
/*l_log_data = ess_log_write('PARKING UPPER LIMIT: The No. of months remaining is '||to_char(l_months_remaining))*/

CHANGE_CONTEXTS(EFFECTIVE_DATE = l_cvg_strt_dt)
(
  BEN_TABLE = 'CETERA_BENEFIT_LIMITS'
  BEN_COLUMN_VALUE = 'PARKING'
  BEN_ROW_VALUE = 'MONTHLY'

  l_PARKING_limit = to_number(get_table_value(BEN_TABLE, BEN_COLUMN_VALUE, BEN_ROW_VALUE))
  /*l_log_data = ess_log_write('PARKING UPPER LIMIT: The Monthly Limit is '||to_char(l_PARKING_limit))*/
)

L_MX_CVG_ALWD_AMT = l_months_remaining * l_PARKING_limit
/*l_log_data = ess_log_write('PARKING UPPER LIMIT: The Coverage Limit is '||to_char(L_MX_CVG_ALWD_AMT))*/

return L_MX_CVG_ALWD_AMT

---------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
L_MN_CVG_RQD_AMT=5000
L_MX_CVG_ALWD_AMT=150000
L_MX_CVG_WCFN_AMT=500000
L_MX_CVG_INCR_ALWD_AMT=0
L_MX_CVG_INCR_WCF_ALWD_AMT=500000

L_MX_CVG_ALWD_AMT=0
L_MX_CVG_INCR_ALWD_AMT=0
 
Return L_MN_CVG_RQD_AMT, L_MX_CVG_ALWD_AMT, L_MX_CVG_WCFN_AMT, L_MX_CVG_INCR_ALWD_AMT, 
 
L_MX_CVG_INCR_WCF_ALWD_AMT

/* ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Formula Name: AB_BEN_SUPPLIFE_EMP_CVG_LIMITOE
Formula Type: Coverage Amount Limit for 1st Open Enrollment
---------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
L_MN_CVG_RQD_AMT=5000
L_MX_CVG_ALWD_AMT=150000
L_MX_CVG_WCFN_AMT=500000
L_MX_CVG_INCR_ALWD_AMT=0
L_MX_CVG_INCR_WCF_ALWD_AMT=500000
 
l_abc_bnft_amt_char='NA'
l_abc_bnft_amt_nn=0
 
/* Check if the person is enrolled into the plan */
l_abc_cert_enrld=ben_fn_get_char_value(
                                  'BEN_PRTT_ENRT_RSLT'
                                  ,'ENROLLED' 
                                  ,'Employee Supplemental Life'
                                  ,'Elect'
                                  )
 
if (l_abc_cert_enrld='Y') then 
(
/* If enrolled get the benfit amount */
l_abc_bnft_amt_char=ben_fn_get_char_value(
                                  'BEN_PRTT_ENRT_RSLT'
                                  ,'BNFT_AMT' 
                                  ,'Employee Supplemental Life'
                                  ,'Elect'
                                  )
/*Check for erroneous benefit amount values and convert the char to number */
if ( l_abc_bnft_amt_char <> 'NA' and l_abc_bnft_amt_char <> ' ') then
  (l_abc_bnft_amt_nn=to_number(l_abc_bnft_amt_char))
)
 
if l_abc_bnft_amt_nn >= 150000 then 
(
/* Condition 1: If person has already enrolled into a coverage value > 150K in a past life event
then any increase in coverage should result in suspension*/ 
L_MX_CVG_INCR_ALWD_AMT=10000
)
else
(
/* Condition 2: If person has already enrolled into a coverage value < 150K in a past life event
then he is allowed to increase his coverage by at the most 10K. Anything beyond 10K would 
result in suspension. */ 
if l_abc_bnft_amt_nn = 145000
   then
   (L_MX_CVG_INCR_ALWD_AMT=10000)
else
   (L_MX_CVG_INCR_ALWD_AMT=10000)
)

if l_abc_bnft_amt_nn = 0
 then (L_MX_CVG_ALWD_AMT=0
       L_MX_CVG_INCR_ALWD_AMT=0)
 
Return L_MN_CVG_RQD_AMT, L_MX_CVG_ALWD_AMT, L_MX_CVG_WCFN_AMT, L_MX_CVG_INCR_ALWD_AMT, 
 
L_MX_CVG_INCR_WCF_ALWD_AMT

L_MX_CVG_WCFN_AMT=500000
L_MX_CVG_INCR_ALWD_AMT=500000
L_MX_CVG_INCR_WCF_ALWD_AMT=500000
  
Return L_MN_CVG_RQD_AMT, L_MX_CVG_ALWD_AMT, L_MX_CVG_WCFN_AMT, L_MX_CVG_INCR_ALWD_AMT, 
 
L_MX_CVG_INCR_WCF_ALWD_AMT

                                  )
/*Check for erroneous benefit amount values and convert the char to number */
if ( l_abc_bnft_amt_char <> 'NA' and l_abc_bnft_amt_char <> ' ') then
  (l_abc_bnft_amt_nn=to_number(l_abc_bnft_amt_char))
)
 
if l_abc_bnft_amt_nn >= 10000 then 
(
/* Condition 1: If person has already enrolled into a coverage value > 25K in a past life event
then any increase in coverage should result in suspension*/ 
L_MX_CVG_INCR_ALWD_AMT=0
)
else
(
/* Condition 2: If person has already enrolled into a coverage value < 25K in a past life event
then he is allowed to increase his coverage by at the most 5K. Anything beyond 5K would 
result in suspension. */ 
L_MX_CVG_INCR_ALWD_AMT=0
)

if l_abc_bnft_amt_nn = 0
 then (L_MX_CVG_ALWD_AMT=0
       L_MX_CVG_INCR_ALWD_AMT=0)

/* *****************************************************************************
FORMULA NAME: AB_BEN_SUPPLIFE_NEWELIG_DUEDT
FORMULA TYPE: Action type due date
DESCRIPTION: Calculate the waiting period and return 30 days after as due date.
Change History:
Name Date Comments
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Zach Betts 5-Nov-2013 Initial Version
******************************************************************************************************* */
l_eff_date (date)= GET_CONTEXT(EFFECTIVE_DATE,TO_DATE('1951/01/01 00:00:00') )

l_30days_dt (date) = add_days(l_eff_date,30)

/* ** Start Change v 1.1 */
l_first_dt (date) = to_date ( '01'|| to_char ( l_30days_dt, 'MMYYYY'),'DDMMYYYY')

IF ( l_first_dt <> l_30days_dt )          /* If Hire Date + 30 days is not the 1st of month */
THEN
    (
        l_last_dt (date)= last_day(l_30days_dt)
        l_wait_stdt (date) = add_days(l_last_dt,1)
    )
ELSE
    (
        l_wait_stdt =   l_30days_dt
    )
/* ** End Change v 1.1 */

l_due_date = add_days(l_wait_stdt,31)

return l_due_date

/* *****************************************************************************
FORMULA NAME: AB_BEN_SUPPLIFE_NEWHIRE_DUEDT
FORMULA TYPE: Action type due date
DESCRIPTION: Calculate the waiting period and return 30 days after as due date.
Change History:
Name Date Comments
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Zach Betts 5-Nov-2013 Initial Version
******************************************************************************************************* */
default for PER_PER_START_DATE is '1951/01/01 00:00:00'(date)
l_strt_dt (date) = PER_PER_START_DATE
l_due_date (date) = PER_PER_START_DATE

l_30days_dt (date) = add_days(l_strt_dt,30)

/* ** Start Change v 1.1 */
l_first_dt (date) = to_date ( '01'|| to_char ( l_30days_dt, 'MMYYYY'),'DDMMYYYY')

IF ( l_first_dt <> l_30days_dt )          /* If Hire Date + 30 days is not the 1st of month */
THEN
    (
        l_last_dt (date)= last_day(l_30days_dt)
        l_wait_stdt (date) = add_days(l_last_dt,1)
    )
ELSE
    (
        l_wait_stdt =   l_30days_dt
    )
/* ** End Change v 1.1 */

l_due_date = add_days(l_wait_stdt,31)

return l_due_date

/* *****************************************************************************
FORMULA NAME: AB_BEN_NEW_HIRE_RATE_START_NONFSA
FORMULA TYPE: Rate Start Date
DESCRIPTION: The fast formula will determine the rate start date based on the life event date and new hire waiting period
Change History:
Name        Date        Comments
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Sarvesh K B 11-Nov-2013 Version 1.0
ZBETTS          25-FEB-2014 Version 2.0 - Resolve issue with Start Date DBI error when processing rehire or contact hired
******************************************************************************************************* */
/* DEFAULT FOR PER_PER_START_DATE IS '1951/01/01 00:00:00'(DATE)  - Removed 25-Feb-2014 */

DEFAULT FOR PER_ASG_REL_DATE_START IS '1951/01/01 00:00:00'(DATE)

l_strt_dt (DATE) = PER_ASG_REL_DATE_START
l_strt_dt_return (DATE) = TO_DATE('01/01/1951','MM/DD/YYYY')

EXECUTE ( 'AB_BEN_ELIG_WAIT_NEWHIRE') 
l_wait_perd_val ( NUMBER )  = GET_OUTPUT ('WAIT_PERD_VAL', 0)

IF ( l_wait_perd_val  > 0)
THEN
    (
        l_wait_perd_uom ( TEXT )  = GET_OUTPUT ('WAIT_PERD_UOM', 'NA')
        IF ( l_wait_perd_uom = 'DY' )
        THEN
            (
            l_cvg_strt_dt (DATE)  = add_days ( l_strt_dt, l_wait_perd_val )
            )
    )

  l_strt_dt_return  =   l_cvg_strt_dt
  
 RETURN l_strt_dt_return

/******************************************************************************
FORMULA NAME: ANCDEVONLY_LINKAGE_EXLUSION
FORMULA TYPE: Global Absence Linkage Exclusion
DESCRIPTION: This formula returns exclusion flag as Y if absence duration is 
less than 4 days (calendar days)
Change History:
Name Date Version Comments
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Oracle 09-Aug-2015 DRAFT 1A Initial Version
*******************************************************************************/
DEFAULT FOR IV_START_DATE IS '4712/12/31 00:00:00' (date)
DEFAULT FOR IV_END_DATE IS '4712/12/31 00:00:00' (date)

INPUTS ARE IV_START_DATE (date), IV_END_DATE (date)
EXCLUDE = 'N'

r = ' '

IF ((DAYS_BETWEEN(TRUNC(IV_END_DATE), TRUNC(IV_START_DATE)) + 1) < 4)
THEN
(
	EXCLUDE = 'Y'

	r = ESS_LOG_WRITE('EXCLUDING THIS ABS...Days between is ' + to_char((DAYS_BETWEEN(TRUNC(IV_END_DATE), TRUNC(IV_START_DATE))+1)))
	r = ess_log_write('IV_START_DATE: ' + to_char (TRUNC(IV_START_DATE))) 
	r = ess_log_write('IV_END_DATE: ' + to_char (TRUNC(IV_END_DATE))) 
)

r = ESS_LOG_WRITE('EXCLUDE Result: ' + EXCLUDE)

RETURN EXCLUDE

/* check if employee enrolled into this plan or not */

/*=========== DATABASE ITEM DEFAULTS BEGIN =====================*/ 
DEFAULT for PER_ASG_REL_ORIGINAL_DATE_OF_HIRE is '4712/12/31 00:00:00' (date) 
DEFAULT FOR PER_ASG_NORMAL_HOURS IS 40 DEFAULT for IV_ACCRUAL is 0 
DEFAULT for IV_CEILING is 0 
DEFAULT for IV_CARRYOVER is 0 
DEFAULT for IV_CALEDARSTARTDATE is '4712/12/31 00:00:00' (date) 
DEFAULT for IV_CALEDARENDDATE is '4712/12/31 00:00:00' (date) 
DEFAULT for IV_ACCRUALPERIODSTARTDATE is '4712/12/31 00:00:00' (date) 
DEFAULT for IV_ACCRUALPERIODENDDATE is '4712/12/31 00:00:00' (date) 
DEFAULT for ANC_ABS_PLN_NAME is 'A' 
DEFAULT for ANC_ABS_PLN_PLAN_UOM is 'H' 
DEFAULT for adjustmentvalues is EMPTY_NUMBER_NUMBER 
DEFAULT for adjustmentdates is EMPTY_DATE_NUMBER 
DEFAULT for adjustmenttypes is EMPTY_TEXT_NUMBER 
DEFAULT for IV_EVENT_DATES is EMPTY_DATE_NUMBER 
DEFAULT for L_VALUES is EMPTY_NUMBER_NUMBER 
/*=========== DATABASE ITEM DEFAULTS ENDS======================*/ 
Inputs are IV_ACCRUAL, IV_CEILING, IV_CARRYOVER, IV_CALEDARSTARTDATE (DATE), IV_CALEDARENDDATE (DATE), IV_ACCRUALPERIODSTARTDATE (DATE), IV_ACCRUALPERIODENDDATE (DATE), IV_EVENT_DATES, IV_ACCRUAL_VALUES
/*================ FORMULA SECTION BEGIN =======================*/
l_no_of_days=days_BETWEEN(GET_CONTEXT(EFFECTIVE_DATE,'4712/12/31 00:00:00' (date)),PER_ASG_REL_ORIGINAL_DATE_OF_HIRE)
l_length_of_service=(l_no_of_days/365) l_month=to_char(GET_CONTEXT(EFFECTIVE_DATE,'4712/12/31 00:00:00' (date)), 'mm') 

accrual = IV_ACCRUAL 
ceiling = IV_CEILING 
carryover=IV_CARRYOVER 
adjustment=0 

l_no_of_days_in_current_fte = 365 
prev_fte = 1.0 
current_fte = 1.0 
k = IV_EVENT_DATES.FIRST(-1) WHILE IV_EVENT_DATES.EXISTS(K) LOOP
 ( 
    if ( (k >1) and (IV_EVENT_DATES[k] != IV_CALEDARSTARTDATE) and (IV_EVENT_DATES[k] >= IV_ACCRUALPERIODSTARTDATE) and (IV_EVENT_DATES[k] <=IV_ACCRUALPERIODENDDATE)) then 
        (
          l_prev_date = add_days(IV_EVENT_DATES[k], -1) 
          change_contexts(EFFECTIVE_DATE=l_prev_date) 
           (
             prev_fte = PER_ASG_NORMAL_HOURS/40 
           )
          change_contexts(EFFECTIVE_DATE=IV_ACCRUALPERIODENDDATE) 
            ( 
              current_fte = PER_ASG_NORMAL_HOURS/40
            ) 
         adjustmentvalues[k]= l_no_of_days_in_current_fte*accrual*(current_fte -prev_fte)/365 
         adjustmentdates[k]= IV_EVENT_DATES[k] 
         adjustmenttypes[k]='FTEADJ' 
        )
      k = IV_EVENT_DATES.NEXT(k, -1) 
   ) 

return accrual,ceiling,carryover,adjustmentvalues,adjustmentdates,adjustmenttypes

DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR HWM_PUB_HOLIDAY_DATE_SOURCE               IS  '--NULL--'
