DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR HWM_PUB_HOLIDAY_END_TIME                 IS  '01-JAN-1900'(DATE) 

INPUTS ARE RefStartDate(date), RefEndDate(date)


ffs_id       = GET_CONTEXT(HWM_FFS_ID, 0)
rule_id      = GET_CONTEXT(HWM_RULE_ID, 0)

/*Find the bank holiday begin*/
 
 OUT_HOLIDAY_COUNT = 0
 start_date_override  = RefStartDate
 end_date_override    = RefEndDate

/* Fixed Values from Rule Input parameters */
pCategoryId  = get_rvalue_number (rule_id ,'WORKED_TIME_CONDITION', 0) 
pOvrdPubCat   = get_rvalue_text (rule_id  ,'OVRD_PUB_HOLIDAY_CATEGORY', 'PH')
/* pMaxHrs  = get_rvalue_number (rule_id ,'DEFINED_LIMIT', 0)  */
   
rLog = add_rlog (ffs_id , rule_id , 'TES_WFM_HOLIDAY_COUNT Rule Parameters: '   ||
 ' , pCategoryId ='  ||  TO_CHAR( pCategoryId )  ||
 ' , pOvrdPubCat='  ||   pOvrdPubCat   ) 
 
  dbiHolidayCnt	=	0	
 dbiHolidays	=	EMPTY_DATE_NUMBER	 

rLog = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, 'TES_WFM_HOLIDAY_COUNT (INPUTS : '  ||  ' , start_date_override='  ||  TO_CHAR( start_date_override ) ||  
		' , end_date_override='  ||  TO_CHAR( end_date_override ) ||   ' ) ' )
   
NullDate =  '01-JAN-1900'(DATE)  
NullText =  '--NULL--' 

ctx_personId = GET_CONTEXT(HWM_RESOURCE_ID, 0)
ctx_subResource = GET_CONTEXT(HWM_SUBRESOURCE_ID, 0)
ctx_start_date = GET_CONTEXT(HWM_CTX_SEARCH_START_DATE,  NullDate)
ctx_end_date = GET_CONTEXT(HWM_CTX_SEARCH_END_DATE, NullDate) 
    
 l_status = add_rlog (ffs_id , rule_id ,  '(TES_WFM_HOLIDAY_COUNT UTIL_ ...context : '  ||  
 ' , ctx_personId ='  ||  TO_CHAR( ctx_personId ) || 
 ' , ctx_subResource ='  ||  TO_CHAR( ctx_subResource ) || 
 ' , ctx_start_date ='  ||  TO_CHAR( ctx_start_date ) ||  
 ' , ctx_end_date ='  ||  TO_CHAR( ctx_end_date ) ||  
 ' ) ' )  
 
ovrd_ctx_start_date = ctx_start_date
ovrd_ctx_end_date = ctx_end_date
IF (start_date_override != NullDate ) THEN (
  ovrd_ctx_start_date = start_date_override
  l_status = add_rlog (ffs_id , rule_id ,  'Contxt  Override  ovrd_ctx_start_date: ' ||  TO_CHAR( ovrd_ctx_start_date )  )
)

if  (end_date_override != NullDate )  THEN (  
  ovrd_ctx_end_date = end_date_override 	
  l_status = add_rlog (ffs_id , rule_id ,  'TES_WFM_HOLIDAY_COUNT Contxt  Override ovrd_ctx_end_date: ' ||  TO_CHAR( ovrd_ctx_end_date )  )
)   
 
 
/*ovrd_ctx_start_date = ADD_DAYS(ovrd_ctx_start_date ,  -1)   
ovrd_ctx_end_date =  ADD_DAYS(ovrd_ctx_end_date ,  1)*/

ovrd_ctx_start_date = TRUNC(ovrd_ctx_start_date)
ovrd_ctx_end_date =  ADD_DAYS(ovrd_ctx_start_date ,  1)
 
max_loop = 500
pubCount = -1  	
oIdx = 0
nidx = 1

OUT_HOLIDAY_DATES 	=	EMPTY_DATE_NUMBER 
  
CHANGE_CONTEXTS(HWM_CTX_SEARCH_START_DATE = ovrd_ctx_start_date)  (
CHANGE_CONTEXTS(HWM_CTX_SEARCH_END_DATE =  ovrd_ctx_end_date)	
( 
	pubCount = HWM_PUB_HOLIDAY_DATE_SOURCE.count    
	ctx_start_date = GET_CONTEXT(HWM_CTX_SEARCH_START_DATE,  NullDate)
	ctx_end_date = GET_CONTEXT(HWM_CTX_SEARCH_END_DATE, NullDate) 
		rLog  = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, '->TES_WFM_HOLIDAY_COUNT Start Pub Holiday loop -pubCount=' || TO_CHAR( pubCount )  ||
					' , ctx_start_date ='  ||  TO_CHAR( ctx_start_date ) ||  
					' , ctx_end_date ='  ||  TO_CHAR( ctx_end_date ) )
		if (pubCount > 0 ) Then 
		(
			nidx = 1 
			 WHILE (HWM_PUB_HOLIDAY_DATE_SOURCE.EXISTS(nidx))LOOP	(
				objCat  = HWM_PUB_HOLIDAY_OBJECT_CATEGORY[nidx]  
				hDate = HWM_PUB_HOLIDAY_START_TIME[nidx]
				if (hDate  != NullDate  and objCat = pOvrdPubCat ) THEN ( 
					 oIdx = oIdx + 1
					 OUT_HOLIDAY_DATES[oIdx] = hDate
						l_status =  add_rlog (ffs_id , rule_id , 'TES_WFM_HOLIDAY_COUNT holiday found ' ||
						' ,objCat= '  || objCat || 
						' ,hDate= ' || TO_CHAR(hDate) )
				)
				nidx = nidx + 1
				if (nidx >  max_loop) Then ( 
					ex = raise_error (ffs_id, rule_id, 'WFM_UTIL_GET_EMPLOYMENT_SCHEDULE terminated due to possible end-less loop. ' || 'Number of rows for HWM_PUB_SCHD_MEASURE exceeds' ||  TO_CHAR(max_loop) )
				)			 
			) 
		) 

))    
  
OUT_HOLIDAY_COUNT = oIdx

RETURN out_holiday_count

 *

 *						 
 * Formula Type:     Workforce Management Utility
 *   
 * Description:      Test calculate weekly threshold, using Balance DBIs
 * 
 *                   
 *            
 *         
 *  Rule Template Parameters
 *    Parameter Name	        Parameter Type	  Description
 *    ------------------------  ---------------   -----------------------------
 *    WORKED_TIME_CONDITION	     Time category	  Time category used to filter

 * David Cohanoff    116.0324  2017-APR-21  Created.

***************************************************************************/  
 
DEFAULT FOR HWM_CTXARY_RECORD_POSITIONS     is  EMPTY_TEXT_NUMBER  
DEFAULT FOR HWM_CTXARY_HWM_MEASURE_DAY      is  EMPTY_NUMBER_NUMBER 
DEFAULT FOR measure           is  EMPTY_NUMBER_NUMBER  
DEFAULT FOR OraMeasureAll     is  EMPTY_NUMBER_NUMBER  
DEFAULT FOR UnitOfMeasure     is  EMPTY_TEXT_NUMBER  
DEFAULT FOR PayrollTimeType   is  EMPTY_TEXT_NUMBER  
DEFAULT FOR StartTime         is  EMPTY_DATE_NUMBER
DEFAULT FOR StopTime          is  EMPTY_DATE_NUMBER  
 
INPUTS ARE  
	ffs_id, rule_id,   
	tcMeasureDay,
	tcOraMeasureAll,
	pMaxHrs,
	balValueLast,
	balValueCur,  
	DayMeasureNow  
	
	
ffName  = 'FFTEST_UTIL_UC2059_CALC -  137.0421- a '  
rLog    = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, 'UTAP_0 - Enter >>' || ffName   )

  
NullDate =  '01-JAN-1900'(DATE)  
NullText =  '--NULL--'
RecPositoinEoPeriod = 'END_PERIOD' 
RecPositoinEoDay = 'END_DAY' 
RecPositoinDetail = 'DETAIL'  
 
 
reg = 0
ot = 0
dtlOver = 0
TotalMeasureStart = 0
TotalMeasureNow = 0 
if (balValueLast >  pMaxHrs) then ( 
		ot = tcOraMeasureAll
) else 
(					
	TotalMeasureStart = balValueCur - tcMeasureDay
	if (TotalMeasureStart >  pMaxHrs) then ( 
		ot = tcOraMeasureAll
	) else 
	(						
		DayMeasureNow = DayMeasureNow + tcOraMeasureAll
		TotalMeasureNow = TotalMeasureStart + DayMeasureNow 
		if(TotalMeasureNow <= pMaxHrs) then 
		(
		   reg = tcOraMeasureAll 					
		)else 
		(
			dtlOver = TotalMeasureNow - pMaxHrs
			if (dtlOver >=  tcOraMeasureAll )  then (
				ot = tcOraMeasureAll 
			) else (
				reg = tcOraMeasureAll - dtlOver
				ot = dtlOver 
			)
		)
	)
) 

rLog = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, 'Calc Values: balValueLast = '  ||  TO_CHAR( balValueLast )  || 
								'; balValueCur ='   ||  TO_CHAR( balValueCur ) ||   
								'; TotalMeasureStart ='   ||  TO_CHAR( TotalMeasureStart ) || 
								'; TotalMeasureNow ='   ||  TO_CHAR( TotalMeasureNow ) ||   
								'; DayMeasureNow ='   ||  TO_CHAR( DayMeasureNow ) ||   
								'; dtlOver ='   ||  TO_CHAR( dtlOver ) ||   
								'; reg ='   ||  TO_CHAR( reg ) ||    
								'; ot ='   ||  TO_CHAR( ot ) )  
	 
	  
		 
rLog    = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, 'UTAP_Exit >>>' || ffName   )   
 

RETURN  reg, ot, DayMeasureNow

*
* Formula Name : TES_WFM_OVERTIME_ROUNDING_RULE_FOR_ENTRY_HRS
*
* Formula Type:  Workforce Management Utility
*
*
*  Change History
*  --------------
*
*
***************************************************************************/

INPUTS ARE
ln_entered_hours_temp


ffs_id       = GET_CONTEXT(HWM_FFS_ID, 0)
rule_id      = GET_CONTEXT(HWM_RULE_ID, 0)

dec = 0
dec_15 = 0
ln_entered_hours_temp_Hours = 0
ln_entered_hours_temp_Mins = 0
ln_entered_hours_temp_Mins_15_multiples = 0




rLog  = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, '>>>   TES_WFM_OVERTIME_ROUNDING_RULE begin' )

/*15Mins Rounding off rule for ln_entered_hours_temp*/
													  			
						dec = MOD(ln_entered_hours_temp,1)
						ln_entered_hours_temp_Hours = ln_entered_hours_temp - Dec
						ln_entered_hours_temp_Mins = dec * 60		/*As it is already in hrs, it is multiplied by 60 to convert into Mins*/
						rLog  = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, '>>>   TES_WFM_OVERTIME_ROUNDING_RULE_FOR_ln_entered_hours_temp ln_entered_hours_temp_Hours : '||to_char(ln_entered_hours_temp_Hours) )
						rLog  = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, '>>>   TES_WFM_OVERTIME_ROUNDING_RULE_FOR_ln_entered_hours_temp ln_entered_hours_temp_Mins : '||to_char(ln_entered_hours_temp_Mins) )
																			
						/*Adding 15mins if it is more than 8mins*/
						
						dec_15 = MOD(ln_entered_hours_temp_Mins,15)
						rLog  = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, '>>>   TES_WFM_OVERTIME_ROUNDING_RULE_FOR_ln_entered_hours_temp dec_15 : '||to_char(dec_15) )
						ln_entered_hours_temp_Mins_15_multiples = ln_entered_hours_temp_Mins - dec_15
						
							IF dec_15 > 8 THEN
							
							(
							
								ln_entered_hours_temp_Mins = ln_entered_hours_temp_Mins_15_multiples + 15
							
							)
							
							ELSE
										
							(
										
								ln_entered_hours_temp_Mins = ln_entered_hours_temp_Mins_15_multiples
											
							)
				
				rLog  = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, '>>>   TES_WFM_OVERTIME_ROUNDING_RULE_FOR_ln_entered_hours_temp ln_entered_hours_temp_Hours : '||to_char(ln_entered_hours_temp_Hours) )
				rLog  = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, '>>>   TES_WFM_OVERTIME_ROUNDING_RULE_FOR_ln_entered_hours_temp ln_entered_hours_temp_Mins : '||to_char(ln_entered_hours_temp_Mins) )
				ln_entered_hours_temp = ln_entered_hours_temp_Hours + (ln_entered_hours_temp_Mins/60)	
				

RETURN ln_entered_hours_temp

INPUTS ARE RefStartDate(date),RefEndDate(date)


 ffs_id       = GET_CONTEXT(HWM_FFS_ID, 0)
   rule_id      = GET_CONTEXT(HWM_RULE_ID, 0)  
		                              
rLog  = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, '>>>   TES_WFM_GET_BH_FROM_UDT begin ')

udt_ldg = 300000001122027 /*EDYN300000001072076*/ /*Needs to be changed as per PROD. 300000001293052 is for PP1. 300000001072076 is for PP2*/



NullDate     =  '01-JAN-1900'(DATE)

holiday_schd_start_time	= NullDate
  holiday_schd_end_time	= NullDate 
  
  l_date_start_temp = NullDate

/*Get the nation region begin*/

assignmentId= HWM_PER_ASG_ASSIGNMENT_ID
	StartTime= refstartdate
	EndTime = refenddate
	
CALL_FORMULA('TES_WFM_LOCATION_REGION_PAY_TO_HR',
  StartTime > 'StartTime',
  assignmentId > 'assignmentId',
  lc_region < 'lc_region' default '0'
)

rLog  = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, '>>>   TES_WFM_GET_BH_FROM_UDT lc_region : '||lc_region )

lc_region = UPPER(lc_region)

/*Get the nation region end*/

/*l_row_value = TO_CHAR(StartTime,'DD/MM/YYYY')*/



lc_holiday_name = 'X'


  
/*lc_holiday_name = GET_TABLE_VALUE('TES_BANK_HOLIDAYS',lc_region,l_row_value, TRUNC(StartTime))*/

rLog  = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, '>>>   TES_WFM_GET_BH_FROM_UDT lc_region : '||lc_region )

l_date_start = TRUNC(StartTime)
l_date_end = ADD_DAYS(TRUNC(EndTime),1)

WHILE l_date_start < l_date_end LOOP

(

l_row_value = TO_CHAR(l_date_start,'DD/MM/YYYY')

rLog  = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, '>>>   TES_WFM_GET_BH_FROM_UDT l_row_value '||l_row_value )

CHANGE_CONTEXTS(LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID=UDT_LDG)
  
(
  
lc_holiday_name = GET_TABLE_VALUE('TES_BANK_HOLIDAYS',lc_region,l_row_value, 'X')

) /*CHANGE_CONTEXTS(LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID=UDT_LDG)*/

IF lc_holiday_name = 'X' THEN

(

	rLog  = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, '>>>   TES_WFM_GET_BH_FROM_UDT No Holiday found in UDT. '||lc_holiday_name )
	
	l_date_start_temp = nulldate

)

ELSE

(

	
	IF l_date_start_temp != nulldate THEN
		
	(
		
			l_date_start_temp = LEAST(l_date_start,l_date_start_temp)
		
	)
		
	ELSE
		
	(
		
			l_date_start_temp = l_date_start
		
	)
	
	/*holiday_schd_start_time = TRUNC(RefStartDate)*/
	
	holiday_schd_start_time = TRUNC(l_date_start_temp)
	holiday_schd_end_time = ADD_DAYS(l_date_start, 1)
	
	rLog  = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, '>>>   TES_WFM_GET_BH_FROM_UDT Holiday found in UDT. '||lc_holiday_name )	
	
	
	

)

l_date_start = ADD_DAYS(l_date_start,1)

) /*WHILE l_date_start <= l_date_end LOOP*/

rLog  = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, '>>>   TES_WFM_GET_BH_FROM_UDT holiday_schd_start_time ' ||TO_CHAR(holiday_schd_start_time))

rLog  = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, '>>>   TES_WFM_GET_BH_FROM_UDT holiday_schd_end_time ' ||TO_CHAR(holiday_schd_end_time))

rLog  = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, '>>>   TES_WFM_GET_BH_FROM_UDT end ')

RETURN holiday_schd_start_time, holiday_schd_end_time

 default for ffs_id(number)   is  0

  ToHhmm24(text) 
 
ffName  = 'ORA_WFM_UTIL_HHMM_TO_DATETIME'
rLog    = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, 'UTL_TMCK_0 - >>> Enter ' || ffName || ' -v 16.0324 '  )
 
 rLog = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id,'UTL_TMCK_1 Inputs: '  ||  
		 ' ,  FromHhmm24 ='  || FromHhmm24  ||    
		 ' ,  ToHhmm24 ='    || ToHhmm24  ||
		 ' ,  StartTime ='  ||  TO_CHAR(StartTime)  || 
		 ' ,  StopTime ='  ||  TO_CHAR(StopTime)  ) 

 
NullDate =  '01-JAN-1900'(DATE)  
NullDateTime = '1900/01/01 00:00:00' (date) 
NullText =  '**FF_NULL**'  
FromDateTime = NullDateTime  
ToDateTime   = NullDateTime  
  
if ( FromHhmm24 = '00:00') then ( FromHhmm24 = '24:00' )
if ( ToHhmm24 = '00:00') then ( ToHhmm24 = '24:00' )
/*	lFromNum = time_hhmm_to_dec (TO_NUMBER(  REPLACE(FromHhmm24, ':', '.') ) )  */
 

sdateFormat = 'yyyy/mm/dd HH24.MI' 
StartDateYMD =  to_char(StartTime,'yyyy/mm/dd') 
if (FromHhmm24 <> NullText)  then
(	 
	FromDateTime = TO_DATE (StartDateYMD || ' ' || FromHhmm24 , sdateFormat)
)

if (ToHhmm24 <> NullText)  then
(
	StopDateYMD = StartDateYMD
	fromNum = TO_NUMBER(  REPLACE(FromHhmm24, ':', '.') )
	toNum = TO_NUMBER(  REPLACE(ToHhmm24, ':', '.') )
	if ( fromNum  > toNum) then (
		/*  If from hours from day 1 and extend to day 2 ie: 22:00 to 02:00  calculated Next day*/ 
			StopDateYMD =  to_char(ADD_DAYS(StartTime ,  1) ,'yyyy/mm/dd')  
	)
	ToDateTime = TO_DATE (StopDateYMD || ' ' || ToHhmm24 , sdateFormat)
) 	  

rLog    = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, 'UTL_TMCK_2 - DateConvert:' ||
				' , FromDateTime: ' || TO_CHAR( FromDateTime) ||  
				' , ToDateTime='  ||  TO_CHAR( ToDateTime ) )
	 
  
		 
		  
rLog    = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, 'UTL_TMCK_99 - Exit <<< ' || ffName  )

RETURN  FromDateTime ,ToDateTime

   +======================================================================+
 *
 * Formula Name : ORA_WFM_UTIL_GET_DBI_TIME_PERIOD_PROFILE
 *         
 * Description:   Helper utility for Time and Labor period overtime date and profiles.
 *
 * Formula Type:  WORKFORCE_MANAGEMENT_UTILITY - Workforce Management Utility 
 *     
 *
 *  Route Name:	HWM_TIME_PERIOD_PROFILE_RN
 *
 *  Context:	<1,HWM_RESOURCE_ID>, <2,HWM_CTX_SEARCH_START_DATE>
 * 
 *  DBI's 
 *  -------------- 
 *    HWM_PRD_PRF_PERIOD_NAME
 *    HWM_PRD_PRF_PROFILE_NAME
 *    HWM_PRD_PRF_TM_REFERENCE_DATE
 *   
 *  Change History
 *  --------------
 *
 *  Who               Ver        Date            Description
 *-----------------  ------      ------------    -----------------------------------------
 * David Cohanoff     120.0825   2020-AUG-26     Created.
 *  
 *   
 **************************************************************************/   

default for ffs_id(number)   is  0    
default for rule_id(number)  is  0             
default for personId(number)  is  0      
default for startDate(Date)  is   '01-JAN-1900'(DATE)  

  DEFAULT FOR HWM_PRD_PRF_PERIOD_NAME         IS  '**FF_NULL**'  
  DEFAULT FOR HWM_PRD_PRF_PROFILE_NAME        IS  '**FF_NULL**' 
  DEFAULT FOR HWM_PRD_PRF_TM_REFERENCE_DATE   IS  '01-JAN-1900'(DATE)  


INPUTS ARE   
 ffs_id(number) ,
 rule_id(number) ,
 personId(number) ,
 startDate(DATE) 


ffName = 'ORA_WFM_UTIL_GET_DBI_TIME_PERIOD_PROFILE - v120.0824 '
rLog  = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, '>>> Enter: ' || ffName    ) 

rLog = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, 'INPUTS_ARE: '  ||  
 '; personId='  ||  TO_CHAR( personId ) ||  
 '; startDate='  ||  TO_CHAR( startDate )  )


NullDate =  '01-JAN-1900'(DATE)  
NullText =  '**FF_NULL**' 
sTrue = 'Y'

periodName = nulltext
profileName = nulltext
tmReferenceDate =  NullDate 
wsaExits =  nulltext  
valueSource = 'None'

wsFullKey = TO_CHAR(personId) + TO_CHAR(startDate)  
if (WSA_EXISTS ( wsFullKey )) then (
	wsaExits = WSA_GET(wsFullKey,  nullText )
	rlog =  add_rlog (ffs_id , rule_id , 'WSA_GET wsFullKey=[' ||  wsFullKey   || ']; wsaExits=[' || wsaExits || '];' ) 
)

if (wsaExits = sTrue) then ( 
	periodName = WSA_GET(wsFullKey || '_PERIOD',  nullText )
	profileName = WSA_GET(wsFullKey || 'PROFILE',  nullText )
	tmReferenceDate =  WSA_GET(wsFullKey || '_DATE',  NullDate ) 
	valueSource = 'WSA_GET'
) else (
	CHANGE_CONTEXTS(HWM_RESOURCE_ID = personId , HWM_CTX_SEARCH_START_DATE = startDate )	
	(  
		 rLog  = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, 'Final_Context:  RESOURCE_ID ='  ||  TO_CHAR(  GET_CONTEXT(HWM_RESOURCE_ID, 0)  ) || 
										';  START_DATE= '   || TO_CHAR(  GET_CONTEXT(HWM_CTX_SEARCH_START_DATE, NullDate)  )  )  

			if (HWM_PRD_PRF_PERIOD_NAME    was not DEFAULTED) then ( periodName = HWM_PRD_PRF_PERIOD_NAME)  
			if (HWM_PRD_PRF_PROFILE_NAME    was not DEFAULTED) then ( profileName = HWM_PRD_PRF_PROFILE_NAME)  
			if (HWM_PRD_PRF_TM_REFERENCE_DATE    was not DEFAULTED) then (tmReferenceDate = HWM_PRD_PRF_TM_REFERENCE_DATE)  
			WSA_SET(wsFullKey,  sTrue ) 
			WSA_SET(wsFullKey || '_PERIOD',  periodName )
			WSA_SET(wsFullKey || 'PROFILE',  profileName )
			WSA_SET(wsFullKey || '_DATE',  tmReferenceDate )
			valueSource = 'DIRECT_DBI'

	)   
)

rLog  = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, 'Value from >>>>> ' || valueSource||  ' <<<<< - periodName: '   ||   periodName )
rLog  = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, 'Value from >>>>> ' || valueSource||  ' <<<<< - profileName: '   ||   profileName  )
rLog  = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, 'Value from >>>>> ' || valueSource||  ' <<<<< - tmReferenceDate: '   || TO_CHAR( tmReferenceDate )  )



rLog  = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, '<<< Exit:  ' || ffName    ) 


RETURN  tmReferenceDate, periodName, profileName

*

*    
* Formula Type:  Workforce Management Utility

*

* David Cohanoff    117.1218    2020-01-23     Created.  
*  
***************************************************************************/   
default for ffs_id(number)   is  0  
default for rule_id(number)  is  0   
default for vsKey(text)      is   '**FF_NULL**'
default for vsParm(text)     is   '**FF_NULL**'
 
INPUTS ARE   
	ffs_id, 
	rule_id,
    vsKey(text) ,
    vsParm(text) 
	
ffName = 'ORA_WFM_UTIL_GET_CACHED_VALUE_SET - v18.0118a'
rLog  = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, '> Enter - ' || ffName  ) 
 
rlog =  add_rlog (ffs_id , rule_id , 'INPUTS vsKey=[' ||  vsKey   || ']; vsParm=[' || vsParm || '];' )
	
/* ----------- constant values   -------- */
/* ------------------------------------- */
NullDate =  '01-JAN-1900'(DATE)  
NullDateTime = '1900/01/01 00:00:00' (date)  
NullText = '**FF_NULL**'

TimeRecordType_MEASURE = 'MEASURE'
TimeRecordType_RANGE = 'RANGE'
  
 
wsFullKey = vsKey + vsParm
vsValue = nullText
if (WSA_EXISTS ( wsFullKey )) then (
	vsValue = WSA_GET(wsFullKey,  nullText )
	rlog =  add_rlog (ffs_id , rule_id , 'WSA_GET wsFullKey=[' ||  wsFullKey   || ']; vsValue=[' || vsValue || '];' ) 
)      

if (vsValue =  nullText) then  (
    vsValue = GET_VALUE_SET(vsKey,vsParm)
    WSA_SET (wsFullKey, vsValue)
	rlog =  add_rlog (ffs_id , rule_id , 'GET_VALUE_SET vsKey=[' ||  vsKey   || ']; vsParm=[' || vsParm || '];' ) 
	rlog =  add_rlog (ffs_id , rule_id , 'GET_VALUE_SET vsValue=[' ||  vsValue   || ']; ')
)

 
RETURN  vsValue

/* +======================================================================+
   |                Copyright (c) 2009 Oracle Corporation                 |
   |                   Redwood Shores, California, USA                    |
   |                        All rights reserved.                          |
   +======================================================================+
*
* Formula Name : TES_WFM_45_MINS_CHECK_FOR_NIGHT_OVERTIME
*
* Formula Type:  Workforce Management Utility
*
*
*  Change History
*  --------------
*
*
***************************************************************************/

INPUTS ARE worked_in_night_band, Out_Night1, Out_Night2
,Out_Day3, Out_Day4

ffs_id       = GET_CONTEXT(HWM_FFS_ID, 0)
rule_id      = GET_CONTEXT(HWM_RULE_ID, 0)

rLog  = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, '>>>   TES_WFM_45_MINS_CHECK_FOR_NIGHT_OVERTIME worked_in_night_band : '||to_char(worked_in_night_band) )
rLog  = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, '>>>   TES_WFM_45_MINS_CHECK_FOR_NIGHT_OVERTIME Out_Night1 : '||to_char(Out_Night1) )
rLog  = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, '>>>   TES_WFM_45_MINS_CHECK_FOR_NIGHT_OVERTIME Out_Night2 : '||to_char(Out_Night2) )

Out_Day3 = 0
Out_Day4 = 0

IF Out_Night1 <= 0.75 THEN	/*0.75 hr => 45 Mins*/

(							
			
			/*Retaining the 0.75 hrs/45 Mins in case the worked hrs in night band >= 1hr */
			
			IF worked_in_night_band >= 1 THEN
			
			(
			
				Out_Night1 = Out_Night1 
			)
			
			ELSE
			
			(
				Out_Day3 = Out_Night1 /*Assigning night overtime to overtime*/
				Out_Night1 = 0
			
			)

			

)

ELSE

(
	Out_Night1 = GREATEST(Out_Night1, 1)	/*1hr if > 45mins and less than 60mins*/
	Out_Night1 = LEAST(Out_Night1, 6)	/*6hrs is cap/maximum*/

)



IF Out_Night2 <= 0.75 THEN	/*0.75 hr => 45 Mins*/

(							
			
			/*Retaining the 0.75 hrs/45 Mins in case the worked hrs in night band >= 1hr */
			
			IF worked_in_night_band >= 1 THEN
			
			(
			
				Out_Night2 = Out_Night2 
			)
			
			ELSE
			
			(
				Out_Day4 = Out_Night2 /*Assigning night overtime to overtime*/
				Out_Night2 = 0
			
			)

			

		)

ELSE

(
	Out_Night2 = GREATEST(Out_Night2, 1)	/*1hr if > 45mins and less than 60mins*/
	Out_Night2 = LEAST(Out_Night2, 6)	/*6hrs is cap/maximum*/

)


RETURN Out_Night1, Out_Night2
,Out_Day3, Out_Day4

/* +======================================================================+
   |                Copyright (c) 2009 Oracle Corporation                 |
   |                   Redwood Shores, California, USA                    |
   |                        All rights reserved.                          |
   +======================================================================+
 *
 * Formula Name : WFM_THRESHOLD_TIME_CALCULATION_RULE
 *  
 * Formula Type:  WFM TCR Threshold Rule - FF Seed Data
 *  
 * Description:   Divides reported daily or period time into calculated 
 *                time attributes for hours above and below defined threshold 
 *                hours. Reported time and specific time attribute results 
 *                are inputs to the delivered formula. 
 *
 * Detail:       Compares the total time category hours for the day or 
 *               period to the threshold value. Hours above the threshold 
 *               are converted to a single pay time type. Hours under 
 *               the threshold either remain the same pay time type value 
 *               or are converted into a new pay time type attribute. 
 *
 *
 *  Change History
 *  --------------
 *
 *  Who               Ver      Date          Description
 *-----------------  ------   ------------  -----------------------------------------
 * David Cohanoff     206.12        2013-FEB-10    Created.
 * David Cohanoff     104.0525      2014-JAN-04    Modified for R9 - New HWM_FF_UTIL.
 *
 * 
***************************************************************************/  
 default for measure(number)  is  0  
 default for PayrollTimeType(text) is  'NULL'  


INPUTS ARE  
  measure(number) ,
  PayrollTimeType(text)


/*  Following 2 lines are required right after inputs for all OTL and HWM formulas */
ffs_id = GET_CONTEXT(HWM_FFS_ID, 0)
rule_id = GET_CONTEXT(HWM_RULE_ID, 0)  
l_status =  add_rlog (ffs_id , rule_id , 'WFM_THRESHOLD_TIME_CALCULATION_RULE v104.0525 ' )
 
  
/* sum_lvl = GET_CONTEXT(HWM_SUMMATION_LEVEL, 'TIMECARD') */
rec_position = GET_CONTEXT(HWM_RECORD_POSITION, 'DETAIL')

/* Fixed Values from Rule header  */
sum_lvl= Get_Hdr_Text(rule_id, 'RUN_SUMMATION_LEVEL', 'TIMECARD') 
exec_type  = Get_Hdr_Text(rule_id,'RULE_EXEC_TYPE', 'CREATE') 

create_yn  = 'N' 
if (upper(exec_type) = 'CREATE'  ) then ( 
  create_yn  = 'Y' 
) 

paytypeIn = PayrollTimeType 
 l_status = add_rlog (ffs_id , rule_id ,'(v3.08a- '  ||  
 ' , sum_lvl='  ||   sum_lvl ||  
 ' , rec_position ='  ||  rec_position ||  
 ' , ffs_id ='  ||  TO_CHAR( ffs_id ) ||  
 ' ,  measure ='  ||  TO_CHAR(  measure ) ||  
 ' ,  paytypeIn='  ||  paytypeIn || 
 ' ) ' )

/* Fixed Values from Rule Input parameters */
max_hr  = get_rvalue_number (rule_id ,'DEFINED_LIMIT', 0)  
categoryId  = get_rvalue_number (rule_id ,'WORKED_TIME_CONDITION', 0) 
   
wk_hrs_total_day   = get_wrk_num  (ffs_id , 'wk_hrs_total_day' , 0, 0 ) 
wk_hrs_total_tc   = get_wrk_num  (ffs_id , 'wk_hrs_total_tc' , 0, 0 )   
 

l_status = add_rlog (ffs_id , rule_id , '( total_day='  ||  TO_CHAR( wk_hrs_total_day ) || 
 ' , total_tc ='  ||  TO_CHAR( wk_hrs_total_tc ) ||  
 ' ) ' )

 
tot_day = wk_hrs_total_day + measure
tot_tc  = wk_hrs_total_tc  + measure  

tot_ck = 0 
hr_ot =0 
hr_reg =0

if (sum_lvl = 'TIMECARD' AND tot_tc > max_hr and max_hr > 0 ) then (  
   tot_ck = tot_tc  
) ELSE IF (sum_lvl = 'DAY' AND tot_day > max_hr and max_hr > 0) then (  
   tot_ck = tot_day 
) ELSE IF ( sum_lvl = 'DETAIL' AND measure > max_hr and max_hr > 0 ) then (  
   tot_ck = measure 
) 

  
if ( tot_ck > 0 ) then (   
    
   hr_ot  = tot_ck - max_hr
   if (hr_ot > measure  ) then (
       hr_ot = measure  
       hr_reg = 0 
    ) else ( 
       hr_reg = measure - hr_ot  
    )    
   
   if ( create_yn  =   'Y') then (  
      hr_reg = measure 
	)  
        
   
) else (
   if ( measure > 0 ) then (  
       hr_reg = measure   
  )

) 
 
if ( hr_reg > 0 ) then (  
       out_measure_under = hr_reg 
)

if ( hr_ot   > 0 ) then (  
       out_measure_over = hr_ot   
)
   
 
wk_hrs_total_day = tot_day 
wk_hrs_total_tc  = tot_tc  

if (rec_position = 'END_DAY') then  (
   wk_hrs_total_day    = 0
)  ELSE IF (rec_position = 'END_PERIOD') then  (
   wk_hrs_total_day    = 0
   wk_hrs_total_tc = 0
) 
 

 l_status = set_wrk_num  (ffs_id , 'wk_hrs_total_day' , 0, wk_hrs_total_day) 
 l_status = set_wrk_num  (ffs_id , 'wk_hrs_total_tc' , 0, wk_hrs_total_tc ) 
 

RETURN  out_measure_under,
out_measure_over

NullDate =  '01-JAN-1900'(DATE)

 l_status = add_rlog (ffs_id , rule_id ,'Rule Header and Context:'  ||

 ' , rule_id ='  ||  TO_CHAR( rule_id ) ||

 ' , hCreateYn='  ||   hCreateYn   )

/* Fixed Values from Rule Input parameters */

wMaAry = HWM_CTXARY_RECORD_POSITIONS.count   
rLog  = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, 'Start bulk process - wMaAry=' || TO_CHAR( wMaAry )  )
		 	
out_measure_ary_under 	=	EMPTY_NUMBER_NUMBER
out_measure_ary_over 	=	EMPTY_NUMBER_NUMBER


wkTotalHrsDay = 0
wkTotalHrsTc = 0   
nidx = 0
WHILE (nidx < wMaAry ) LOOP
(	  
	aiMeasure = 0 
	aiRecPosition = NullText
	
    nidx = nidx + 1	 
	if (MEASURE.exists(nidx) ) then (
		aiMeasure  = MEASURE[nidx]   
	) 
	
	aiMeasureDay = 0
	if (HWM_CTXARY_HWM_MEASURE_DAY.exists(nidx) ) then (
		aiMeasureDay  = HWM_CTXARY_HWM_MEASURE_DAY[nidx]   
	) 
	
	aiRecPosition   = HWM_CTXARY_RECORD_POSITIONS[nidx] 

	ocMeasure_under  = -9999
	ocMeasure_over   = -9999
	 
	CALL_FORMULA ('WFM_THRESHOLD_TIME_CALCULATION_RULE_SUB'
				  , ffs_id        > 'ffs_id'
				  , rule_id       > 'rule_id'
				  , hSumLvl       > 'hSumLvl'
				  , hCreateYn     > 'hCreateYn'  
				  , measure_period  > 'measurePeriod' 
				  , aiMeasureDay     > 'measureDay'  
				  , aiRecPosition    > 'recPosition'  
				  , wkTotalHrsDay    > 'wkTotalHrsDay' 
				  , wkTotalHrsTc     > 'wkTotalHrsTc' 
				  , aiMeasure       > 'measure' 
				  , pMaxHrs         > 'pMaxHrs'   
				  , ocMeasure_under   <  'out_measure_under'  DEFAULT -9999 
				  , ocMeasure_over    <  'out_measure_over'  DEFAULT -9999 
				  , wkTotalHrsDay     <  'oTotalHrsDay'  DEFAULT 0 
				  , wkTotalHrsTc      <  'oTotalHrsTc'   DEFAULT 0  ) 
	  
 

rLog  = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, '>>> CALL_FORMULA Result:  '  ||   
 ' , aiMeasureDay ='  ||  TO_CHAR( aiMeasureDay ) ||     
 ' , ocMeasure_under ='  ||  TO_CHAR( ocMeasure_under ) ||   
 ' , ocMeasure_over ='  ||  TO_CHAR(  ocMeasure_over ) ||  
 ' , wkTotalHrsDay ='  ||  TO_CHAR(  wkTotalHrsDay ) || 
 ' , wkTotalHrsTc ='   ||  TO_CHAR(  wkTotalHrsTc ) )


	if (ocMeasure_under <>  -9999 ) Then (
		out_measure_ary_under[nidx]   = ocMeasure_under
	) 
	 if (ocMeasure_over <>  -9999 ) Then (
		out_measure_ary_over[nidx]   = ocMeasure_over
	) 
	 
		if (nidx >  1000 ) Then ( 
			 if (nidx >  1000 ) Then (
				/* endless loop?  Stop process if more than max_loop records found */
				ex = raise_error (ffs_id, rule_id, 'Formula ' || ffName || ' terminated due to possible end-less loop.' )
			)
			
		)     
)   
   
rLog  = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, '<< Exit - ' || ffName   ) 

RETURN  out_measure_ary_under, out_measure_ary_over

   +======================================================================+
 *
 * Formula Name:   WFM_TCR_COPY_PROJ_TASK_EXP_ATTR_AP
 *                 
 * Formula Type:  Time Calculation rule
 *   
 * Description:     Copies the selected Project Costing time attributes to
 *                  the payroll costing segments.
 *
 * Detail:          Copies the time entries for the Expenditure Type, Task,
 *                  and Project Costing time attributes into the Department,
 *                  Appropriation, and Project costing segments. If your 
 *                  costing segments have different names or segment 
 *                  locations, edit those values in a copy of this formula,
 *                  which you then use to define associated rules.
 *                   
 *            
 *
 *  Change History
 *  --------------
 *
 *  Who             Ver        Date         Description
 *----------------  ------     -----------  -------------------------------
 * David Cohanoff    126.0125  2016-JAN-26  Created.  
 *
 * 
***************************************************************************/  
 
DEFAULT FOR HWM_CTXARY_RECORD_POSITIONS  is  EMPTY_TEXT_NUMBER  
DEFAULT FOR HWM_CTXARY_HWM_MEASURE_DAY   is  EMPTY_NUMBER_NUMBER 
DEFAULT FOR measure                      is  EMPTY_NUMBER_NUMBER  
DEFAULT FOR StartTime                    is  EMPTY_DATE_NUMBER
DEFAULT FOR PJC_EXPENDITURE_TYPE_NAME    is  EMPTY_TEXT_NUMBER 
DEFAULT FOR PJC_TASK_ID                  is  EMPTY_NUMBER_NUMBER 
DEFAULT FOR PJC_PROJECT_ID               is  EMPTY_NUMBER_NUMBER 


INPUTS ARE   
  HWM_CTXARY_RECORD_POSITIONS,
  HWM_CTXARY_HWM_MEASURE_DAY,
  measure , 
  StartTime,
  PJC_EXPENDITURE_TYPE_NAME ,
  PJC_TASK_ID ,
  PJC_PROJECT_ID 
  
  
 
ffName = 'WFM_TCR_COPY_PROJ_TASK_EXP_ATTR_AP'  || ' - v16.0126a  '
NullDate =  '01-JAN-1900'(DATE)  
NullText =  '**FF_NULL**' 

ffs_id = GET_CONTEXT(HWM_FFS_ID, 0) 
rule_id = GET_CONTEXT(HWM_RULE_ID, 0) 
rLog  = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, ffName  ) 
    
measure_period = GET_CONTEXT(HWM_MEASURE_PERIOD, 0)  

rLog = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, 'In Context: ffs_id='  || TO_CHAR( ffs_id ) ||
                  ' , rule_id='  ||  TO_CHAR( rule_id ) ||
                  ' , measure_period='  ||  TO_CHAR( measure_period ) )
 

pCategoryId  = get_rvalue_number (rule_id ,'WORKED_TIME_CONDITION', 0)  
 rLog = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, 'Rule Parameters: '  ||  
  ' , category='  || TO_CHAR( pCategoryId )  )
  
  
maxRows = HWM_CTXARY_RECORD_POSITIONS.count   
rLog  = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, 'Start bulk process - Total rows=' || TO_CHAR( maxRows )  )
		 	
OUT_COPY_EXPENDITURE =	EMPTY_TEXT_NUMBER
OUT_COPY_TASK 	     =	EMPTY_NUMBER_NUMBER
OUT_COPY_PROJECT 	 = 	EMPTY_NUMBER_NUMBER

  
nidx = 0
WHILE (nidx < maxRows ) LOOP
(	  
	aMeasure = 0 
	aRecPosition = NullText
	
    nidx = nidx + 1	 
	if (MEASURE.exists(nidx) ) then (
		aMeasure  = MEASURE[nidx]   
	) 
  
	aRecPosition   = HWM_CTXARY_RECORD_POSITIONS[nidx] 

	 if (aMeasure > 0 and aRecPosition = 'DETAIL') then
	 (		 
		 lExp =  NullText
		 lTask = -1
		 lProject = -1 
		 if (PJC_EXPENDITURE_TYPE_NAME.exists(nidx) ) then (
			lExp  = PJC_EXPENDITURE_TYPE_NAME[nidx]   
		 ) 
	  
		 if (PJC_TASK_ID.exists(nidx) ) then (
			lTask  = PJC_TASK_ID[nidx]   
		 ) 
		 
		 if (PJC_PROJECT_ID.exists(nidx) ) then (
			lProject  = PJC_PROJECT_ID[nidx]   
		 ) 
 
			rLog  = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, 'Copy From Values:  '  ||   
					 ' , lExp ='  ||  lExp ||     
					 ' , lTask ='  ||  TO_CHAR( lTask ) ||   
					 ' , lProject ='  ||  TO_CHAR(  lProject )  )
			 

		if (lExp <>  NullText ) Then (
			OUT_COPY_EXPENDITURE[nidx]   = lExp
		) 
		
		if (lTask <>  -1 ) Then (
			OUT_COPY_TASK[nidx]   = lTask
		) 
		
		if (lProject <>  -1 ) Then (
			OUT_COPY_PROJECT[nidx]   = lProject
		) 
	 )
	 
		if (nidx >  1000 ) Then (  
				/* endless loop?  Stop process if more than max_loop records found */
				ex = raise_error (ffs_id, rule_id, 'Formula ' || ffName || ' terminated due to possible end-less loop.' )  
		)     
)   
   
rLog  = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, '<< Exit - ' || ffName   ) 

RETURN   OUT_COPY_EXPENDITURE, OUT_COPY_TASK ,OUT_COPY_PROJECT

/*******************************************************************************
*                                                                               *
* FORMULA NAME: ORA_HRX_GLB_GET_AVAILABILITY                                    *
*                                                                               *
* FORMULA TYPE: Payroll Access to HR                                            *
*                                                                               *
* DESCRIPTION: This formula will return the Duration from Availability          *
*                                                                               *
*                                                                               *
*  Change History                                                               *
*  ---------------                                                              *
*                                                                               *
*  Who           Date       Description                                         *
*  ----------   ----------  --------------------------------------              *
*  GUIXU        29-Oct-2018    Created                                          *
*                                                                               *
*                                                                               *
********************************************************************************/


DEFAULT FOR ENTRY_LEVEL           IS 'AP'
DEFAULT FOR DEFAULT_HOURS_PER_DAY IS 8


Inputs are
    actual_start_date (date),
    actual_end_date (date),
    unit_type (text),
    hr_assign_id,
    entry_level(text),
    default_hours_per_day(number)

l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('[ORA_HRX_GLB_GET_AVAILABILITY] Inside Formula ORA_HRX_GLB_GET_AVAILABILITY')

l_hr_assignment_id = hr_assign_id
l_entry_level = entry_level
/* since it 12:00 am, adding a day i.e 24hrs to get correct hours */
l_actual_end_date = add_days(actual_end_date, 1)
l_default_hours_per_day = default_hours_per_day

l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('[ORA_HRX_GLB_GET_AVAILABILITY] ENTRY_LEVEL       : ' || l_entry_level)
l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('[ORA_HRX_GLB_GET_AVAILABILITY] HR_ASSIGNMENT_ID  : ' || TO_CHAR(l_hr_assignment_id))
l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('[ORA_HRX_GLB_GET_AVAILABILITY] ACTUAL_START_DATE : ' || TO_CHAR(actual_start_date))
l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('[ORA_HRX_GLB_GET_AVAILABILITY] ACTUAL_END_DATE   : ' || TO_CHAR(l_actual_end_date))

CHANGE_CONTEXTS (HR_ASSIGNMENT_ID = l_hr_assignment_id)
(
    l_units = 0

    l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('[ORA_HRX_GLB_GET_AVAILABILITY] HR_ASSIGNMENT_ID : ' || TO_CHAR(l_hr_assignment_id))

    IF (l_entry_level = 'AP' OR ENTRY_LEVEL = 'PT' ) THEN
    (
        l_resource_type = 'EMPTERM_AGGR'
    )
    ELSE IF (l_entry_level = 'PA' ) THEN
    (
        l_resource_type = 'ASSIGN'
    )

    l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('[ORA_HRX_GLB_GET_AVAILABILITY] RESOURCE_TYPE : ' || l_resource_type)

    l_units = HRX_GLB_GET_PAY_AVAILABILITY(
                  l_resource_type,
                  actual_start_date,
                  l_actual_end_date,
                  'Y',
                  'Y',
                  'N',
                  'P',
                  unit_type,
                  'Y',
                  'Y',
                  l_default_hours_per_day,
                  '8:30',
                  '0-1-1-1-1-1-0')
)

l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('[ORA_HRX_GLB_GET_AVAILABILITY] UNITS : ' || TO_CHAR(l_units))

return l_units

DEFAULT FOR PER_ASG_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER15 IS 0 /*Saturday - 6AM to Midnight*/

l_sun_day_break_duration = 0
l_mon_night_break_duration = 0
l_mon_day_break_duration = 0

l_tue_day_break_duration = 0
l_wed_night_break_duration = 0
l_wed_day_break_duration = 0
l_thu_night_break_duration = 0
l_thu_day_break_duration = 0
l_fri_night_break_duration = 0
l_fri_day_break_duration = 0
l_sat_night_break_duration = 0
l_sat_day_break_duration = 0

CHANGE_CONTEXTS(HR_ASSIGNMENT_ID = assignmentId , EFFECTIVE_DATE = StartTime)
(
if ( PER_ASG_ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY was not DEFAULTED ) then

IF (l_asg_attribute_category = 'Y') then (

/*Sunday*/

/*Monday*/

( l_mon_day_break_duration = PER_ASG_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER5 )
/*Tuesday*/

( l_tue_night_break_duration = PER_ASG_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER6 )
if ( PER_ASG_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER7 was not DEFAULTED ) then
( l_tue_day_break_duration = PER_ASG_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER7 )
/*Wednesday*/
if ( PER_ASG_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER8 was not DEFAULTED ) then
( l_wed_night_break_duration = PER_ASG_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER8 )
if ( PER_ASG_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER9 was not DEFAULTED ) then
( l_wed_day_break_duration = PER_ASG_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER9 )
/*Thursday*/
if ( PER_ASG_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER10 was not DEFAULTED ) then
( l_thu_night_break_duration = PER_ASG_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER10 )
if ( PER_ASG_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER11 was not DEFAULTED ) then
( l_thu_day_break_duration = PER_ASG_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER11 )
/*Friday*/
if ( PER_ASG_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER12 was not DEFAULTED ) then
( l_fri_night_break_duration = PER_ASG_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER12 )
if ( PER_ASG_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER13 was not DEFAULTED ) then
( l_fri_day_break_duration = PER_ASG_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER13 )
/*Saturday*/
if ( PER_ASG_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER14 was not DEFAULTED ) then
( l_sat_night_break_duration = PER_ASG_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER14 )
if ( PER_ASG_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER15 was not DEFAULTED ) then
( l_sat_day_break_duration = PER_ASG_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER15 )

)
else
(l_sun_night_break_duration = 0
l_sun_day_break_duration = 0
l_mon_night_break_duration = 0
l_mon_day_break_duration = 0
l_tue_night_break_duration = 0
l_tue_day_break_duration = 0
l_wed_night_break_duration = 0
l_wed_day_break_duration = 0

l_thu_day_break_duration = 0

l_fri_day_break_duration = 0
l_sat_night_break_duration = 0

Return l_sun_night_break_duration ,l_sun_day_break_duration ,l_mon_night_break_duration ,l_mon_day_break_duration ,l_tue_night_break_duration ,l_tue_day_break_duration ,l_wed_night_break_duration ,

/*******************************************
* Formula Name: TES_WFM_ABS_DETAILS_FF
*
* Formula Type: Payroll Access to HR
*
*
* Description: Get Values for the following DBIs:
* DBIs:
* Context:
* <1,PERSON_ID>, <2,EFFECTIVE_DATE>
*
********************************************/
DEFAULT FOR assignmentId (number) IS 0
DEFAULT FOR StartTime(date) IS '4712/12/31 00:00:00' (date)
DEFAULT FOR EndTime(date) IS '4712/12/31 00:00:00' (date)

DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR  ABS_EXT_START_DATE IS '4712/12/31' (date)
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR  ABS_EXT_END_DATE IS '4712/12/31' (date)
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR  ABS_EXT_START_DATETIME IS '4712/12/31 00:00:00'
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR  ABS_EXT_END_DATETIME IS '4712/12/31 00:00:00'
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR  ABS_EXT_START_DATE_DURATION IS 0
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR  ABS_EXT_END_DATE_DURATION IS 0
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR  ABS_EXT_ABSENCE_TYPE_ID  IS 0
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR  ABS_EXT_ABSENCE_TYPE IS 'Sickness'
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR  ABS_EXT_APPROVAL_STATUS_CD IS 'XX'
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR  ABS_EXT_ABSENCE_STATUS_CD IS 'XX'

INPUTS ARE
assignmentId,
personId,
StartTime,
EndTime

l_flag= 'XX'
l_abs_type_id = 0 /*300000001843090  300000001786200  300000008558127 PP1*/ /*Sickness Leave Absnce Type Id */
l_abs_type = 'XX'
l_abs_start_datetime = '4712/12/31 00:00:00'
l_abs_end_datetime = '4712/12/31 00:00:00'
l_abs_start_date = '4712/12/31' (date)
l_abs_end_date = '4712/12/31' (date)
l_abs_start_date_duration = 0
l_abs_end_date_duration = 0
l_absence_status = 'XX'
l_approval_status= 'XX'


CHANGE_CONTEXTS(HR_ASSIGNMENT_ID = assignmentId , PERSON_ID = personId ,EFFECTIVE_DATE = trunc(StartTime))
(
	I=1

	WHILE ABS_EXT_ABSENCE_TYPE_ID.EXISTS(I) /*AND ABS_EXT_ABSENCE_TYPE[I]= l_abs_type*/ AND (ABS_EXT_APPROVAL_STATUS_CD[I] = 'APPROVED' and 
	/*or ABS_EXT_ABSENCE_STATUS_CD[I] = 'SAVED' or*/ ABS_EXT_ABSENCE_STATUS_CD[I] ='SUBMITTED') 
	LOOP
	(
		
		IF (/*(ABS_EXT_ABSENCE_TYPE_ID[I]= l_abs_type_id or ABS_EXT_ABSENCE_TYPE[I]= l_abs_type ) and*/  (trunc(ABS_EXT_START_DATE[I]) >= trunc(StartTime)  and trunc(ABS_EXT_END_DATE[I]) <= trunc(EndTime) ))
		THEN
		(
		l_flag='Y'
		l_abs_start_date = ABS_EXT_START_DATE[I]
		l_abs_start_datetime = ABS_EXT_START_DATETIME[I]
		l_abs_end_date = ABS_EXT_END_DATE[I]
		l_abs_end_datetime = ABS_EXT_END_DATETIME[I]
		l_abs_start_date_duration = ABS_EXT_START_DATE_DURATION[I]
		l_abs_end_date_duration = ABS_EXT_END_DATE_DURATION[I]
        l_abs_type = ABS_EXT_ABSENCE_TYPE[I] 
		l_absence_status = ABS_EXT_ABSENCE_STATUS_CD[I]
        l_approval_status= ABS_EXT_APPROVAL_STATUS_CD[I]	
		exit
		)
		I=I+1
	)
)
Return l_flag ,l_abs_start_date,l_abs_type ,l_abs_end_date,l_abs_start_datetime,l_abs_end_datetime,l_abs_start_date_duration,l_abs_end_date_duration,l_absence_status,l_approval_status

/*******************************************************************************
*                                                                               *
* FORMULA NAME: GET_PAY_AVAILABILITY                                            *
*                                                                               *
* FORMULA TYPE: Payroll Access to HR                                            *
*                                                                               *
* DESCRIPTION: This formula will return the Duration from Availability          *
*                                                                               *
*                                                                               *
*  Change History                                                               *
*  ---------------                                                              *
*                                                                               *
*  Who        Date       Description                                            *
*  ---------- ---------- --------------------------------------                 *
*  Nprasath   10-Mar-11  Created                                                *
*  vdharmap   Oct-2012   added a day to end date to cover for midnight and
*                        missing day
*
*  vdharmap   13-Nov-2013 Bug 17790639 - UPTAKE WORK SCHEDULE API ENHANCEMENT IN GLOBAL PAYROLL FORMULA  
*                                                                               *
*                                                                               *
********************************************************************************/
DEFAULT FOR ENTRY_LEVEL       IS 'AP'
Inputs are
            actual_start_date (date),
            actual_end_date (date),
            unit_type (text),
            hr_assign_id,
            entry_level(text)

  l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('(GLBEARN) Inside Formula GET PAY AVAILABILITY ')
  l_hr_assignment_id = hr_assign_id
  l_entry_level=entry_level
  l_actual_end_date = add_days(actual_end_date,1) /* since it 12:00 am, adding a day i.e 24hrs to get correct hours */
  l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('(GLBEARN) Inside Formula GET PAY AVAILABILITY - entry level' || l_entry_level)
  l_default_hours_per_day = 8
 
  /* Call to Core HR Availability API to get the actual number of Hours Worked

               Parameters passed:
               -----------------
               p_resource_id => Assignment Id or Term Id from context
               p_resource_type default ASSIGN or EMPTERM_AGGR 
               p_period_start   Period Start
               p_period_end     Period End
               p_use_sch_asg   DEFAULT 'Y'
               p_use_sch_inh   DEFAULT 'Y'
               p_include_noshift DEFAULT 'N'
               p_include_calevents DEFAULT 'Y'
               p_calc_units        DEFAULT 'H'
               -- added params below after HR enh, bug 17790639  --
               p_get_full_pay_period     DEFAULT 'N'
               p_use_working_hour_method DEFAULT 'N'
               p_default_hours_per_day   DEFAULT 0
               p_default_start_time	 DEFAULT '8:30'  -- The format of time is 'hh24:mi' 
               p_default_work_week	 DEFAULT '0-1-1-1-1-1-0'  -- work week starting from Sunday

   */

   l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('(GLBEARN) HR_ASSIGNMENT_ID : '||TO_CHAR(l_hr_assignment_id))
   l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('(GLBEARN) actual_start_date : '||To_CHAR(actual_start_date))
   l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('(GLBEARN) actual_end_date : '||TO_CHAR(l_actual_end_date))

   CHANGE_CONTEXTS (HR_ASSIGNMENT_ID = l_hr_assignment_id)
  (
      l_units = 0
      l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('(GLBEARN) HR_ASSIGNMENT_ID '||TO_CHAR(l_hr_assignment_id))
      IF (l_entry_level = 'AP' or ENTRY_LEVEL = 'PT' ) THEN
      (
         l_resource_type = 'EMPTERM_AGGR'
      )
      ELSE IF (l_entry_level = 'PA' ) THEN
      (
           l_resource_type = 'ASSIGN'
      )
      l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('(GLBEARN) RESOURCE_TYPE '|| l_resource_type)
   
      l_units = GET_PAY_AVAILABILITY( l_resource_type,actual_start_date,l_actual_end_date,'Y','Y','N','N',unit_type,'Y','Y',l_default_hours_per_day,'8:30','0-1-1-1-1-1-0') 
      l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('(GLBEARN) UNITS '||TO_CHAR(l_units))
   )
   return l_units

/*******************************************************************************
*                                                                               *
* FORMULA NAME: GET_PAY_SALARY_BASIS                                            *
*                                                                               *
* FORMULA TYPE: Payroll Access to HR                                            *
*                                                                               *
* DESCRIPTION: This formula will return the Salary Amount and Periodicity       *
*                                                                               *
*                                                                               *
*  Change History                                                               *
*  ---------------                                                              *
*                                                                               *
*  Who        Date       Description                                            *
*  ---------- ---------- --------------------------------------                 *
*  Nprasath   10-Mar-11  Created                                                *
                                                                                *
                                                                                *
********************************************************************************/
DEFAULT FOR CMP_TERM_SALARY_AMOUNT IS 0
DEFAULT FOR CMP_TERM_SALARY_BASIS_CODE IS 'ANNUAL'
DEFAULT FOR CMP_ASSIGNMENT_SALARY_AMOUNT IS 0
DEFAULT FOR CMP_ASSIGNMENT_SALARY_BASIS_CODE IS 'ANNUAL'
DEFAULT FOR CMP_ASSIGNMENT_SALARY_ANNUALIZATION_FACTOR IS 0
DEFAULT FOR CMP_TERM_SALARY_ANNUALIZATION_FACTOR IS 0
DEFAULT FOR CMP_ASSIGNMENT_SALARY_ANNUAL_FULLTIME_AMOUNT IS 0
DEFAULT FOR CMP_TERM_SALARY_ANNUAL_FULLTIME_AMOUNT IS 0
DEFAULT FOR CMP_ASSIGNMENT_SALARY_ANNUAL_AMOUNT IS 0
DEFAULT FOR CMP_TERM_SALARY_ANNUAL_AMOUNT IS 0

Inputs are hr_assign_id,
           hr_trm_id,
           hr_effective_date (date),
           hr_entry_level (text)

  l_hr_assignment_id = hr_assign_id
  l_hr_trm_id =  hr_trm_id
 l_annual_salary = 0
 l_dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('(GLBEARN) Inside the GET_PAY_SALARY_BASIS')
 l_dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('(GLBEARN) HR_ASSIGN_ID : '||TO_CHAR(l_hr_assignment_id))
 l_dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('(GLBEARN) HR_TRM_ID : '||TO_CHAR(l_hr_trm_id))
 l_dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('(GLBEARN) EFFECTIVE_DATE : '||TO_CHAR(hr_effective_date))
 l_dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('(GLBEARN) HR_ENTRY_LEVEL : '||hr_entry_level)

 CHANGE_CONTEXTS (EFFECTIVE_DATE = hr_effective_date)
 (
   IF (hr_entry_level = 'PT'or hr_entry_level = 'AP' ) THEN
     (
  
        CHANGE_CONTEXTS (HR_TERM_ID = l_hr_trm_id)
        (
      /* Term Level DBIs are taken for calculation*/
         l_salary = CMP_TERM_SALARY_AMOUNT
         l_salary_basis_code = CMP_TERM_SALARY_BASIS_CODE
         l_full_time_salary = CMP_TERM_SALARY_ANNUAL_FULLTIME_AMOUNT
         l_annual_salary = CMP_TERM_SALARY_ANNUAL_AMOUNT
         )
     )
     ELSE IF (hr_entry_level) = 'PA' THEN
     (
         /*Assignment Level DBIs are taken for Calculation*/
         CHANGE_CONTEXTS (HR_ASSIGNMENT_ID = l_hr_assignment_id)
        (
            l_salary = CMP_ASSIGNMENT_SALARY_AMOUNT
            l_salary_basis_code = CMP_ASSIGNMENT_SALARY_BASIS_CODE
            l_full_time_salary = CMP_ASSIGNMENT_SALARY_ANNUAL_FULLTIME_AMOUNT
            l_annual_salary = CMP_ASSIGNMENT_SALARY_ANNUAL_AMOUNT
        )
     )
   )
   l_dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('(GLBEARN) Salary : '||TO_CHAR(l_salary))
   l_dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('(GLBEARN) Salary basis code : '||l_salary_basis_code)
   l_dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('(GLBEARN) Annual Salary : '||TO_CHAR(l_annual_salary))
   return l_salary, l_salary_basis_code, l_full_time_salary,l_annual_salary

/****************************************************************************************
* $Header:                                                                              *
* Formula Name : CA_VACATION_LIABILITY_CALC_LOS                                         *
* Formula Type : Payroll                                                                *
* Description  :                                                                       *
*                                                                                       *
*****************************************************************************************/
DEFAULT FOR PER_ASG_PAYROLL_INFO_HR_TERM_ID  IS 0
DEFAULT FOR PER_TERM_REL_DATE_START          IS '0001/01/01 00:00:00' (DATE)

INPUTS ARE p_employment_level(Text),
           p_assignment_id(Number),
	   vacation_serv_date (DATE)

l_hr_term_id                    = 0
l_vacation_serv_date            = TO_DATE('0001/01/01 00:00:00','YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS')

l_eff_date  = GET_CONTEXT(EFFECTIVE_DATE,'0001/01/01 00:00:00' (date))

dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('[CA_VACATION_LIABILITY_CALC_LOS] - Effective Date : '|| to_char(l_eff_date))
     
dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('[CA_VACATION_LIABILITY_CALC_LOS] - Employment Level passed : '|| p_employment_level)
dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('[CA_VACATION_LIABILITY_CALC_LOS] - Vacation Service Date passed : '|| TO_CHAR(vacation_serv_date))

/* If Vacation service date is equal to  default date  - (0001/01/01) or greater than Pay period date,then we are using hire date to calculate LOS */
IF((vacation_serv_date = l_vacation_serv_date) OR (vacation_serv_date >= l_eff_date)) THEN
(
	IF (p_employment_level= 'PA') THEN
	(
	CHANGE_CONTEXTS (HR_ASSIGNMENT_ID = p_assignment_id)
	(
		l_hr_term_id            = PER_ASG_PAYROLL_INFO_HR_TERM_ID
	)
	)
	ELSE IF (p_employment_level = 'AP') THEN
	(
	l_hr_term_id               = p_assignment_id
	)

	dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('[CA_VACATION_LIABILITY_CALC_LOS] - Employee HR Term Id : '|| to_char(l_hr_term_id))

	/* Derive Hire Date of employee term */
	CHANGE_CONTEXTS (HR_TERM_ID = l_hr_term_id)
	(
		l_emp_hire_date      = PER_TERM_REL_DATE_START
	)

	dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('[CA_VACATION_LIABILITY_CALC_LOS] - Employee Hire Date : '|| to_char(l_emp_hire_date))
    
	/* Calculate LOS based on Employee hire date */
	l_length_of_service = TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(l_eff_date,l_emp_hire_date)/12,2)
)
ELSE 
(
	/*CAlculate LOS based on vacation service Date*/
	l_length_of_service = TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(l_eff_date,vacation_serv_date)/12,2)

)

dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('[CA_VACATION_LIABILITY_CALC_LOS] - Employee Length Of Service : '|| to_char(l_length_of_service))

RETURN l_length_of_service

/*
Formula to call HRX_GLB_GET_PAY_AVAILABILITY function to retrun availability work days.
Type: Payroll Access to HR

*/
inputs are 
actual_start_date(date),

actual_start_date,

'Y',

unit_type,
'Y',
'Y',

'8:30',
'0-1-1-1-1-1-0')
)
l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('[TEST_GET_PAY_AVAIABILITY] Work Days/hours is :' || to_char(l_units))
RETURN l_units

/*********************************************/
/* This formula return contract information  */
/* needed by PAS formula                     */
/*********************************************/
default for PER_CONTRACT_LEG_DDF_FR_CTR_DURATION_TYPE is ' ' /* null, FIXED_TERM, PERMANENT */
default for PER_CONTRACT_LEG_DDF_FR_CTR_SUB_TYPE is ' ' /* ORA_PERIOD_APPRENTICE */
default for PER_CONTRACT_LEG_DDF_FR_CONTRACT_SUB_TYPE_START_DATE is '0001/01/01 00:00:00' (date)
default for PER_CONTRACT_LEG_DDF_FR_CTR_SUB_TYPE_END_DATE is '4712/12/31 00:00:00' (date)
default for PER_ASG_CONTRACT_DURATION is 0
default for PER_ASG_CONTRACT_DURATION_UNITS is ' ' /* M/H/D/W/Y */
default for PER_ASG_CONTRACT_EFFECTIVE_START_DATE is  '0001/01/01 00:00:00' (date)
default for PER_ASG_CONTRACT_END_DATE is  '0001/01/01 00:00:00' (date)
default for PER_ASG_CONTRACT_NUM_OF_EXTENSIONS is 0 
default for PER_ASG_CONTRACT_TYPE is ' ' /* FR_TRN_AGREEMENT,STANDARD , APPRENTICESHIP */

INPUTS ARE p_term_id 

l_ff_name = 'ORA_HRX_FR_PAS_CONTRACT_INFO:: '
dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE(l_ff_name || 'Entering')
l_eff_date = GET_CONTEXT(EFFECTIVE_DATE, '0001/01/01 00:00:00' (date))
CHANGE_CONTEXTS(HR_ASSIGNMENT_ID = p_term_id) (
  l_duration = PER_ASG_CONTRACT_DURATION
  l_duration_unit = PER_ASG_CONTRACT_DURATION_UNITS
  l_ctr_start = PER_ASG_CONTRACT_EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
  l_ctr_end = PER_ASG_CONTRACT_END_DATE
  l_ctr_ext = PER_ASG_CONTRACT_NUM_OF_EXTENSIONS
  l_ctr_type = PER_ASG_CONTRACT_TYPE
)
CHANGE_CONTEXTS(HR_TERM_ID = p_term_id) (
  l_ctr_du_type = PER_CONTRACT_LEG_DDF_FR_CTR_DURATION_TYPE
  l_ctr_sub = PER_CONTRACT_LEG_DDF_FR_CTR_SUB_TYPE
  l_ctr_sub_start = PER_CONTRACT_LEG_DDF_FR_CONTRACT_SUB_TYPE_START_DATE
  l_ctr_sub_end   = PER_CONTRACT_LEG_DDF_FR_CTR_SUB_TYPE_END_DATE
)
c_short_term = 'N'
c_emp_scheme = ' '
dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE(l_ff_name || 'Ctr Duration :: ' || to_char(l_duration))
dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE(l_ff_name || 'Ctr Duration Unit :: ' || l_duration_unit)
dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE(l_ff_name || 'Ctr Start :: ' || to_char(l_ctr_start,'DD/MM/YYYY'))
dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE(l_ff_name || 'Ctr End :: ' || to_char(l_ctr_end,'DD/MM/YYYY'))
dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE(l_ff_name || 'Ctr Extension :: ' || to_char(l_ctr_ext))
dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE(l_ff_name || 'Ctr Type :: ' || l_ctr_type)
dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE(l_ff_name || 'Ctr Duration Type :: ' || l_ctr_du_type)
dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE(l_ff_name || 'Ctr Sub Type :: ' || l_ctr_sub)
dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE(l_ff_name || 'Ctr Sub Start :: ' || to_char(l_ctr_sub_start,'DD/MM/YYYY'))
dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE(l_ff_name || 'Ctr Sub End :: ' || to_char(l_ctr_sub_end,'DD/MM/YYYY'))

IF (l_ctr_type = 'STANDARD' and l_ctr_du_type = 'PERMANENT' and l_ctr_sub = 'ORA_PERIOD_APPRENTICE') THEN (
   IF (l_eff_date >= l_ctr_sub_start and l_eff_date <= l_ctr_sub_end) THEN (
      c_emp_scheme = 'APPRENTICE'
   )
)
IF (l_ctr_type = 'APPRENTICESHIP' and l_ctr_du_type = 'FIXED_TERM') THEN (
   c_emp_scheme = 'APPRENTICE'
)
IF (l_ctr_type = 'FR_TRN_AGREEMENT') THEN (
   c_emp_scheme = 'TRAINEE'
)
/* Checking for short term contract */
IF (l_ctr_start > '0001/01/01 00:00:00' (date) and l_ctr_du_type = 'FIXED_TERM')  THEN (
   dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE(l_ff_name || 'Checking contract')
   IF ((l_duration_unit = 'M' and l_duration <= 2) or
       (l_duration_unit = 'D' and l_duration <= 60) or
       (l_duration_unit = 'W' and l_duration <= 8) or
       (l_duration_unit = 'H')) THEN (
        c_short_term = 'Y'
   )
)
dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE(l_ff_name || 'Short Term Ctr :: ' || c_short_term)
dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE(l_ff_name || 'Emp Scheme :: ' || c_emp_scheme)

RETURN c_short_term, c_emp_scheme

inputs are
            value_name (text_number),
            value_value (text_number),
            value_datatype (text_number)

     AMOUNT = 0
     PERIODICITY = 'YEARLY'
     CURRENCY = 'USD'

     l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('[RATE_FML] - count is                  : ' || to_char(value_name.count))
     l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('[RATE_FML] - count2 is                 : ' || to_char(value_value.count))
     l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('[RATE_FML] - count3 is                 : ' || to_char(value_datatype.count))

     l_job_id = PER_ASG_JOB_ID
     l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('[RATE_FML] - l_job_id is                  : ' || to_char(l_job_id))

     i = 0
     while (i < value_name.count) loop
     (
         l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('[RATE_FML] - name is                  : ' || value_name[i])
         l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('[RATE_FML] - value is                 : ' || value_value[i])
         l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('[RATE_FML] - datatype is              : ' || value_datatype[i])

         if(value_name[i] = 'PER_ASG_JOB_ID') then
         (

             l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('[RATE_FML] - l_job_id has been set with          : ' || to_char(l_job_id))
         )

         i = i + 1
     )

     CHANGE_CONTEXTS(JOB_ID = l_job_id)
     (
         l_t_dummy = PER_ASG_ELIG_JOBS_CURRENCY
         l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('[RATE_FML] - l_t_dummy is                  : ' || l_t_dummy)
         if(l_t_dummy != 'UNKNOW') then
         (
             CURRENCY = l_t_dummy
         )

         l_dt_dummy = PER_ASG_ELIG_JOBS_END_DATE
         l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('[RATE_FML] - l_dt_dummy is                  : ' || to_char(l_dt_dummy))

         l_t_dummy = PER_ASG_ELIG_JOBS_FREQUECY
         l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('[RATE_FML] - l_t_dummy is                  : ' || l_t_dummy)
         if(l_t_dummy != 'UNKNOW') then
         (
             PERIODICITY = l_t_dummy
         )

         l_dt_dummy = PER_ASG_ELIG_JOBS_FROM_DATE
         l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('[RATE_FML] - l_dt_dummy is                  : ' || to_char(l_dt_dummy))

         l_t_dummy = PER_ASG_ELIG_JOBS_JOB_CODE
         l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('[RATE_FML] - l_t_dummy is                  : ' || l_t_dummy)

         l_n_dummy = PER_ASG_ELIG_JOBS_JOB_ID
         l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('[RATE_FML] - l_n_dummy is                  : '||to_char(l_n_dummy))

         l_t_dummy = PER_ASG_ELIG_JOBS_JOB_NAME
         l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('[RATE_FML] - l_t_dummy is                  : ' || l_t_dummy)

         l_n_dummy = PER_ASG_ELIG_JOBS_MANUAL_RATE
         l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('[RATE_FML] - l_n_dummy is                  : '||to_char(l_n_dummy))
         if(l_n_dummy > 0) then
         (
             AMOUNT = l_n_dummy
         )
     )

return AMOUNT, PERIODICITY, CURRENCY

default for measure(number)  is  0 
default for LayerGroupType(Text)  is  '--null--' 

INPUTS ARE   
   measure(number) ,
   LayerGroupType

/*  Following 2 lines are required right after inputs for all OTL and HWM formulas */
ffs_id = GET_CONTEXT(HWM_FFS_ID, 0)
rule_id = GET_CONTEXT(HWM_RULE_ID, 0)  

rlog =  add_rlog (ffs_id , rule_id , 'FFTEST_WFM_WCR_MISSING_TIME_CARD  v- 137.0525' )

NullDate =  '01-JAN-1900'(DATE)  
NullText =  '--NULL--'
 
rec_position = GET_CONTEXT(HWM_RECORD_POSITION, 'DETAIL') 
rlog =  add_rlog (ffs_id , rule_id , 'GET_CONTEXT ' || 
 ' , rec_position ='  ||  rec_position ||    
 ' , LayerGroupType ='  ||  LayerGroupType ||    
 ' , measure ='  ||  TO_CHAR( measure )  ||
 ' , ffs_id ='  ||  TO_CHAR( ffs_id ) )

  
pMsgCd    = get_rvalue_text (rule_id ,'MESSAGE_CODE', 'FND_TEXT_MESSAGE_FORMAT')  
pTagVals  = get_rvalue_text (rule_id ,'TAGS_COMMA_SEPARATED', NullText) 
rlog =  add_rlog (ffs_id , rule_id , ' , pMsgCd='  ||   pMsgCd ||   
  ' , pTagVals='  || pTagVals )

if (LayerGroupType = 'REPORTED_TIME_CARD_MISSING' ) then (
	tkn = 'TEXT'  
	val =   'Empty Time card: '  

	tm =  get_output_msg1 ( 'FND' ,pMsgCd ,tkn , val ) 								
	if (pTagVals <> NullText) then ( 
		tm = get_msg_tags(pTagVals)  || tm
	)  
	rLog =  add_rlog (ffs_id , rule_id ,'out_msg= '  || tm )

	OUT_MSG  = tm 
)
   

RETURN  OUT_MSG

/* +======================================================================+
   |                Copyright (c) 2009 Oracle Corporation                 |
   |                   Redwood Shores, California, USA                    |
   |                        All rights reserved.                          |
   +======================================================================+
 *
 * Formula Name : ORA_WFM_WCR_MISSING_TIME_CARD_AP 
 *                 
 * Formula Type:  Workforce Compliance Rules
 *         
 * Description:   Evaluate whether a time card exists.	
 *         
 * Detail:        Checks the reported time card layer to 
 *                see if a time card exists for the worker, 
 *                for the time card period. If there isn't one,  
 *                the formula creates an exception message.	
 *    
 *
 *  Change History
 *  --------------
 *
 *  Who               Ver           Date            Description
 *-----------------  ------       ------------     -----------------------------------------
 * David Cohanoff    13.804.10    2018-APR-10      Created. 
 *
 * 
***************************************************************************/  
DEFAULT FOR HWM_CTXARY_RECORD_POSITIONS   is  EMPTY_TEXT_NUMBER  
DEFAULT FOR measure    is  EMPTY_NUMBER_NUMBER  
DEFAULT FOR StartTime  is  EMPTY_DATE_NUMBER
DEFAULT FOR StopTime   is  EMPTY_DATE_NUMBER  
 
DEFAULT FOR LayerGroupType  is  EMPTY_TEXT_NUMBER
 


INPUTS ARE 
	HWM_CTXARY_RECORD_POSITIONS, 
	measure  , 
	StartTime,
	StopTime,  
	LayerGroupType  

/*  Following 2 lines are required right after inputs for all OTL and HWM formulas */
ffs_id = GET_CONTEXT(HWM_FFS_ID, 0)
rule_id = GET_CONTEXT(HWM_RULE_ID, 0)  

ffName = 'ORA_WFM_WCR_MISSING_TIME_CARD_AP v13.804.10 '
rLog  = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, '>>> Enter - ' || ffName  )  

NullDate =  '01-JAN-1900'(DATE)  
NullDateTime = '1900/01/01 00:00:00' (date)   
NullText = '**FF_NULL**'

RecPositoinEoPeriod = 'END_PERIOD' 
RecPositoinEoDay = 'END_DAY' 
RecPositoinDetail = 'DETAIL' 
 
   
						
OUT_MSG = EMPTY_TEXT_NUMBER 

pMsgCd    = get_rvalue_text (rule_id ,'OVERRIDE_MSG_CD', 'HWM_FF_WCR_MISSING_TIME_CARD')  
pTagVals  = get_rvalue_text (rule_id ,'TAGS_COMMA_SEPARATED', NullText) 

rLog= add_rlog (ffs_id , rule_id , 'Rule Parameters: '   ||
						' pMsgCd='  ||   pMsgCd ||  
						'; pTagVals='  || pTagVals )

tcRecCount = HWM_CTXARY_RECORD_POSITIONS.count  
rLog  = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, 'Process detail records TotalCount=' || TO_CHAR(tcRecCount) )   
  
nidx = 0
WHILE (nidx < tcRecCount ) LOOP
 (	
    nidx = nidx + 1	 
	tcMeasure = 0   
    tcStartTime = NullDate 
	tcLayerGroupType = nullText
	 
	tcRecPos   = HWM_CTXARY_RECORD_POSITIONS[nidx] 
	if (MEASURE.exists(nidx) ) then ( tcMeasure  = MEASURE[nidx]   )   
   	if (STARTTIME.exists(nidx) ) then (tcStartTime  = STARTTIME[nidx]  ) 
	if (LayerGroupType.exists(nidx) ) then ( tcLayerGroupType  = LayerGroupType[nidx]  )   
	
				 
	rLog = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, 'TimeCard Row: '  ||  TO_CHAR( nidx ) ||
								  ' , tcRecPos='      || tcRecPos || 
								  ' , tcMeasure='      || TO_CHAR( tcMeasure )   ||      
								  ' , tcStartTime='      || TO_CHAR( tcStartTime )   ||    
								  ' , tcLayerGroupType='  ||  tcLayerGroupType    ) 

  
  
	if (tcLayerGroupType = 'REPORTED_TIME_CARD_MISSING' ) then 
	(
		/* HWM_FF_WCR_MISSING_TIME_CARD	The time card is missing. */ 
		msgVal =  get_output_msg ( 'FND' ,pMsgCd ) 								
		if (pTagVals <> NullText) then ( 
			msgVal = get_msg_tags(pTagVals)  || msgVal
		)  
		rLog =  add_rlog (ffs_id , rule_id ,'out_msg= '  || msgVal )
	    OUT_MSG[nidx] =  msgVal   
		Exit  /* Exit once missing time card found  */
	)
   
	 
	if (nidx >  500 ) Then (
		/* endless loop?  Stop process if more than max_loop records found */
		ex = raise_error (ffs_id, rule_id, 'Formula ' || ffName || ' terminated due to possible end-less loop.' )
	)
			 
	     
)  /* end WHILE nidx   */
 
rLog  = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, '>>> Exit ' || ffName  )  


RETURN  OUT_MSG

pMinHr  = get_rvalue_number (rule_id  ,'DEFINED_LIMIT', 0) 
pTagVals  = get_rvalue_text (rule_id ,'TAGS_COMMA_SEPARATED', 'WCR')  
pMsgcd  = get_rvalue_text (rule_id  ,'MESSAGE_CODE', 'HWM_FF_TER_PERIOD_LS_MIN_WRN')  
pTimeCatId  =  get_rvalue_number (rule_id ,'WORKED_TIME_CONDITION', 0)    
 

 rLog = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, '(Rule parameters: '  ||  
							'; ffs_id='  ||  TO_CHAR( ffs_id ) ||    
							'; rule_id='  ||  TO_CHAR( rule_id )  ||   
							';pMinHr  ='  ||  TO_CHAR( pMinHr  )  ||  
							'; pMsgcd='  ||  pMsgcd ||    
							'; pTimeCatId='  ||  TO_CHAR( pTimeCatId ) )
 

wk_hrs_total_day  = 0
wk_hrs_total_tc   = 0    
   
max_ary = HWM_CTXARY_RECORD_POSITIONS.count 
out_msg_ary 	=	EMPTY_TEXT_NUMBER  
			 
nidx = 0
WHILE (nidx < max_ary ) LOOP
(	  
    nidx = nidx + 1	 
	tcMEASURE = 0  
	
	/*if (HWM_CTXARY_RECORD_POSITIONS.exists(nidx) ) then  */
	tcRecPos   = HWM_CTXARY_RECORD_POSITIONS[nidx] 
	if (MEASURE.exists(nidx) ) then ( tcMEASURE  = MEASURE[nidx] )  
				
	if (tcRecPos = RecPositoinDetail and 	tcMEASURE > 0) then (
		wk_hrs_total_day  = wk_hrs_total_day + tcMEASURE
		wk_hrs_total_tc   =  wk_hrs_total_tc + tcMEASURE    
   
	)
	
    rLog  = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id,  'TIMECARD_INPUT Row:='  ||  TO_CHAR( nidx )  ||  
							'; tcRecPos='  ||tcRecPos  ||  
							'; tcMEASURE='  ||  TO_CHAR( tcMEASURE )  ||  
							'; wk_hrs_total_day='  ||  TO_CHAR( wk_hrs_total_day )  ||  
							'; wk_hrs_total_tc='  ||  TO_CHAR( wk_hrs_total_tc ) )
	
	
	ocMsg = NullText	
	CHANGE_CONTEXTS(HWM_RECORD_POSITION = tcRecPos) 
	( 
		CALL_FORMULA ('WFM_PERIOD_MINIMUM_TIME_ENTRY_RULE_SUB'  
					  ,ffs_id > 'ffs_id' 
					  ,rule_id > 'rule_id' 
					  ,tcMEASURE > 'measure' 
					  ,sum_lvl > 'sum_lvl' 
					  ,empty_tc > 'empty_tc' 
					  ,pMinHr > 'l_min_hr'  
					  ,pMsgcd > 'l_msg_cd' 
					  ,tcRecPos > 'tcRecPos' 
					  ,wk_hrs_total_day > 'wk_hrs_total_day' 
					  ,wk_hrs_total_tc > 'wk_hrs_total_tc' 
					  , ocMsg     <  'OUT_MSG'  DEFAULT NullText  ) 
	) 
 
	if (ocMsg <> NullText) Then ( 
		smsg =   get_msg_tags(pTagVals)  || ocMsg
		out_msg_ary[nidx]   =  smsg
		rLog  = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, 'ocMsg text:'  || smsg)
	) 
	  
	if (tcRecPos = RecPositoinEoDay ) then (
		wk_hrs_total_day  = 0
	) else if (tcRecPos = RecPositoinEoPeriod ) then (
		wk_hrs_total_day  = 0
		wk_hrs_total_tc   =  0
	)
	
	if (nidx >  100 ) Then (
		/* endless loop?  Stop process if more than max_loop records found */
		ex = raise_error (ffs_id, rule_id, 'Formula ' || ffName || ' terminated due to possible end-less loop.' )
	)
			
)  

rLog  = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, 'Exit: ' || ffName  )

RETURN  out_msg_ary

/***********************************************************
FORMULA NAME : ORA_PAY_RPT_PSU_SECURITY_VALIDATE_FF 
FORMULA TYPE : Extract Advanced Condition
DESCRIPTION: This formula is to validate person's PSU security.

MODIFIED   (MM/DD/YY)
jianztia    01/02/20 - Created
************************************************************/

ALIAS ORA_PAY_RPT_ORG_SECURITY_ORGANIZATION_ID AS SECURED_ORG

DEFAULT FOR SECURED_ORG IS 0

DEFAULT FOR DATA_ELEMENTS      IS EMPTY_TEXT_TEXT
DEFAULT FOR PARAMS             IS EMPTY_TEXT_TEXT
DEFAULT FOR L_RPT_SECURED_FLAG IS ' '

INPUTS ARE DATA_ELEMENTS (TEXT_TEXT)
,PARAMS (TEXT_TEXT)
,L_RPT_SECURED_FLAG (TEXT)

/* Formula return value*/
DO_ACTION = 'N'

/* Local variables from Function*/
l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('L_RPT_SECURED_FLAG From Input ' || L_RPT_SECURED_FLAG)
IF L_RPT_SECURED_FLAG WAS DEFAULTED THEN (
  L_RPT_SECURED_FLAG = ORA_PAY_RPT_GET_SECURED_FLAG()
  l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('L_RPT_SECURED_FLAG From Function ' || L_RPT_SECURED_FLAG)
)
IF L_RPT_SECURED_FLAG = 'N' THEN (
  l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('Report is running in normal mode, DO_ACTION = Y, exit')
  DO_ACTION = 'Y'
  RETURN DO_ACTION
)

/* Local variables from Context*/
L_PSU_ID = GET_CONTEXT_VALUE_NUMBER('PAYROLL_STAT_UNIT_ID')
L_DATE_EARNED = GET_CONTEXT_VALUE_DATE('DATE_EARNED')
L_EFFECTIVE_DATE = GET_CONTEXT_VALUE_DATE('EFFECTIVE_DATE')
l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('PAYROLL_STAT_UNIT_ID From Context ' || TO_CHAR(L_PSU_ID))
l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('DATE_EARNED From Context ' || TO_CHAR(L_DATE_EARNED))
l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('EFFECTIVE_DATE From Context ' || TO_CHAR(L_EFFECTIVE_DATE))

/* ISNULL bug here: 'N' for null value, 'Y' otherwise */
IF ISNULL(L_PSU_ID) = 'N' THEN (
  l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('Get context data from de')

  IF NOT DATA_ELEMENTS.EXISTS('PAYROLL_STAT_UNIT_ID') THEN (
    l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('Data Element - PAYROLL_STAT_UNIT_ID does not exist, return N')
    RETURN DO_ACTION
  )
  L_PSU_ID = TO_NUMBER(DATA_ELEMENTS['PAYROLL_STAT_UNIT_ID'])

  IF DATA_ELEMENTS.EXISTS('DATE_EARNED') THEN (
    L_DATE_EARNED = TO_DATE(DATA_ELEMENTS['DATE_EARNED'])
  )

  IF DATA_ELEMENTS.EXISTS('EFFECTIVE_DATE') THEN (
    L_EFFECTIVE_DATE = TO_DATE(DATA_ELEMENTS['EFFECTIVE_DATE'])
  )
)

/* Check PSU security */
IF ISNULL(L_PSU_ID) = 'N' THEN (
  l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('L_PSU_ID is null, return N')
  RETURN DO_ACTION
) ELSE (
  l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('CALL PSU security DBI')
  CHANGE_CONTEXTS(ORGANIZATION_ID = L_PSU_ID, DATE_EARNED = L_DATE_EARNED, EFFECTIVE_DATE = L_EFFECTIVE_DATE) (
    IF SECURED_ORG WAS DEFAULTED OR ISNULL(SECURED_ORG) = 'N' THEN (
      l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('The PSU is secured, return N')
      RETURN DO_ACTION
    ) ELSE (
      l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('Person has secured PSU, DO_ACTION = Y')
      DO_ACTION = 'Y'
    )
  )
)

RETURN DO_ACTION
