/***********************************************************
FORMULA NAME : ORA_PAY_RPT_LOCATION_FILTER_FF 
FORMULA TYPE : Extract Advanced Condition
DESCRIPTION: This formula is to filter person's location data.

MODIFIED   (MM/DD/YY)
jianztia    01/02/20 - Created
************************************************************/

ALIAS ORA_PAY_RPT_PER_LOC_DEPT_LOCATION_ID AS LOC

DEFAULT FOR L_PARAM_LOC IS ' '
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR LOC IS 0

DEFAULT FOR DATA_ELEMENTS      IS EMPTY_TEXT_TEXT
DEFAULT FOR PARAMS             IS EMPTY_TEXT_TEXT
DEFAULT FOR LOC_ARRAY IS EMPTY_NUMBER_TEXT

INPUTS ARE DATA_ELEMENTS (TEXT_TEXT)
,PARAMS (TEXT_TEXT)
,L_PARAM_LOC (TEXT)

/* Formula return value*/
DO_ACTION = 'N'

/* Local variables from PARAMS*/
l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('L_PARAM_LOC From Input ' || L_PARAM_LOC)
IF L_PARAM_LOC WAS DEFAULTED THEN (
  IF PARAMS.EXISTS('LOCATION') THEN (
    L_PARAM_LOC = PARAMS['LOCATION']
    l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('L_PARAM_LOC From PARAMS ' || L_PARAM_LOC)
  ) ELSE (
    l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('Filter for location parameter is not set, DO_ACTION = Y, exit')
    DO_ACTION = 'Y'
    RETURN DO_ACTION
  )
)

/* Local variables for Array empty flag*/
L_LOC_ARRAY_EMPTY = 'Y'

/* Local variables from Context*/
L_PAY_REL_ID = GET_CONTEXT_VALUE_NUMBER('PAYROLL_RELATIONSHIP_ID')
L_DATE_EARNED = GET_CONTEXT_VALUE_DATE('DATE_EARNED')
L_EFFECTIVE_DATE = GET_CONTEXT_VALUE_DATE('EFFECTIVE_DATE')
l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('DATE_EARNED From Context ' || TO_CHAR(L_DATE_EARNED))
l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('EFFECTIVE_DATE From Context ' || TO_CHAR(L_EFFECTIVE_DATE))
l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('PAYROLL_RELATIONSHIP_ID From Context ' || TO_CHAR(L_PAY_REL_ID))

/* ISNULL bug here: 'N' for null value, 'Y' otherwise */
IF ISNULL(L_PAY_REL_ID) = 'N' THEN (
  l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('Get context data from de')

  IF NOT DATA_ELEMENTS.EXISTS('PAYROLL_RELATIONSHIP_ID') THEN (
    l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('Data Element - PAYROLL_RELATIONSHIP_ID does not exist, return N')
    RETURN DO_ACTION
  )
  L_PAY_REL_ID = TO_NUMBER(DATA_ELEMENTS['PAYROLL_RELATIONSHIP_ID'])

  IF DATA_ELEMENTS.EXISTS('DATE_EARNED') THEN (
    L_DATE_EARNED = TO_DATE(DATA_ELEMENTS['DATE_EARNED'])
  )

  IF DATA_ELEMENTS.EXISTS('EFFECTIVE_DATE') THEN (
    L_EFFECTIVE_DATE = TO_DATE(DATA_ELEMENTS['EFFECTIVE_DATE'])
  )
)

/* Check LOC parameter filter */
IF ISNULL(L_PAY_REL_ID) = 'N' THEN (
  l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('L_PAY_REL_ID is null, return N')
  RETURN DO_ACTION
) ELSE (
  /* Store location data to arrays */
  l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('CALL LOC DBIs')
  CHANGE_CONTEXTS(PAYROLL_RELATIONSHIP_ID = L_PAY_REL_ID, DATE_EARNED = L_DATE_EARNED, EFFECTIVE_DATE = L_EFFECTIVE_DATE) (
    l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('LOC DBI Value length: ' || TO_CHAR(LOC.COUNT))
    IF LOC WAS NOT DEFAULTED AND LOC.COUNT > 0 THEN (
      I = 1
      WHILE LOC.EXISTS(I) LOOP (
        l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('LOC['|| TO_CHAR(I) ||']: ' || TO_CHAR(LOC[I]))
        IF LOC[I] <> 0 THEN (
          l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('SET value to LOC_ARRAY')
          L_LOC_ARRAY_EMPTY = 'N'
          LOC_ARRAY[TO_CHAR(LOC[I])] = I
        )
        I = I + 1
      )
    )
  )

  /* Check location filter */
  l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('Filter for location parameter is set')
  IF L_LOC_ARRAY_EMPTY = 'Y' THEN (
    l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('Person doesn''t have location data, return N')
    RETURN DO_ACTION
  ) ELSE (
    IF NOT LOC_ARRAY.EXISTS(L_PARAM_LOC) THEN (
      l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('Person doesn''t have filtered location data, return N')
      RETURN DO_ACTION
    ) ELSE (
      l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('Person has filtered location data, DO_ACTION = Y')
      DO_ACTION = 'Y'
    )
  )
)

RETURN DO_ACTION

/* Formula : GB_EDI_VALIDATE_ARCHIVE_PAYE_REFERENCE */
            DEFAULT FOR DATA_ELEMENTS      IS EMPTY_TEXT_TEXT
            DEFAULT FOR DATE_ELEMENT_CODE  IS ' '
            DEFAULT FOR DATA_ELEMENT_VALUE IS ' '
            DEFAULT FOR PARAMS             IS EMPTY_TEXT_TEXT
            INPUTS ARE DATA_ELEMENTS (TEXT_TEXT)
            ,DATA_ELEMENT_CODE  (TEXT)
            ,DATA_ELEMENT_VALUE (TEXT)
            ,PARAMS (TEXT_TEXT)
           
            CharacterInvalid    = '~'
            CharacterSetMixChar = 'abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyzABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ'
            CharacterSetNumber  = '0123456789'
            CharacterSetExtra1  = '.,-()/=!"%&*;<>''+:? '
           
            DO_ACTION = 'Y'
            OFFICE_NO  = SUBSTR(DATA_ELEMENT_VALUE, 1, INSTR(DATA_ELEMENT_VALUE, '/')-1)
            OFFICE_REF = SUBSTR(DATA_ELEMENT_VALUE, INSTR(DATA_ELEMENT_VALUE, '/')+1)
                 
            if(DATA_ELEMENTS.exists('CB Higher Archive Type')) then
            (
              HIGHER_ARCHIVE_TYPE = DATA_ELEMENTS['CB Higher Archive Type']
              IF(HIGHER_ARCHIVE_TYPE != 'HRX_GB_P46_PENNOT' AND HIGHER_ARCHIVE_TYPE != 'HRX_GB_P45_3' and DATA_ELEMENT_CODE!='PAYE Reference' ) THEN
              (
                RETURN DO_ACTION
              )
                else if(HIGHER_ARCHIVE_TYPE = 'HRX_GB_P46_PENNOT' and DATA_ELEMENT_CODE != 'P46 PENNOT PAYE Reference' and DATA_ELEMENT_CODE!='PAYE Reference') then
                RETURN DO_ACTION
            )
           
            if(DATA_ELEMENTS.exists('P45_3 PAYE_REFERENCE') or DATA_ELEMENTS.exists('P46 PENNOT PAYE Reference') or DATA_ELEMENTS.exists('PAYE Reference')) then 
            (
              
              IF(LENGTH(OFFICE_NO) = 3) THEN
              (
                IF (LENGTH(TRANSLATE(OFFICE_NO,CharacterSetNumber,CharacterInvalid)) > 0) THEN DO_ACTION = 'N'              
              )
              ELSE
              (
                DO_ACTION = 'N' 
              )
               
                IF DO_ACTION = 'Y' THEN
                (
                IF (LENGTH(OFFICE_REF) > 0 AND (SUBSTR(OFFICE_REF,1,1) <> ' ')) THEN
                (
                IF (LENGTH(TRANSLATE(OFFICE_REF,CharacterInvalid || CharacterSetMixChar || CharacterSetNumber || CharacterSetExtra1,CharacterInvalid)) > 0) THEN
                  DO_ACTION = 'N'
                )
                ELSE
                (
                DO_ACTION = 'N'
                )
                )
            )
           
            RETURN DO_ACTION

/* Formula : GB_EDI_VALIDATE_PENNOT_ANNUAL_PENSION*/
DEFAULT FOR DATA_ELEMENTS      IS EMPTY_TEXT_TEXT
DEFAULT FOR DATE_ELEMENT_CODE  IS ' '
DEFAULT FOR DATA_ELEMENT_VALUE IS ' '
DEFAULT FOR PARAMS             IS EMPTY_TEXT_TEXT
INPUTS ARE DATA_ELEMENTS (TEXT_TEXT)
         ,DATA_ELEMENT_CODE  (TEXT)
         ,DATA_ELEMENT_VALUE (TEXT)
         ,PARAMS (TEXT_TEXT)

DO_ACTION = 'Y'

if(DATA_ELEMENTS.exists('P46 PENNOT Annual Pension')) then 
(  
  if (to_number(DATA_ELEMENT_VALUE) < 0) then (DO_ACTION = 'N')
)

RETURN DO_ACTION

/***********************************************************
FORMULA NAME : ORA_PAY_RPT_LOCATION_SECURITY_VALIDATE_FF 
FORMULA TYPE : Extract Advanced Condition
DESCRIPTION: This formula is to validate person's location security.

MODIFIED   (MM/DD/YY)
jianztia    01/02/20 - Created
************************************************************/

ALIAS ORA_PAY_RPT_LOC_SECURITY_LOCATION_ID AS SECURED_LOC
ALIAS ORA_PAY_RPT_PER_LOC_DEPT_LOCATION_ID AS LOC

DEFAULT FOR SECURED_LOC IS 0
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR LOC IS 0

DEFAULT FOR DATA_ELEMENTS      IS EMPTY_TEXT_TEXT
DEFAULT FOR PARAMS             IS EMPTY_TEXT_TEXT
DEFAULT FOR L_RPT_SECURED_FLAG IS ' '
DEFAULT FOR LOC_ARRAY IS EMPTY_NUMBER_NUMBER

INPUTS ARE DATA_ELEMENTS (TEXT_TEXT)
,PARAMS (TEXT_TEXT)
,L_RPT_SECURED_FLAG (TEXT)

/* Formula return value*/
DO_ACTION = 'N'

/* Local variables for Array empty flag*/
L_LOC_ARRAY_EMPTY = 'Y'

/* Local variables from Function*/
l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('L_RPT_SECURED_FLAG From Input ' || L_RPT_SECURED_FLAG)
IF L_RPT_SECURED_FLAG WAS DEFAULTED THEN (
  L_RPT_SECURED_FLAG = ORA_PAY_RPT_GET_SECURED_FLAG()
  l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('L_RPT_SECURED_FLAG From Function ' || L_RPT_SECURED_FLAG)
)
IF L_RPT_SECURED_FLAG = 'N' THEN (
  l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('Report is running in normal mode, DO_ACTION = Y, exit')
  DO_ACTION = 'Y'
  RETURN DO_ACTION
)

/* Local variables from Context*/
L_PAY_REL_ID = GET_CONTEXT_VALUE_NUMBER('PAYROLL_RELATIONSHIP_ID')
L_DATE_EARNED = GET_CONTEXT_VALUE_DATE('DATE_EARNED')
L_EFFECTIVE_DATE = GET_CONTEXT_VALUE_DATE('EFFECTIVE_DATE')
l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('DATE_EARNED From Context ' || TO_CHAR(L_DATE_EARNED))
l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('EFFECTIVE_DATE From Context ' || TO_CHAR(L_EFFECTIVE_DATE))
l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('PAYROLL_RELATIONSHIP_ID From Context ' || TO_CHAR(L_PAY_REL_ID))

/* ISNULL bug here: 'N' for null value, 'Y' otherwise */
IF ISNULL(L_PAY_REL_ID) = 'N' THEN (
  l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('Get context data from de')

  IF NOT DATA_ELEMENTS.EXISTS('PAYROLL_RELATIONSHIP_ID') THEN (
    l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('Data Element - PAYROLL_RELATIONSHIP_ID does not exist, return N')
    RETURN DO_ACTION
  )
  L_PAY_REL_ID = TO_NUMBER(DATA_ELEMENTS['PAYROLL_RELATIONSHIP_ID'])

  IF DATA_ELEMENTS.EXISTS('DATE_EARNED') THEN (
    L_DATE_EARNED = TO_DATE(DATA_ELEMENTS['DATE_EARNED'])
  )

  IF DATA_ELEMENTS.EXISTS('EFFECTIVE_DATE') THEN (
    L_EFFECTIVE_DATE = TO_DATE(DATA_ELEMENTS['EFFECTIVE_DATE'])
  )
)

/* Check LOC security */
IF ISNULL(L_PAY_REL_ID) = 'N' THEN (
  l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('L_PAY_REL_ID is null, return N')
  RETURN DO_ACTION
) ELSE (
  /* Store location data to arrays */
  l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('CALL LOC DBIs')
  CHANGE_CONTEXTS(PAYROLL_RELATIONSHIP_ID = L_PAY_REL_ID, DATE_EARNED = L_DATE_EARNED, EFFECTIVE_DATE = L_EFFECTIVE_DATE) (
    l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('LOC DBI Value length: ' || TO_CHAR(LOC.COUNT))
    IF LOC WAS NOT DEFAULTED AND LOC.COUNT > 0 THEN (
      I = 1
      WHILE LOC.EXISTS(I) LOOP (
        l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('LOC['|| TO_CHAR(I) ||']: ' || TO_CHAR(LOC[I]))
        IF LOC[I] <> 0 THEN (
          l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('SET value to LOC_ARRAY')
          L_LOC_ARRAY_EMPTY = 'N'
          LOC_ARRAY[I] = LOC[I]
        )
        I = I + 1
      )
    )
  )

  /* Check location security */
  IF L_LOC_ARRAY_EMPTY = 'N' THEN (
    l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('Check location security')
    I = 1
    WHILE LOC_ARRAY.EXISTS(I) LOOP (
      CHANGE_CONTEXTS(LOCATION_ID = LOC_ARRAY[I]) (
        IF SECURED_LOC WAS NOT DEFAULTED THEN (
          l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('Person has secured location data, DO_ACTION = Y')
          DO_ACTION = 'Y'
          EXIT
        )
      )
      I = I + 1
    )

    IF DO_ACTION = 'N' THEN (
      l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('Location is secured, return N')
      RETURN DO_ACTION
    )
  ) ELSE (
    /* FIXME: No UI is to set security profile for location, so skip location security check if person doesn't have location data */
    l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('No Location security is set, DO_ACTION = Y')
    DO_ACTION = 'Y'
  )
)

RETURN DO_ACTION

/* Formula : GB_EDI_VALIDATE_DATE_STARTED*/

DEFAULT FOR DATA_ELEMENTS      IS EMPTY_TEXT_TEXT
DEFAULT FOR DATE_ELEMENT_CODE  IS ' '
DEFAULT FOR DATA_ELEMENT_VALUE IS ' '
DEFAULT FOR PARAMS             IS EMPTY_TEXT_TEXT
INPUTS ARE DATA_ELEMENTS (TEXT_TEXT)
          ,DATA_ELEMENT_CODE  (TEXT)
          ,DATA_ELEMENT_VALUE (TEXT)
          ,PARAMS (TEXT_TEXT)
          
DO_ACTION = 'Y'  
DATE_RANGE = 30
 
IF (DATA_ELEMENTS.EXISTS('CB New Starter Hire Date') or DATA_ELEMENTS.EXISTS('P46 PENNOT Date PensionStarted')) THEN
(
  if (DATA_ELEMENT_VALUE <> '0001-01-01T00:00:00.000Z') then 
  (
    TEST_ID_USED = GET_PARAMETER_VALUE('TEST_ID')
    
    
    START_DATE = TO_DATE(SUBSTR(TRANSLATE(DATA_ELEMENT_VALUE, '01234567890:.-TZ', '01234567890:.- '), 1, 19), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')       
    CURRENT_DATE = TO_DATE(SUBSTR(TRANSLATE(GET_CONTEXT_VALUE('EFFECTIVE_DATE'), '01234567890:.-TZ', '01234567890:.- '), 1, 19), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')  

    D_STAT_END = ADD_DAYS(CURRENT_DATE, DATE_RANGE)  
    TEST_Y_STAT_END = ADD_YEARS(CURRENT_DATE, 1)
     
    IF(LENGTH(TEST_ID_USED)>0) THEN
    (
      IF(START_DATE > TEST_Y_STAT_END ) THEN
      (
         DO_ACTION = 'N'
      )
    )
      ELSE
    (
      IF(START_DATE > D_STAT_END ) THEN
      (
         DO_ACTION = 'N'
      )
    )
  )
    else
    (
      DO_ACTION = 'N'
    )
)

RETURN DO_ACTION

/* Formula : GB_EDI_VALIDATE_FIRST_CHAR_NOT_SPACE */
			DEFAULT FOR DATA_ELEMENTS      IS EMPTY_TEXT_TEXT
			DEFAULT FOR DATE_ELEMENT_CODE  IS ' '
			DEFAULT FOR DATA_ELEMENT_VALUE IS ' '
			DEFAULT FOR PARAMS             IS EMPTY_TEXT_TEXT
			INPUTS ARE DATA_ELEMENTS (TEXT_TEXT)
			,DATA_ELEMENT_CODE  (TEXT)
			,DATA_ELEMENT_VALUE (TEXT)
			,PARAMS (TEXT_TEXT)
			
			DO_ACTION = 'N'
			
			IF (LENGTH(TRIM(DATA_ELEMENT_VALUE)) > 0) THEN
			(
			IF (SUBSTR(DATA_ELEMENT_VALUE,1,1) <> ' ') THEN (DO_ACTION = 'Y')
			) ELSE (
			DO_ACTION = 'Y'
			)
			
			RETURN DO_ACTION

/***********************************************************
FORMULA NAME : ORA_PAY_RPT_DEPARTMENT_SECURITY_VALIDATE_FF 
FORMULA TYPE : Extract Advanced Condition
DESCRIPTION: This formula is to validate person's department security.

MODIFIED   (MM/DD/YY)
jianztia    01/02/20 - Created
************************************************************/

ALIAS ORA_PAY_RPT_ORG_SECURITY_ORGANIZATION_ID AS SECURED_ORG
ALIAS ORA_PAY_RPT_PER_LOC_DEPT_DEPARTMENT_ID AS DEPT

DEFAULT FOR SECURED_ORG IS 0
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR DEPT IS 0

DEFAULT FOR DATA_ELEMENTS      IS EMPTY_TEXT_TEXT
DEFAULT FOR PARAMS             IS EMPTY_TEXT_TEXT
DEFAULT FOR L_RPT_SECURED_FLAG IS ' '
DEFAULT FOR IS_DEPT_SECURED IS ' '
DEFAULT FOR DEPT_ARRAY IS EMPTY_NUMBER_NUMBER

INPUTS ARE DATA_ELEMENTS (TEXT_TEXT)
,PARAMS (TEXT_TEXT)
,L_RPT_SECURED_FLAG (TEXT)
,IS_DEPT_SECURED (TEXT)

/* Formula return value*/
DO_ACTION = 'N'

/* Local variables for Array empty flag*/
L_DEPT_ARRAY_EMPTY = 'Y'

/* Local variables from Function*/
l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('L_RPT_SECURED_FLAG From Input ' || L_RPT_SECURED_FLAG)
IF L_RPT_SECURED_FLAG WAS DEFAULTED THEN (
  L_RPT_SECURED_FLAG = ORA_PAY_RPT_GET_SECURED_FLAG()
  l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('L_RPT_SECURED_FLAG From Function ' || L_RPT_SECURED_FLAG)
)
IF L_RPT_SECURED_FLAG = 'N' THEN (
  l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('Report is running in normal mode, DO_ACTION = Y, exit')
  DO_ACTION = 'Y'
  RETURN DO_ACTION
)

l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('IS_DEPT_SECURED From Input ' || IS_DEPT_SECURED)
IF IS_DEPT_SECURED WAS DEFAULTED THEN (
  IS_DEPT_SECURED = ORA_PAY_RPT_IS_ORG_SECURED('DEPARTMENT')
  l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('IS_DEPT_SECURED From Function ' || IS_DEPT_SECURED)
)
IF IS_DEPT_SECURED = 'N' THEN (
  l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('Department security is not set or set to VIEW ALL, DO_ACTION = Y, exit')
  DO_ACTION = 'Y'
  RETURN DO_ACTION
)

/* Local variables from Context*/
L_PAY_REL_ID = GET_CONTEXT_VALUE_NUMBER('PAYROLL_RELATIONSHIP_ID')
L_DATE_EARNED = GET_CONTEXT_VALUE_DATE('DATE_EARNED')
L_EFFECTIVE_DATE = GET_CONTEXT_VALUE_DATE('EFFECTIVE_DATE')
l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('DATE_EARNED From Context ' || TO_CHAR(L_DATE_EARNED))
l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('EFFECTIVE_DATE From Context ' || TO_CHAR(L_EFFECTIVE_DATE))
l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('PAYROLL_RELATIONSHIP_ID From Context ' || TO_CHAR(L_PAY_REL_ID))

/* ISNULL bug here: 'N' for null value, 'Y' otherwise */
IF ISNULL(L_PAY_REL_ID) = 'N' THEN (
  l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('Get context data from de')

  IF NOT DATA_ELEMENTS.EXISTS('PAYROLL_RELATIONSHIP_ID') THEN (
    l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('Data Element - PAYROLL_RELATIONSHIP_ID does not exist, return N')
    RETURN DO_ACTION
  )
  L_PAY_REL_ID = TO_NUMBER(DATA_ELEMENTS['PAYROLL_RELATIONSHIP_ID'])

  IF DATA_ELEMENTS.EXISTS('DATE_EARNED') THEN (
    L_DATE_EARNED = TO_DATE(DATA_ELEMENTS['DATE_EARNED'])
  )

  IF DATA_ELEMENTS.EXISTS('EFFECTIVE_DATE') THEN (
    L_EFFECTIVE_DATE = TO_DATE(DATA_ELEMENTS['EFFECTIVE_DATE'])
  )
)

/* Check DEPT security */
IF ISNULL(L_PAY_REL_ID) = 'N' THEN (
  l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('L_PAY_REL_ID is null, return N')
  RETURN DO_ACTION
) ELSE (
  /* Store department data to arrays */
  l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('CALL DEPT DBIs')
  CHANGE_CONTEXTS(PAYROLL_RELATIONSHIP_ID = L_PAY_REL_ID, DATE_EARNED = L_DATE_EARNED, EFFECTIVE_DATE = L_EFFECTIVE_DATE) (
    l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('DEPT DBI Value length: ' || TO_CHAR(DEPT.COUNT))
    IF DEPT WAS NOT DEFAULTED AND DEPT.COUNT > 0 THEN (
      I = 1
      WHILE DEPT.EXISTS(I) LOOP (
        l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('DEPT['|| TO_CHAR(I) ||']: ' || TO_CHAR(DEPT[I]))
        IF DEPT[I] <> 0 THEN (
          l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('SET value to DEPT_ARRAY')
          L_DEPT_ARRAY_EMPTY = 'N'
          DEPT_ARRAY[I] = DEPT[I]
        )
        I = I + 1
      )
    )
  )

  /* Check department security */
  IF L_DEPT_ARRAY_EMPTY = 'N' THEN (
    l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('Check department security')
    I = 1
    WHILE DEPT_ARRAY.EXISTS(I) LOOP (
      CHANGE_CONTEXTS(ORGANIZATION_ID = DEPT_ARRAY[I], DATE_EARNED = L_DATE_EARNED, EFFECTIVE_DATE = L_EFFECTIVE_DATE) (
        IF SECURED_ORG WAS NOT DEFAULTED THEN (
          l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('Person has secured department data, DO_ACTION = Y')
          DO_ACTION = 'Y'
          EXIT
        )
      )
      I = I + 1
    )

    IF DO_ACTION = 'N' THEN (
      l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('Department is secured, return N')
      RETURN DO_ACTION
    )
  ) ELSE (
    l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('Person doesn''t have department data')
    return DO_ACTION
  )
)

RETURN DO_ACTION

/*
     Formula Name : DEDUCTION GROUP LEVEL SUMMARY FORMULA
     Decription
         This formula calls the formulae in the Deduction Group for the level passed as input
         - until membership has been established.

*/
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR DEDUCTION_GROUP_COMP_LEVEL_FORMULA_NAME is 'null'
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR DEDUCTION_GROUP_COMP_DET_LEVEL_FORMULA_NAME is 'null'
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR DEDUCTION_GROUP_PENS_COMP_DET_LEVEL_FORMULA_NAME is 'null'

INPUTS ARE level_name(text)

NEED_CONTEXT(DIR_CARD_COMP_ID)
NEED_CONTEXT(EFFECTIVE_DATE)

in_group = 'N'

IF (level_name = 'CARD_COMPONENT') THEN
  form_name = DEDUCTION_GROUP_COMP_LEVEL_FORMULA_NAME
IF (level_name = 'ORA_COMPONENT_DETAIL') THEN
  form_name = DEDUCTION_GROUP_COMP_DET_LEVEL_FORMULA_NAME
IF (level_name = 'ORA_PENSION_COMPONENT_DETAIL') THEN
  form_name = DEDUCTION_GROUP_PENS_COMP_DET_LEVEL_FORMULA_NAME

i=1
WHILE (form_name.exists(i)) LOOP
(
  EXECUTE (form_name[i])
  in_group = GET_OUTPUT('INCLUDE_FLAG', 'N')

  IF in_group = 'N' THEN
     EXIT

  i = i + 1
)

IF in_group = 'Y' THEN
  INCLUDE_FLAG = 'Y'

RETURN INCLUDE_FLAG

/**********************************************************************/
/* Name        : HRX_GB_START_OF_YEAR                                 */
/* Description : To determine if a PAYE record should be cleared down */
/**********************************************************************/

DEFAULT FOR PAY_DIR_COMP_DIR_CARD_ID IS 0
DEFAULT FOR PAY_DIR_COMP_CONTEXT_VALUE1 IS ' '
DEFAULT FOR GB_PAYE_HRX_GB_PAYE_PREVIOUS_TAXABLE_PAY_ON_P11 IS 0
DEFAULT FOR GB_PAYE_HRX_GB_PAYE_PREVIOUS_TAX_PAID_ON_P11 IS 0
DEFAULT FOR GB_PAYE_HRX_GB_PAYE_TAX_BASIS IS ' '

INCLUDE_FLAG = 'N'

dummy = ESS_LOG_WRITE('[Start of Year] : Formula Execution')

i_deduction_card_id = PAY_DIR_COMP_DIR_CARD_ID

dummy = ESS_LOG_WRITE('[Start of Year] : Dir Card Id = '||to_char(i_deduction_card_id))

CHANGE_CONTEXTS(DEDUCTION_CARD_ID = i_deduction_card_id)
(
  t_work_number = PAY_DIR_COMP_CONTEXT_VALUE1

  dummy = ESS_LOG_WRITE('[Start of Year] : HMRC Payroll Id = '||t_work_number)

  CHANGE_CONTEXTS(WORK_NUMBER = t_work_number)
  (
    IF ((GB_PAYE_HRX_GB_PAYE_PREVIOUS_TAXABLE_PAY_ON_P11 <> 0) OR (GB_PAYE_HRX_GB_PAYE_PREVIOUS_TAX_PAID_ON_P11 <> 0) OR (GB_PAYE_HRX_GB_PAYE_TAX_BASIS <> 'C')) THEN
      INCLUDE_FLAG = 'Y'
  )
)

dummy = ESS_LOG_WRITE('[Start of Year] : Include Flag = '||INCLUDE_FLAG)
dummy = ESS_LOG_WRITE('[Start of Year] : End Formula Execution')

RETURN INCLUDE_FLAG

/**********************************************************************/
/* Name        : HRX_GB_NI_CATEGORY_UPDATE_UNDER21                                    */
/* Description : To determine if an NI record should be updated for under 21 year old */
/**********************************************************************/
DEFAULT FOR HRX_GB_DATE_OF_BIRTH IS '0001/01/01 00:00:00' (date)
DEFAULT FOR PAY_DIR_COMP_DIR_CARD_ID IS 0
DEFAULT FOR PAY_DIR_COMP_CONTEXT_VALUE1 IS ' '

INCLUDE_FLAG = 'N'
i_age_limit = 21

dummy = ESS_LOG_WRITE('[NI Category Update] : Formula Execution')

d_dir_card_comp_id = GET_CONTEXT(DIR_CARD_COMP_ID,0)

dummy = ESS_LOG_WRITE('[NI Category Update] : Dir Card Comp Id = '||to_char(d_dir_card_comp_id))

d_effective_date = GET_CONTEXT(EFFECTIVE_DATE,'0001/01/01 00:00:00' (date))

d_birth = HRX_GB_DATE_OF_BIRTH

IF (HRX_GB_DATE_OF_BIRTH WAS DEFAULTED) THEN
 (
  dummy = ESS_LOG_WRITE('[NI Category Update] : Date of Birth Not Found') 
 )
ELSE
 (
  dummy = ESS_LOG_WRITE('[NI Category Update] : Date of Birth Found') 
	
  IF (ADD_YEARS(d_birth,i_age_limit) > d_effective_date) THEN
   (
    dummy = ESS_LOG_WRITE('[NI Category Update] : Under 21 Years Old') 

    i_deduction_card_id = PAY_DIR_COMP_DIR_CARD_ID

    dummy = ESS_LOG_WRITE('[NI Category Update] : Deduction Card Id = '||to_char(i_deduction_card_id))
      
    CHANGE_CONTEXTS(DEDUCTION_CARD_ID = i_deduction_card_id)
     (
      t_ni_category = PAY_DIR_COMP_CONTEXT_VALUE1
    
      dummy = ESS_LOG_WRITE('[NI Category Update] : NI Category = '||t_ni_category)

      IF ((t_ni_category = 'A') OR (t_ni_category = 'D') OR (t_ni_category = 'J') OR (t_ni_category = 'L')) THEN
       (
        INCLUDE_FLAG = 'Y'
       )
     )
   )	
 )

RETURN INCLUDE_FLAG

/******************************************************************/
/* Name        : HRX_GB_TAX_CODE_UPLIFT                           */
/* Description : To determine if a PAYE record should be uplifted */
/******************************************************************/
DEFAULT FOR HRX_GB_TERMINATION_DATE IS '0001/01/01 00:00:00' (date)
DEFAULT FOR PAY_DIR_COMP_DIR_CARD_ID IS 0
DEFAULT FOR PAY_DIR_COMP_CONTEXT_VALUE1 IS ' '
DEFAULT FOR GB_PAYE_HRX_GB_PAYE_TAX_CODE IS ' '

INCLUDE_FLAG = 'N'
i_deduction_card_id = PAY_DIR_COMP_DIR_CARD_ID

dummy = ESS_LOG_WRITE('[Tax Code Uplift] : Formula Execution')
dummy = ESS_LOG_WRITE('[Tax Code Uplift] : Dir Card Id = '||to_char(i_deduction_card_id))

d_dir_card_comp_id = GET_CONTEXT(DIR_CARD_COMP_ID,0)

dummy = ESS_LOG_WRITE('[Tax Code Uplift] : Dir Card Comp Id = '||to_char(d_dir_card_comp_id))

d_termination_date = HRX_GB_TERMINATION_DATE
d_effective_date = GET_CONTEXT(EFFECTIVE_DATE,'0001/01/01 00:00:00' (date))

 IF ((d_termination_date <> '0001/01/01 00:00:00' (date)) AND (d_effective_date <> '0001/01/01 00:00:00' (date)) AND (d_effective_date <= d_termination_date)) THEN
  (
   CHANGE_CONTEXTS(DEDUCTION_CARD_ID = i_deduction_card_id)
    (
     t_work_number = PAY_DIR_COMP_CONTEXT_VALUE1

	 dummy = ESS_LOG_WRITE('[Tax Code Uplift] : HMRC Payroll Id = '||t_work_number)
	 
     CHANGE_CONTEXTS(WORK_NUMBER = t_work_number)
     (	 
       IF ((GB_PAYE_HRX_GB_PAYE_TAX_CODE <> '0T') AND (GB_PAYE_HRX_GB_PAYE_TAX_CODE <> 'S0T')) THEN
         INCLUDE_FLAG = 'Y'
     )
    ) 
  )

RETURN INCLUDE_FLAG

/**********************************************************************/
/* Name        : HRX_GB_NI_CATEGORY_UPDATE                            */
/* Description : To determine if an NI record should be updated       */
/**********************************************************************/
DEFAULT FOR ORA_HRX_GB_FINAL_CLOSE_DATE IS '0001/01/01 00:00:00' (date)
DEFAULT FOR HRX_GB_DATE_OF_BIRTH IS '0001/01/01 00:00:00' (date)
DEFAULT FOR HRX_GB_GENDER IS ' '
DEFAULT FOR PAY_DIR_COMP_DIR_CARD_ID IS 0
DEFAULT FOR PAY_DIR_COMP_CONTEXT_VALUE1 IS ' '

INCLUDE_FLAG = 'N'

dummy = ESS_LOG_WRITE('[NI Category Update] : Formula Execution')

d_dir_card_comp_id = GET_CONTEXT(DIR_CARD_COMP_ID,0)

dummy = ESS_LOG_WRITE('[NI Category Update] : Dir Card Comp Id = '||to_char(d_dir_card_comp_id))

d_final_close_date = ORA_HRX_GB_FINAL_CLOSE_DATE

d_effective_date = GET_CONTEXT(EFFECTIVE_DATE,'0001/01/01 00:00:00' (date))

dummy = ESS_LOG_WRITE('[NI Category Update] : Effective Date = '||to_char(d_effective_date,'YYYY/MM/DD'))

IF ((d_final_close_date <> '0001/01/01 00:00:00' (date)) AND (d_effective_date <> '0001/01/01 00:00:00' (date)) AND (d_effective_date <= d_final_close_date)) THEN
 (
  d_date_of_birth = HRX_GB_DATE_OF_BIRTH
  d_gender = HRX_GB_GENDER
  d_state_pension_age_date = '0001/01/01 00:00:00' (date)

  IF (HRX_GB_DATE_OF_BIRTH WAS DEFAULTED) THEN
   (
    dummy = ESS_LOG_WRITE('[NI Category Update] : Date of Birth Not Found') 
   )
  ELSE
   (
    dummy = ESS_LOG_WRITE('[NI Category Update] : Date of Birth = '||to_char(d_date_of_birth,'YYYY/MM/DD')) 
	
    IF (HRX_GB_GENDER WAS DEFAULTED) THEN
     (
      dummy = ESS_LOG_WRITE('[NI Category Update] : Gender Not Found') 
     )
    ELSE 
     (
      /* Get State Pension Age Date */
      dummy = ESS_LOG_WRITE('[NI Category Update] : Gender = '||d_gender)
      SET_INPUT('L_GENDER',d_gender)
      SET_INPUT('L_DOB', d_date_of_birth)
      EXECUTE('GB_GET_STATE_PENSION_AGE')
      d_state_pension_age_date = GET_OUTPUT('D_SPA_DATE','0001/01/01 00:00:00' (date))
      dummy = ESS_LOG_WRITE('[NI Category Update] : State Pension Age Date = '||to_char(d_state_pension_age_date,'YYYY/MM/DD'))
     )  
  
    i_age = TRUNC((TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(d_effective_date,'YYYYMMDD')) - TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(d_date_of_birth,'YYYYMMDD')))/10000)
    dummy = ESS_LOG_WRITE('[NI Category Update] : Age = '||to_char(i_age)) 
  
    /* 21 or Over */
    IF (i_age >= 21) THEN
     (
      dummy = ESS_LOG_WRITE('[NI Category Update] : 21 Years Old or Over') 

      i_deduction_card_id = PAY_DIR_COMP_DIR_CARD_ID

      dummy = ESS_LOG_WRITE('[NI Category Update] : Deduction Card Id = '||to_char(i_deduction_card_id))
      
      /* Get NI Category */	
      CHANGE_CONTEXTS(DEDUCTION_CARD_ID = i_deduction_card_id)
       (
        t_ni_category = PAY_DIR_COMP_CONTEXT_VALUE1
    
        dummy = ESS_LOG_WRITE('[NI Category Update] : NI Category = '||t_ni_category)

        IF (d_state_pension_age_date <> '0001/01/01 00:00:00'(date) AND d_state_pension_age_date <= d_effective_date AND t_ni_category <> 'C' AND t_ni_category <> 'X') THEN
         (
          dummy = ESS_LOG_WRITE('[NI Category Update] : State Pension Age Date Has Been Reached for this NI Category')
          INCLUDE_FLAG = 'Y'
         )
        ELSE 
         (
          /* Check For Under 21 NI Category */
          IF ((t_ni_category = 'M') OR (t_ni_category = 'Z') OR (t_ni_category = 'I') OR (t_ni_category = 'K')) THEN
          (
           dummy = ESS_LOG_WRITE('[NI Category Update] : Still on Under 21 NI Category')
           INCLUDE_FLAG = 'Y'
          )
         ELSE 
          (
           /* Check for Over 25 and NI Category */
           IF  ((i_age >= 25) AND (t_ni_category = 'H')) THEN
            (
             dummy = ESS_LOG_WRITE('[NI Category Update] : Still on Under 25 NI Category')
             INCLUDE_FLAG = 'Y'
            )
          )
        )   
      )
     )
   )
 )

RETURN INCLUDE_FLAG

/*
     Formula Name : DEDUCTION GROUP SUMMARY FORMULA
     Decription
         This formula calls the Summary formula for each of the levels in the Deduction Group
         - until membership has been established.

*/
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR DEDUCTION_GROUP_LEVEL_SUMMARY_FORMULA_NAME is 'null'

NEED_CONTEXT(DIR_CARD_COMP_ID)
NEED_CONTEXT(EFFECTIVE_DATE)

in_group = 'N'

SET_INPUT('level_name', 'CARD_COMPONENT')
EXECUTE (DEDUCTION_GROUP_LEVEL_SUMMARY_FORMULA_NAME[1])
in_group = GET_OUTPUT('INCLUDE_FLAG', 'N')

IF (in_group = 'N') THEN
(
  SET_INPUT('level_name', 'ORA_COMPONENT_DETAIL')
  EXECUTE (DEDUCTION_GROUP_LEVEL_SUMMARY_FORMULA_NAME[1])
  in_group = GET_OUTPUT('INCLUDE_FLAG', 'N')
)

IF (in_group = 'N') THEN
(
  SET_INPUT('level_name', 'ORA_PENSION_COMPONENT_DETAIL')
  EXECUTE (DEDUCTION_GROUP_LEVEL_SUMMARY_FORMULA_NAME[1])
  in_group = GET_OUTPUT('INCLUDE_FLAG', 'N')
)

IF in_group = 'Y' THEN
  INCLUDE_FLAG = 'Y'

RETURN INCLUDE_FLAG

/********************************************************************
* Formula Name: US_PAYROLL_RUN_VALIDATION
* Author      : T.Lind
********************************************************************/

/********************************************************************
                      SET UP DEFAULTS FOR DB ITEMS
********************************************************************/

DEFAULT FOR GROSS_EARNINGS_REL_NOCB_RUN                                           IS 0
DEFAULT FOR NET_PAY_REL_NOCB_RUN                                                  IS 0
DEFAULT FOR PAYROLL_ACTION_RUN_TYPE_SHORTNAME                                     IS ' '


DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR US_EMPLOYEE_WITHHOLDING_CERTIFICATE_DIR_CARD_DIR_CARD_ID   IS 0
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR ALL_TERMS_LINK_TO_DEDUCTION_CARD                           IS 0
/* DEFAULT FOR ORA_HRX_US_TAX_INSTALL_STATUS                                         IS 'COMPLETE' */


/*******************************************************************
                    CREATE VARIABLES AND CHECKING
 *******************************************************************/
ERROR_ASG_MSG  = 'ERROR: '
ERROR_WARN_MSG = 'WARNING: '
ERROR_INFO_MSG = 'INFO: '

l_fatal   = 0
l_warning = 0
l_info    = 0
l_index   = 1
l_tindex  = 1
l_run_type_shortname = PAYROLL_ACTION_RUN_TYPE_SHORTNAME
l_dummy =PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('HRX_US_PAYROLL_RUN_VALIDATION l_run_type_shortname = '||l_run_type_shortname)
/*********************** FATAL CHECKS  ***********************/

IF l_run_type_shortname != 'RETROR' THEN (
/***** Check for negative gross earnings *****/
IF GROSS_EARNINGS_REL_NOCB_RUN < 0 THEN
(
   ERROR_ASG_MSG = GET_MESG('PAY','PAY_HPCM_GROSS_PAY_NEG')
   dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('US Legislative Check::This employee has negative gross earnings for this payroll run.')
   l_fatal = 1
)

/***** Check for negative net earnings *****/
IF NET_PAY_REL_NOCB_RUN < 0 AND l_fatal = 0 THEN
(
   ERROR_ASG_MSG = GET_MESG('PAY','PAY_HPCM_NET_PAY_NEG')
   dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('US Legislative Check::This employee has negative net earnings for this payroll run.')
   l_fatal = 1
)


/********************** WARNING CHECKS  **********************/

IF l_fatal = 0 THEN
(
   /***** Check for zero gross earnings *****/
   IF GROSS_EARNINGS_REL_NOCB_RUN = 0 THEN
   (
      ERROR_WARN_MSG = GET_MESG('PAY','PAY_HPCM_GROSS_PAY_ZERO')
      dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('US Legislative Check::This employee has zero gross earnings for this payroll run.')
      l_warning = 1
   )

   /***** Check for zero net earnings *****/
   IF NET_PAY_REL_NOCB_RUN = 0 AND l_warning = 0 THEN
   (
      ERROR_WARN_MSG = GET_MESG('PAY','PAY_HPCM_NET_PAY_ZERO')
      dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('US Legislative Check::This employee has zero net earnings for this payroll run.')
      l_warning = 1
   )
)
)

/******************** INFORMATION CHECKS  ********************/


IF l_fatal = 0 AND l_warning = 0 THEN
(
   WHILE (US_EMPLOYEE_WITHHOLDING_CERTIFICATE_DIR_CARD_DIR_CARD_ID.EXISTS(l_index)) LOOP
   (
      CHANGE_CONTEXTS(DEDUCTION_CARD_ID = US_EMPLOYEE_WITHHOLDING_CERTIFICATE_DIR_CARD_DIR_CARD_ID[l_index])      
      (
      WHILE (ALL_TERMS_LINK_TO_DEDUCTION_CARD.EXISTS(l_tindex)) LOOP
      (
  l_tindex = l_tindex + 1
  EXIT
      )
      )

      IF l_tindex = 1 THEN
      (
           ERROR_INFO_MSG = GET_MESG('HRX','HRX_USCMN_TAX_NO_TAX')
           dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('US Legislative Check::No taxes were calculated for this employee.')
           l_info = 1
    EXIT
      )

      l_index = l_index + 1
   )

   IF l_index = 1 THEN
   (
      ERROR_INFO_MSG = GET_MESG('HRX','HRX_USCMN_TAX_NO_TAX')
      dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('US Legislative Check::No taxes were calculated for this employee.')
      l_info = 1
   )
)


IF l_fatal = 1 THEN
(
   RETURN ERROR_ASG_MSG
)
/*
IF ORA_HRX_US_TAX_INSTALL_STATUS <> 'COMPLETE'
then
(
    ERROR_ASG_MSG = ERROR_ASG_MSG ||'Payroll Process is running in patching window when the tax rates are being updated. We have stopped the Payroll Process. Please review and rollback or retry based on your business decision.'
    return ERROR_ASG_MSG
)
*/

L_VALUE = GET_VALUE_SET('ORA_HRX_US_FETCH_TD_INSTALL_STATUS')

IF ISNULL(L_VALUE)= 'Y' AND L_VALUE <> 'COMPLETE'
THEN
(
    ERROR_ASG_MSG = ERROR_ASG_MSG ||'Payroll Process is running in patching window when the tax rates are being updated. We have stopped the Payroll Process. Please review and rollback or retry based on your business decision.'
    return ERROR_ASG_MSG    
)

IF l_warning = 1 THEN
(
   RETURN ERROR_WARN_MSG
)

IF l_info = 1 THEN
(
   RETURN ERROR_INFO_MSG
)


/* END OF FORMULA */

/****************************************************************************
 * 
 * Formula Name: CA_PAYROLL_RUN_VALIDATION
 * 
 * Description : Validate the Canadian Payroll Run
 * 
 * Author     Date  
 * SSOURESR             03-DEC-2012 Created
 * RBMADDUM             17-MAY-2022 BUG 34120065 - TAXABLE BENEFIT REFUND CAUSES A CALC ERROR - NEG GROSS WHEN THIS IS NOT GROSS
 *
 ****************************************************************************/

DEFAULT FOR GROSS_EARNINGS_REL_NOCB_RUN                                           IS 0
DEFAULT FOR NET_PAY_REL_NOCB_RUN                                                  IS 0
DEFAULT FOR TAX_DEDUCTIONS_REL_NOCB_RUN                                           IS 0

DEFAULT FOR PAYROLL_ACTION_RUN_TYPE_SHORTNAME                                     IS ' '


DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR CA_PERSONAL_FEDERAL_PROVINCIAL_RETURN_DIR_CARD_DIR_CARD_ID IS -1
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR ALL_TERMS_LINK_TO_DEDUCTION_CARD                           IS -1


ERROR_ASG_MSG  = 'ERROR: '
ERROR_WARN_MSG = 'WARNING: '
ERROR_INFO_MSG = 'INFO: '

l_fatal   = 0
l_warning = 0
l_info    = 0

l_link    = 0

I         = 1
J         = 1

GROSS_EARNINGS = GROSS_EARNINGS_REL_NOCB_RUN
NET_PAY        = NET_PAY_REL_NOCB_RUN
TAX_DEDUCTIONS = 0
TAX_DEDUCTIONS = TAX_DEDUCTIONS_REL_NOCB_RUN


l_run_type_shortname = PAYROLL_ACTION_RUN_TYPE_SHORTNAME


/*********************** FATAL CHECKS  ***********************/

IF (l_fatal = 0) THEN
(
   IF (NET_PAY < 0 AND l_run_type_shortname <> 'RETROR') THEN


   (
      ERROR_ASG_MSG = GET_MESG('PAY','PAY_HPCM_NET_PAY_NEG')
      l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('Formula CA_PAYROLL_RUN_VALIDATION : Employee has negative Net earnings for this payroll run')
      l_fatal = 1
   )
)

/********************  END FATAL CHECKS  *********************/


/********************** WARNING CHECKS  **********************/

IF (l_fatal = 0) THEN
(

   I = CA_PERSONAL_FEDERAL_PROVINCIAL_RETURN_DIR_CARD_DIR_CARD_ID.FIRST(-1)
   WHILE (CA_PERSONAL_FEDERAL_PROVINCIAL_RETURN_DIR_CARD_DIR_CARD_ID.EXISTS(I)) LOOP
   (
      l_link = 0 

      CHANGE_CONTEXTS(DEDUCTION_CARD_ID = CA_PERSONAL_FEDERAL_PROVINCIAL_RETURN_DIR_CARD_DIR_CARD_ID[I])      
      (
         J = ALL_TERMS_LINK_TO_DEDUCTION_CARD.FIRST(-1)
         WHILE (ALL_TERMS_LINK_TO_DEDUCTION_CARD.EXISTS(J)) LOOP
         (
            l_link = 1
            EXIT
         )
      )

      IF (l_link = 0) THEN
      (
           ERROR_WARN_MSG = GET_MESG('HRX','HRX_CACMN_TAX_CARD_NOT_CMPLT')
           l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('Formula CA_PAYROLL_RUN_VALIDATION : Employee Tax Card setup is not complete')
           l_warning = 1
           EXIT
      )

      I  = I + 1
   )

   IF (I = -1) THEN
   ( 
      ERROR_WARN_MSG = GET_MESG('HRX','HRX_CACMN_TAX_CARD_NOT_CMPLT')
      l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('Formula CA_PAYROLL_RUN_VALIDATION : Employee Tax Card setup is not complete')
      l_warning = 1
   )

   IF (l_warning = 0) THEN
   (
      IF (GROSS_EARNINGS < 0) THEN
      (
         ERROR_WARN_MSG = GET_MESG('PAY','PAY_HPCM_GROSS_PAY_NEG_WARN')
         l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('Formula CA_PAYROLL_RUN_VALIDATION : Employee has negative Gross Earnings for this payroll run')
         l_warning = 1
      )
   )

   IF (l_warning = 0) THEN
   (
      IF (GROSS_EARNINGS = 0) THEN
      (
         ERROR_WARN_MSG = GET_MESG('PAY','PAY_HPCM_GROSS_PAY_ZERO')
         l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('Formula CA_PAYROLL_RUN_VALIDATION : Employee has zero Gross Earnings for this payroll run')
         l_warning = 1
      )
   )

   IF (l_warning = 0) THEN
   (
      IF (NET_PAY = 0) THEN
      (
         ERROR_WARN_MSG = GET_MESG('PAY','PAY_HPCM_NET_PAY_ZERO')
         l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('Formula CA_PAYROLL_RUN_VALIDATION : Employee has zero Net Earnings for this payroll run')
         l_warning = 1
      )
   )
   
   IF (l_warning = 0) THEN
   (
      IF (TAX_DEDUCTIONS = 0) THEN
      (
         ERROR_WARN_MSG = GET_MESG('HRX','HRX_CAPCT_EMP_TAXES_NOT_DEDUCT')
         l_log = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('Formula CA_PAYROLL_RUN_VALIDATION : No taxes were deducted for the employee.')
         l_warning = 1
      )
   ) 

)

/*******************  END WARNING CHECKS  ********************/


/******************** INFORMATION CHECKS  ********************/

/*****************  END INFORMATION CHECKS  ******************/


IF (l_fatal = 1) THEN
   RETURN ERROR_ASG_MSG

ELSE IF (l_warning = 1) THEN
   RETURN ERROR_WARN_MSG

ELSE IF (l_info = 1) THEN
   RETURN ERROR_INFO_MSG

ELSE
   RETURN

/********************************************************************
                      SET UP DEFAULTS FOR DB ITEMS
********************************************************************/

DEFAULT FOR GROSS_EARNINGS_REL_NOCB_RUN    is 0

/*******************************************************************
                    CREATE VARIABLES AND CHECKING
 *******************************************************************/
 ERROR_ASG_MSG  = 'ERROR: '
 ERROR_WARN_MSG = 'WARNING: '

 l_fatal   = 0
 l_warning = 0

/**************** FATAL CHECKS  ***********************/


/***** Check for zero or negative gross earnings *****/
 IF GROSS_EARNINGS_REL_NOCB_RUN <= 0 THEN
  (
     ERROR_ASG_MSG = ERROR_ASG_MSG ||'Employee has zero or negative Gross Earnings.'
     l_fatal = 1
  )


 if l_fatal = 1 then
    return ERROR_ASG_MSG

 if l_warning = 1 then
    return ERROR_WARN_MSG

  /* END OF FORMULA */

      l_warning = 1
   )

   /***** Check for zero net earnings *****/
   IF l_warning = 0 AND MX_NET_PAY_REL_NOCB_RUN = 0 THEN
   (
      ERROR_WARN_MSG = GET_MESG('PAY','PAY_HPCM_NET_PAY_ZERO')

(
   RETURN ERROR_INFO_MSG
)

 *
 * Formula Name : WFM_PERIOD_MINIMUM_TIME_ENTRY_RULE_SUB
 *
 * Formula Type:  Workforce Management Subroutine
 *  
 * Description:   Evaluates whether reported time entries for the time category 
 *                are less than the defined minimum hours . The minimum hours 
 *                and time attributes are inputs to the delivered formula. 
 *                This formula uses an array to process time card data.
 *                	
 * Detail:        Compares the reported time category hours to the defined minimum 
 *                hours.  If the reported hours are less than the defined minimum, 
 *                the defined message appears.  If no message is defined, the 
 *                default message appears. The message severity is defined as an 
 *                output value associated with the displayed message. 
 *                HWM_FF_TER_PERIOD_LS_MIN_ERR - HWM_FF_TER_PERIOD_LS_MIN_WRN.

 * David Cohanoff     104.0525  2014-FEB-19   Created.

 *
 * 
***************************************************************************/  
default for ffs_id(number)  is  0

  ,l_msg_cd(text) 
  ,tcRecPos(text)
  ,wk_hrs_total_day(number)  
  ,wk_hrs_total_tc(number)  

  

ffName = 'WFM_PERIOD_MINIMUM_TIME_ENTRY_RULE_SUB - v107.1125 ' 
rLog  = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, 'Enter: ' || ffName  ) 
 
 
NullDate =  '01-JAN-1900'(DATE)  
NullDateTime = '1900/01/01 00:00:00' (date)   
NullText = '**FF_NULL**'

RecPositoinEoPeriod = 'END_PERIOD' 
RecPositoinEoDay = 'END_DAY' 
RecPositoinDetail = 'DETAIL'  
 
sumLvlTimeCard = 'TIMECARD'
sumLvlDay = 'DAY'
sumLvlDetail  = 'DETAIL' 

l_send_msg = 0 
/*
l_status = add_rlog (ffs_id , rule_id , '(Context/Fixed Parms '  || 
 ' , ffs_id ='  ||  TO_CHAR( ffs_id  ) || 
 ' , rule_id ='  ||  TO_CHAR( rule_id  ) ||   
 ' , sum_lvl ='  ||   sum_lvl ||    
 ' , empty_tc ='  ||   empty_tc ||  
 ' , tcRecPos ='  ||   tcRecPos ||  
 ' , l_min_hr ='  ||  TO_CHAR( l_min_hr ) || 
 ' , l_msg_cd ='  ||  l_msg_cd     ) 
*/
  
 
l_hrs_total_day = wk_hrs_total_day  
l_hrs_total_tc  = wk_hrs_total_tc  

 
   
is_create_msg = 'N' 
is_ck_time = 'N'
l_Ck_hours = 0
if (sum_lvl = sumLvlTimeCard  and tcRecPos =  RecPositoinEoPeriod ) then (   
   l_Ck_hours = wk_hrs_total_tc   
   is_ck_time = 'Y'
) ELSE IF (sum_lvl = sumLvlDay and tcRecPos = RecPositoinEoDay ) then (   
   l_Ck_hours = wk_hrs_total_day  
   is_ck_time = 'Y'
) ELSE IF (sum_lvl = sumLvlDetail and tcRecPos = RecPositoinDetail) then (   
   l_Ck_hours = measure   
   is_ck_time = 'Y'
) 

if ( is_ck_time = 'Y') Then (
  if (l_Ck_hours = 0 ) then ( 
    if (empty_tc = 'Y' ) then ( 
        is_create_msg  = 'Y' 
    ) 
  ) ELSE IF ( l_Ck_hours < l_min_hr  ) then (   
     is_create_msg = 'Y' 
 ) 

OUT_MSG = NullText 
if ( is_create_msg = 'Y' ) then (   
     /* desfault l_msg_cd  =  Entered hours for period is less than {DEF_LIMIT} hours required for the timecard period */
     l_tkn1 = 'DEF_LIMIT' 
     l_val1 = TO_CHAR( l_min_hr ) 
     l_msg_cd = l_msg_cd  
      OUT_MSG = get_output_msg1 ( 'FND' ,l_msg_cd ,l_tkn1 , l_val1 )
  
     l_text = '( '  ||   ' , OUT_MSG ='  ||  OUT_MSG  ||    ' )'
     l_status = add_rlog (ffs_id , rule_id ,l_text )
   )
)
    

 
     
	 

RETURN  OUT_MSG

/* +======================================================================+
   |                Copyright (c) 2009 Oracle Corporation                 |
   |                   Redwood Shores, California, USA                    |
   |                        All rights reserved.                          |
   +======================================================================+
 *
 * Formula Name : WFM_TCR_INSUFFICIENT_REST_PERIOD_PREMIUM_SUB 
 *
 * Formula Type:  Workforce Management Subroutine
 *   
 *   
 * Description:     Evaluates whether the time between reported consecutive 
 *                  shifts is less than the defined rest period. The rest  
 *                  period and specific time attribute results are inputs  
 *                  to the delivered formula. This formula uses an array to  
 *                  process time card data.	 
 *                  
 * Detail:          Compares the reported consecutive shift end and start times.   
 *                  If the rest period between the two shifts is less than the  
 *                  defined rest period, either all of the hours in the initial  
 *                  shift or only those hours that occurred within the rest period  
 *                  receive a premium pay time type. 
 *                   
 *                  
 *
 *  Change History
 *  --------------
 *
 *  Who             Ver       Date         Description
 *----------------  ------    -----------  -------------------------------
 * David Cohanoff   114.0804  2014-FEB-19  Created.  
 *
 *
 * 
***************************************************************************/   
default for ffs_id(number)       is  0    
 default for rule_id(number)     is  0   
 default for measure(number)          is  0   
 default for sum_lvl(text)            is  'TIMECARD' 
 default for rec_position(text)       is  'DETAIL'  
 default for DEFINED_LIMIT(number)    is  0  
 default for cMEASURE_DAY(number)     is  0  
 default for cMEASURE_Period(number)  is  0 
 
 default for StartTime(date)          is  '01-JAN-1900'(DATE)  
 default for StopTime(date)           is  '01-JAN-1900'(DATE)  
 default for restPeriod(number)       is  0  
 default for isEntireShift(text)      is 'Y' 
 default for WkLastStopTime(date)     is  '01-JAN-1900'(DATE) 
  
INPUTS ARE  
	ffs_id(number) ,
	rule_id(number) ,
	measure(number) , 
	sum_lvl(text),
	rec_position(text), 
	cMEASURE_DAY(number) ,
	cMEASURE_Period(number) ,
	StartTime(date),
	StopTime(date),
	restPeriod(number) , 
	isEntireShift(text),
	WkLastStopTime(date) 
 
ffName = 'WFM_TCR_INSUFFICIENT_REST_PERIOD_PREMIUM_SUB' 
rLog  = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, ffName || ' -v 115.0216  ' ||
 '  --ffs_id='  ||  TO_CHAR( ffs_id ) ||  ' , rule_id='  ||  TO_CHAR( rule_id )  ) 
 
NullDate =  '01-JAN-1900'(DATE)  
NullText =  '**FF_NULL**'
   
   
 l_status = add_rlog (ffs_id , rule_id ,'(>> Sub Inputs'  ||  
 ' ,  measure ='  ||  TO_CHAR(  measure ) || 
 ' , sum_lvl ='  ||  sum_lvl ||  
 ' , rec_position ='  ||  rec_position ||    
 ' , cMEASURE_DAY ='  ||  TO_CHAR( cMEASURE_DAY ) || 
 ' , cMEASURE_Period ='  ||  TO_CHAR( cMEASURE_Period ) ||  
 ' , StartTime ='  ||  TO_CHAR( StartTime ) || 
 ' , StopTime ='  ||  TO_CHAR( StopTime ) || 
 ' , restPeriod ='  ||  TO_CHAR( restPeriod ) ||
 ' , isEntireShift ='  ||  isEntireShift ||   
 ' , WkLastStopTime='  ||  TO_CHAR( WkLastStopTime ) ||  
 ' ) ' ) 
 
 
						
hr_ot  = 0 
hr_reg = measure			  
if (WkLastStopTime <>  NullDate and restPeriod > 0  and  measure > 0 )  then (
	if (StartTime <>  NullDate)  then (
	   breakmm  = (((days_between(StartTime,WkLastStopTime ))*24*60*60*60)/3600) 
	   rLog = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id,  ' breakmm='  ||  TO_CHAR( breakmm )  )
	   if ( restPeriod > breakmm  )  then (
			if ( isEntireShift = 'Y' ) then (
				hr_ot = measure 
				hr_reg =0	
			) else (
				overHrs = round ( ((restPeriod- breakmm) / 60 ), 2 )
				/* overhrDec = time_hhmm_to_dec(overHrs) */
				rLog = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, ' overHrs='  ||  TO_CHAR( overHrs )   )
				if (overHrs > measure) then ( 
					hr_ot = measure 
					hr_reg =0	
				) else (
					hr_ot = overHrs 
					hr_reg = measure - overHrs 
				)
			)
		)
	)
)

    
if ( hr_reg > 0 ) then (  
       out_measure_under = hr_reg 
)

if ( hr_ot   > 0 ) then (  
       out_measure_over = hr_ot   
)

l_status = add_rlog (ffs_id , rule_id , 'hr_reg='  ||  TO_CHAR( hr_reg ) ||   ' , hr_ot ='  ||  TO_CHAR( hr_ot )  )
   
    

l_status = add_rlog (ffs_id , rule_id , '<<--- Exit Sub: ' || ffName    ) 

WkLastStopTime = StopTime 

RETURN  WkLastStopTime, out_measure_under, out_measure_over

/* +======================================================================+
   |                Copyright (c) 2009 Oracle Corporation                 |
   |                   Redwood Shores, California, USA                    |
   |                        All rights reserved.                          |
   +======================================================================+
 *
 *
 * Formula Name : WFM_TSR_SUBMIT_OR_SAVE_ON_SPECIFIC_DAY_SUB 
 *
 * Formula Type:  Workforce Management Subroutine
 *   
 * Description:   Submits or saves the time card when the time collection 
 *                device Out event is reported on a specific day to the week.  
 *                Day action and specific time attribute results are inputs  
 *                to the delivered formula.	 
 *                 
 * Detail:        Submits or saves the time card based on the Out events received  
 *                from the time collection device. The Save or Submit action  
 *                applies if an Out event is received on a specific day defined  
 *                as a formula input value.  If neither condition is met, the  
 *                time card status is set to Entered.
 *                 
 *
 *  Change History
 *  --------------
 *
 *  Who             Ver       Date         Description
 *----------------  ------    -----------  -------------------------------
 * David Cohanoff   114.0804  2014-FEB-19  Created.  
 * David Cohanoff   119.0921  2019-SEP-22  Code update.  
 *
 *
 *
 * 
***************************************************************************/  
 default for ffs_id(number)           is  0   
 default for rule_id(number)          is  0
 default for rec_position(text)       is  '**FF_NULL**'
 
 default for measure(number)          is  0   
 default for StartTime(date)          is  '01-JAN-1900'(DATE)  
 default for StopTime(date)           is  '01-JAN-1900'(DATE) 
 default for dowSub(text)             is ';' 
 default for dowSave(text)            is ';' 
  
INPUTS ARE   
	ffs_id(number) ,
	rule_id(number) , 
	rec_position(text),  
	measure(number) , 
	StartTime(date),
	StopTime(date),
	dowSub(text) , 
	dowSave (text) 
	

ffName = 'WFM_TSR_SUBMIT_OR_SAVE_ON_SPECIFIC_DAY_SUB - v119.0921' 
rLog  = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, ffName    ) 
 
NullDate =  '01-JAN-1900'(DATE)   
NullText =  '**FF_NULL**'
RecPositoinEoPeriod = 'END_PERIOD' 
RecPositoinEoDay = 'END_DAY' 
RecPositoinDetail = 'DETAIL' 
   
/* must match Enum for  oracle.apps.hcm.wfm.core.publicModel.util.WfmCoreConstants.STATUS_VALUE */
TSR_SUBMIT = 'SUBMITTED'
TSR_SAVE  = 'SAVED'
TSR_ENTER= 'ENTERED'
    
   
 l_status = add_rlog (ffs_id , rule_id ,'(>> Sub Inputs'  ||  
 ' ,  measureIn ='  ||  TO_CHAR(  measure ) || 
 ' , rec_position ='  ||  rec_position ||    
 ' , StartTime ='  ||  TO_CHAR( StartTime ) || 
 ' , StopTime ='  ||  TO_CHAR( StopTime ) || 
 ' , dowSub ='  ||  dowSub ||
 ' , dowSave ='  ||  dowSave  ||
 ' ) ' ) 

 
isCheckTSR = 'N'			  
if (measure > 0 ) then ( 
	isCheckTSR = 'Y'	
) 
 rLog = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, 'measure='  ||  TO_CHAR( measure ) ||  ' isCheckTSR='  || isCheckTSR )  


 
  
out_Final_TSR =   TSR_ENTER 
/*
if ( (sum_lvl = 'TIMECARD'  and rec_position = 'END_PERIOD'  ) or
     (sum_lvl = 'DAY' and rec_position = 'END_DAY'  ) )  then
*/
if (isCheckTSR = 'Y') then 
(
  
	dowDate=  ';' + get_date_day_of_Week(StopTime ) +  ';' 
	pos = INSTR(dowSub,  dowDate )
	if (pos > 0 ) then 
	(
		out_Final_TSR = TSR_SUBMIT
	)else 
	(	
		pos = INSTR(dowSave,  dowDate )
		if (pos > 0 ) then (
			out_Final_TSR = TSR_SAVE
		)
	) 
		 
	     rLog = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id,' (**date check: '  ||   
			  ' , StopTime='  ||  TO_CHAR( StopTime ) ||  
			  ' , dowDate='  ||  dowDate   ||    
			  ' , dowSub='   ||  dowSub || 
			  ' , dowSave='  ||  dowSave || 
			  ' , out_Final_TSR='  ||  out_Final_TSR || 
			  ' , pos='  ||  TO_CHAR( pos ) ||  
			  ' ) ' ) 
	 	   
)
  
l_status = add_rlog (ffs_id , rule_id , '<<<<=== exit Sub: ' || ffName   ||  
			  ' , out_Final_TSR='  ||   out_Final_TSR    ) 

RETURN  OUT_FINAL_TSR

/* +======================================================================+
   |                Copyright (c) 2009 Oracle Corporation                 |
   |                   Redwood Shores, California, USA                    |
   |                        All rights reserved.                          |
   +======================================================================+
 *
 * Formula Name : WFM_PERIOD_MAXIMUM_TIME_ENTRY_RULE_SUB
 *
 * Formula Type:  Workforce Management Subroutine
 *              
 * Description:   Evaluates whether reported time entries for the time   
 *                category are greater than the defined maximum hours. The    
 *                maximum hours  and time attributes are inputs to the    
 *                delivered formula. This formula uses an array to process    
 *                time card data.	   
 *                
 * Detail:        Compares the reported time category hours to the defined    
 *                maximum hours.  If the reported hours are greater than     
 *                the defined maximum, the defined message appears.      
 *                If no message is defined, the default message appears.     
 *                The message severity is defined as an output value     
 *                associated with the displayed message.    
 *                 HWM_FF_TER_PERIOD_GT_MAX_ERR - HWM_FF_TER_PERIOD_GT_MAX_WRN.
 *
 *
 *
 *
 *  Change History
 *  --------------
 *
 *  Who               Ver           Date            Description
 *-----------------  ------       ------------     ----------------------------------------- 
 * David Cohanoff     104.0525  2014-FEB-19   Created. 
 * David Cohanoff     107.1205  2015-DEC-07   Updated . 
 *
 * 
***************************************************************************/   
default for ffs_id(number)  is  0  
default for rule_id(number)  is  0 
default for measure(number)  is  0 
default for l_max_hr(number)  is  0 
default for l_msg_cd(text)  is   'HWM_FF_TER_PERIOD_GT_MAX_WRN' 
default for process_empty_tc(text)  is   'DETAIL'
default for sum_lvl(text)  is   'DETAIL'
default for rec_position(text)  is   'DETAIL'
default for wk_hrs_total_day(number)  is  0 
default for wk_hrs_total_tc(number)  is  0 

INPUTS ARE   
   ffs_id(number) 
  ,rule_id(number) 
  ,measure(number) 
  ,l_max_hr (number)  
  ,l_msg_cd  (text) 
  ,process_empty_tc   (text)   
  ,sum_lvl  (text)   
  ,rec_position  (text)  
  ,wk_hrs_total_day(number)  
  ,wk_hrs_total_tc(number)   

 
ffName = 'WFM_PERIOD_MAXIMUM_TIME_ENTRY_RULE_SUB - v107.1125 ' 
rLog  = add_rlog (ffs_id, rule_id, 'Enter: ' || ffName  ) 

 
NullDate =  '01-JAN-1900'(DATE)  
NullDateTime = '1900/01/01 00:00:00' (date)   
NullText = '**FF_NULL**'

RecPositoinEoPeriod = 'END_PERIOD' 
RecPositoinEoDay = 'END_DAY' 
RecPositoinDetail = 'DETAIL'  
 
sumLvlTimeCard = 'TIMECARD'
sumLvlDay = 'DAY'
sumLvlDetail  = 'DETAIL' 

l_send_msg = 0
/*
slog =  add_rlog (ffs_id , rule_id , 'measure='  ||    TO_CHAR( measure )    || 
		   ' , max_hr ='  ||  TO_CHAR( l_max_hr) || 
		   ' , msg_cd='  ||   l_msg_cd   || 
		   ' , empty_tc='  || process_empty_tc    || 
		   ' , sum_lvl='  ||   sum_lvl  || 
		   ' , rec_position='  ||   rec_position    )
 */

  
is_create_msg = 'N'

if (sum_lvl = sumLvlTimeCard AND wk_hrs_total_tc > l_max_hr ) then (   
   is_create_msg = 'Y' 
) ELSE IF (sum_lvl = sumLvlDay AND wk_hrs_total_day > l_max_hr ) then (   
   is_create_msg = 'Y' 
) ELSE IF ( sum_lvl = sumLvlDetail AND measure > l_max_hr  ) then (   
   is_create_msg = 'Y' 
) 
 

if ( is_create_msg = 'Y' and  process_empty_tc <> 'Y') then ( 
   if (rec_position = RecPositoinEoDay and wk_hrs_total_day = 0  )  then (
       is_create_msg = 'N'
   ) if (rec_position = RecPositoinDetail and measure = 0  )  then (
       is_create_msg = 'N'
   )
)

OUT_MSG = nullText
if ( is_create_msg = 'Y' ) then (   
   /* desfault l_msg_cd  =  Maximum hours exceeds {DEF_LIMIT} hours per week */
   l_tkn1 = 'DEF_LIMIT' 
   l_val1 = TO_CHAR( l_max_hr ) 
   l_msg_cd = l_msg_cd  
    OUT_MSG = get_output_msg1 ( 'FND' ,l_msg_cd ,l_tkn1 , l_val1 )
 )

    

RETURN  OUT_MSG

/* Formula: US_EOY_ARCHIVE_CRITERIA_AREA1_FF
   Description: This formula is used to determine if a given AREA1 should be  excluded.
                The result of inclusion or exclusion will be used in the Report Block Criteria.

Version   Modified By   Change History
--------  -----------   ---------------------------------------------------------
1.0       Anh Tran       Initial Version

*/
INPUTS ARE P_GLB_EOY_ARCHIVE_AREA1 (number)

/*
Set Default Values to Parameter
*/

DEFAULT FOR P_GLB_EOY_ARCHIVE_AREA1          IS 0
DEFAULT FOR US_EOY_ARCH_INCLUDE_AREA1_AREA1  IS 0


ret_string = US_FORMULA_LOGGING ('Entering FF','US_EOY_ARCHIVE_CRITERIA_AREA1_FF')

INCLUDE = 'FALSE'

l_eoy_arch_area1     = P_GLB_EOY_ARCHIVE_AREA1
l_eoy_validate_area1 = US_EOY_ARCH_INCLUDE_AREA1_AREA1
ret_string = US_FORMULA_LOGGING ('l_eoy_arch_area1',to_char(l_eoy_arch_area1))
ret_string = US_FORMULA_LOGGING ('l_eoy_validate_area1',to_char(l_eoy_validate_area1))

IF (l_eoy_validate_area1 = l_eoy_arch_area1
    and (l_eoy_validate_area1 != 0 and l_eoy_arch_area1 != 0))
THEN
   ( INCLUDE = 'TRUE' )
ELSE
   ( INCLUDE = 'FALSE' )

IF (INCLUDE = 'FALSE') THEN
   ret_string = US_FORMULA_LOGGING ('State Will be Excluded',to_char(l_eoy_arch_area1))
ELSE
   ret_string = US_FORMULA_LOGGING ('State Will be Included',to_char(l_eoy_arch_area1))


ret_string = US_FORMULA_LOGGING ('Exiting FF','US_EOY_ARCHIVE_CRITERIA_AREA1_FF')
RETURN INCLUDE

DEFAULT FOR PER_TERM_REL_DATE_START IS '0001/01/01 00:00:00' (date) 
DEFAULT FOR PER_TRM_REL_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DATE IS '0001/01/01 00:00:00' (date) 
DEFAULT FOR PER_PER_WORK_RELATIONSHIP_MAX_DATE IS '0001/01/01 00:00:00' (date) 
DEFAULT FOR PAYROLL_INTERFACE_LATEST_ASSIGNED_PAYROLL IS -1 
DEFAULT FOR PER_TERM_REL_LEGISLATION_CODE IS 'null' 
DEFAULT FOR PER_REL_LEGISLATION_CODE IS 'null' 
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR PER_EXT_WORK_REL_PERIOD_OF_SERVICE_ID IS -1 
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR PER_EXT_WORK_REL_DATE_START IS '0001/01/01 00:00:00' (date) 
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR PER_EXT_WORK_REL_LEGISLATION_CODE IS ' ' 
 
INCLUDE = 'FALSE' 
X = PER_TERM_REL_DATE_START 
pid = PAYROLL_INTERFACE_LATEST_ASSIGNED_PAYROLL 
 
l_pos_max_dt = PER_PER_WORK_RELATIONSHIP_MAX_DATE 
l_new_pos_first_dt = '4712/12/31 00:00:00' (date) 
l_pre_pos_leg_code = 'null' 
l_max_pos_leg_code = 'null' 
l_max_pos_id = -1 
I = 1 
WHILE PER_EXT_WORK_REL_PERIOD_OF_SERVICE_ID.EXISTS(I) LOOP  
( 
	IF PER_EXT_WORK_REL_PERIOD_OF_SERVICE_ID[I] > l_max_pos_id THEN  
	( 
		l_max_pos_id = PER_EXT_WORK_REL_PERIOD_OF_SERVICE_ID[I] 
	) 
	I = I + 1 
) 
CHANGE_CONTEXTS(EFFECTIVE_DATE=l_pos_max_dt, HR_RELATIONSHIP_ID=l_max_pos_id) 
( 
	l_max_pos_leg_code = PER_REL_LEGISLATION_CODE 
) 
l_pre_pos_leg_code = PER_TERM_REL_LEGISLATION_CODE 
 
I = 1 
WHILE PER_EXT_WORK_REL_LEGISLATION_CODE.EXISTS(I) LOOP  
( 
	IF PER_EXT_WORK_REL_LEGISLATION_CODE[I] = l_max_pos_leg_code AND l_new_pos_first_dt > PER_EXT_WORK_REL_DATE_START[I] THEN  
	( 
		l_new_pos_first_dt = PER_EXT_WORK_REL_DATE_START[I] 
	) 
	I = I + 1 
) 
 
IF (X = l_pos_max_dt or (l_pre_pos_leg_code != l_max_pos_leg_code and ADD_DAYS(PER_TRM_REL_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DATE, 1) = l_new_pos_first_dt)) and pid = GET_CONTEXT(PAYROLL_ID, -2) THEN 
( 
	INCLUDE = 'TRUE' 
) 
RETURN INCLUDE

INPUTS ARE PAYROLL_RELATIONSHIP_GROUP (number),
P_GLB_EOY_ARCHIVE_PR_PAYROLL_RELATIONSHIP_ID (number)

DEFAULT FOR PAYROLL_RELATIONSHIP_GROUP IS 0
DEFAULT FOR ORA_GLB_EOY_RELATIONSHIP_GROUP_FLAG IS 'NA'
DEFAULT_DATA_VALUE FOR PERSON_GROUP_PAY_REL_LEVEL_FORMULA_NAME is 'null'

IN_GRP = 'N'
INCLUDE = 'FALSE'

IF (PAYROLL_RELATIONSHIP_GROUP  > 0) THEN
(
	CHANGE_CONTEXTS(PAYROLL_RELATIONSHIP_ID = P_GLB_EOY_ARCHIVE_PR_PAYROLL_RELATIONSHIP_ID,
		OBJECT_GROUP_ID = PAYROLL_RELATIONSHIP_GROUP)
	(
		STATIC_FLAG = ORA_GLB_EOY_RELATIONSHIP_GROUP_FLAG
		form_name = PERSON_GROUP_PAY_REL_LEVEL_FORMULA_NAME
		
		IF (STATIC_FLAG = 'INCLUDE')  THEN (
			INCLUDE = 'TRUE'
			RETURN INCLUDE
		)
		IF (STATIC_FLAG = 'EXCLUDE')  THEN (
			INCLUDE = 'FALSE'
			RETURN INCLUDE
		)
		IF (STATIC_FLAG = 'INCLUDE_E')  THEN (
			IF(NOT form_name.exists(1)) THEN (
				INCLUDE = 'TRUE'
				RETURN INCLUDE
			)
		)
		
		CALL_FORMULA('PAYROLL PERSON GROUP LEVEL SUMMARY FORMULA',
			'PAY_REL' > 'level_name',
			IN_GRP < 'INCLUDE_FLAG' DEFAULT 'N'
		)
	)
) ELSE
(
    INCLUDE = 'TRUE'
)

IF (IN_GRP = 'Y') THEN 
(
	INCLUDE = 'TRUE'
)	
RETURN INCLUDE

     Decription

         use to initialise iterative process for a payroll relationship id

     Note: This is just a wrapper in case the Function parameters change in

           target_value (number)

if (target_value was defaulted) then
(
    target_value = 0
)

return_value = ITERATIVE_INITIALISE( target_value)

RETURN return_value

/*******************************************************************
FORMULA NAME: ORA_HRX_GB_SHPL_AGREEMENT_ELIGIBILITY
FORMULA TYPE: Global Absence Agreement Eligibility
DESCRIPTION : UK Shared Parental Leave Agreement Eligibility
History :
Updated length of service check Sep 2018
********************************************************************/

DEFAULT for PER_ASG_REL_DATE_START is '4712/12/31 00:00:00' (date)
DEFAULT FOR IV_START_DATE IS '0001/01/01 00:00:00' (DATE)
DEFAULT FOR IV_END_DATE IS '4712/12/31 00:00:00' (DATE)
DEFAULT FOR IV_AGREEMENT_START_DATE IS '0001/01/01 00:00:00' (DATE)
DEFAULT FOR IV_AGREEMENT_END_DATE IS '4712/12/31 00:00:00' (DATE)
DEFAULT for IV_EVENT_TYPE_CODE is ' ' 
DEFAULT for IV_AGREEMENT_STATUS is ' ' 
DEFAULT for IV_ABSENCE_AGREEMENT_ID is 0
DEFAULT FOR PER_PPS_LEG_DDF_GB_STAT_ABS_SER_START_DATE IS '4712/12/31 00:00:00' (DATE)
DEFAULT for IV_EXPECTEDCHILDBIRTHDATE is '4712/12/31 00:00:00' (date)
DEFAULT FOR IV_MATCHINGDATE IS '0001/01/01 00:00:00' (date)

INPUTS ARE IV_START_DATE,IV_END_DATE, IV_AGREEMENT_START_DATE, IV_AGREEMENT_END_DATE, IV_AGREEMENT_STATUS, IV_EVENT_TYPE_CODE, IV_ABSENCE_AGREEMENT_ID,
IV_EXPECTEDCHILDBIRTHDATE,IV_MATCHINGDATE


	VALID='Y'
	l_trunc_eff_date = TRUNC(GET_CONTEXT(EFFECTIVE_DATE,'0001/01/01' (date)))
	l_start_date = IV_START_DATE

	CHANGE_CONTEXTS(EFFECTIVE_DATE=l_trunc_eff_date)
	(
		IF PER_PPS_LEG_DDF_GB_STAT_ABS_SER_START_DATE WAS DEFAULTED THEN
		( l_seniority_date = PER_ASG_REL_DATE_START )
		ELSE
		( l_seniority_date = PER_PPS_LEG_DDF_GB_STAT_ABS_SER_START_DATE)
	)


	l_expected_child_birth = IV_EXPECTEDCHILDBIRTHDATE  

	l_day_of_week = GET_DATE_DAY_OF_WEEK(l_expected_child_birth)

	l_ewc = l_expected_child_birth /* initialise */
	l_event_type =IV_EVENT_TYPE_CODE
	/** Start init */
	l_complete_qweek=l_ewc
	l_no_of_days=days_between(l_start_date,l_seniority_date) /* initialize based on start date*/
	l_qweek = l_ewc
	l_mws = IV_MATCHINGDATE
	l_matching_week = l_mws
	/** End init */

	if(l_event_type = 'CHB') then
	(
		IF(l_day_of_week = 'SUN') THEN
			( l_ewc = l_expected_child_birth)
		ELSE IF(l_day_of_week = 'MON') THEN
			(l_ewc = ADD_DAYS(l_expected_child_birth,-1))
		ELSE IF (l_day_of_week = 'TUE') THEN
			(l_ewc = ADD_DAYS(l_expected_child_birth,-2))
		ELSE IF (l_day_of_week = 'WED') THEN
			(l_ewc = ADD_DAYS(l_expected_child_birth,-3))
		ELSE IF (l_day_of_week = 'THU') THEN
			(l_ewc = ADD_DAYS(l_expected_child_birth,-4))
		ELSE IF (l_day_of_week = 'FRI') THEN
			(l_ewc = ADD_DAYS(l_expected_child_birth,-5))
		ELSE IF (l_day_of_week = 'SAT') THEN
			(l_ewc = ADD_DAYS(l_expected_child_birth,-6))

		/* Calculate Qualifying week*/
		l_qweek = add_days(l_ewc,-105)
		l_complete_qweek = add_days(l_qweek,6)  
		l_no_of_days = DAYS_BETWEEN(l_complete_qweek(date),l_seniority_date) + 1

	)
	ELSE  /* event is not childbirth */
	(
	  if(IV_MATCHINGDATE WAS NOT DEFAULTED) then
	  (
		/* Calculate matching week */
		l_mws = trunc( IV_MATCHINGDATE, 'DAY')
		l_matching_week = add_days(l_mws,6)
		l_no_of_days=days_between(l_matching_week,l_seniority_date) + 1
	  )
	)

	l_length_of_service=Floor(l_no_of_days/7)

	IF ( l_no_of_days < 176) THEN
	(
		VALID = 'N'
	)

return VALID

/*
     Formula Name : CORE ANNUALISED
     Decription
         This formula performs an annualised calculation using the DIR function
         This takes the accumulated taxable amount, calculates the deduction,
         and subtracts the deducation amount already taken.
*/
DEFAULT FOR range_value is 1
DEFAULT FOR calculation_factor is 1
INPUTS ARE reduced_deductable_ptd,
           deduction_amount_ptd,
           range_value,
           calculation_factor

/*GAGA*/
/* Set the Calculation Method context */

bal_deduction = reduced_deductable_ptd * PAY_PERIODS_PER_YEAR

IF (range_value was defaulted) THEN
   local_range = bal_deduction
ELSE
   local_range = range_value

periodicity = 'NONE'
out_uom = 'NONE'
ded_amount = CALC_DIR_VALUE(periodicity, out_uom, bal_deduction, local_range, calculation_factor)
ded_amount = ded_amount/PAY_PERIODS_PER_YEAR
ded_amount = ded_amount - deduction_amount_ptd
RETURN ded_amount

/*
     Formula Name : CORE INDEPENDENT
     Decription
         This formula performs an independent calculation
*/
DEFAULT FOR range_value is 1
DEFAULT FOR calculation_factor is 1
INPUTS ARE reduced_deductable_rtd,
           deduction_amount_rtd,
           range_value,
           calculation_factor

/*GAGA*/
/* Set the Calculation Method context */

bal_deduction = reduced_deductable_rtd

IF (range_value was defaulted) THEN
   local_range = bal_deduction
ELSE
   local_range = range_value

periodicity = 'NONE'
out_uom = 'NONE'
ded_amount = CALC_DIR_VALUE(periodicity, out_uom, bal_deduction, local_range, calculation_factor)

/* The deduction amount rtd  should be zero but if we are doing a multi-calculation subtract just in case */
ded_amount = ded_amount - deduction_amount_rtd

RETURN ded_amount

/*
     Formula Name : IE ANNUALIZED RATE CONVERSION
     Decription
         This formula available for use by the Rate Converter. This converts
         the in_amount to a annual value, then converts it to the output
         periodicity.
*/
default for in_periodicity is 'UNKNOWN'
default for start_date is '0001/01/01 00:00:00'(date)
default for end_date is '0001/01/01 00:00:00'(date)
default for conversion_table is 'STANDARD'

inputs are in_periodicity (text),
              in_amount (number),
              out_periodicity (text),
              effdate (date),
              start_date (date),
              end_date (date),
              conversion_table (text)

  dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('Start Annualized Rate Conversion')
   dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('[IE ANNUALIZED RATE CONVERSION]: In Amount '||to_char(in_amount) ||'Periodicty '||in_periodicity)
   dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('[IE ANNUALIZED RATE CONVERSION]: Out Periodicty '||out_periodicity)
   dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('[IE ANNUALIZED RATE CONVERSION]: Effective Date '||to_char(effdate) )
   dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('[IE ANNUALIZED RATE CONVERSION]: Start Date '||to_char(start_date) )
   dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('[IE ANNUALIZED RATE CONVERSION]: End Date '||to_char(end_date) )
   dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('[IE ANNUALIZED RATE CONVERSION]: Conversion Table '||conversion_table)
l_period_type = UPPER(PAYROLL_PERIOD_TYPE)
l_periodicity = in_periodicity
l_in_amount = in_amount
l_out_periodicity = 'YEAR'
l_effdate  = effdate
l_start_date = start_date
l_end_date = end_date
l_conversion_table = conversion_table
			  
  l_amt = -9999
  if (in_periodicity was defaulted) then
  (
       dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('[IE ANNUALIZED RATE CONVERSION]: Default in Periodicity ')      
       l_periodicity = l_period_type

  ) 
  
   SET_INPUT('in_periodicity', l_periodicity)
   SET_INPUT('in_amount',l_in_amount)
   SET_INPUT('out_periodicity',l_out_periodicity)
   SET_INPUT('start_date',l_start_date)
   SET_INPUT('end_date',l_end_date)
   SET_INPUT('conversion_table',l_conversion_table)
   SET_INPUT('effdate',l_effdate)
   EXECUTE ('ANNUALIZED RATE CONVERSION')
   out_amount = GET_OUTPUT('out_amount', 0)  
   dummy = PAY_INTERNAL_LOG_WRITE('[IE ANNUALIZED RATE CONVERSION]: Out Amount '||to_char(out_amount))
return out_amount

/* Oracle Payroll Generic Balance Adjustment Formula */

  /* Database Items */
  default for BALADJ_BAL_ADJ_LINE_ID        is EMPTY_NUMBER_NUMBER
  default for BALADJ_ELEMENT_TYPE_ID        is EMPTY_NUMBER_NUMBER
  default for BALADJ_COST_ALLOC_ACCOUNT_ID  is EMPTY_NUMBER_NUMBER
  default for BALADJCTX_BASE_CONTEXT_NAME   is EMPTY_TEXT_NUMBER
  default for BALADJCTX_CONTEXT_VALUE       is EMPTY_TEXT_NUMBER
  default for BALADJVAL_INPUT_VALUE_ID      is EMPTY_NUMBER_NUMBER
  default for BALADJVAL_ENTRY_VALUE         is EMPTY_TEXT_NUMBER

  /* Derive Balance Adjustment Lines */

  i = 1
  while (i <= BALADJ_BAL_ADJ_LINE_ID.count) loop
  (
    /*  Derive adjustment contexts and values for each adjustment line. */
    change_contexts(BAL_ADJ_LINE_ID = BALADJ_BAL_ADJ_LINE_ID[i])
    (
      call_formula('ORA_CREATE_BALADJ_RESULT',
                   BALADJ_ELEMENT_TYPE_ID[i]       > 'P_ELEMENT_TYPE_ID',
                   BALADJ_COST_ALLOC_ACCOUNT_ID[i] > 'P_COST_ALLOC_ACCOUNT_ID',
                   BALADJCTX_BASE_CONTEXT_NAME     > 'P_BASE_CONTEXT_NAME_ARRAY',
                   BALADJCTX_CONTEXT_VALUE         > 'P_CONTEXT_VALUE_ARRAY',
                   BALADJVAL_INPUT_VALUE_ID        > 'P_INPUT_VALUE_ID_ARRAY',
                   BALADJVAL_ENTRY_VALUE           > 'P_ENTRY_VALUE_ARRAY')
    )

    /* Increment the adjustment line index. */
    i = i + 1
  )

/* End of Balance Adjustment Formula */
